title: Fullstackutvecklare
description:
Vi har nu ett nytt behov och söker därför en konsultkollega med nedan kvalifikationer. Tjänsten är en del av vår konsultverksamhet vilket innebär att du blir anställd av oss och arbetar hos kund alt. interna projekt och åtaganden.

 **Din profil (Skall krav)**  

* Svenska i tal och skrift
* Python
* Azure Cloud (Container Apps, Key Vault, Cosmos DB, Application Insights, Azure OpenAI)
* AI/ML (Semantic Kernel, prompt engineering, GPT-modeller, RAG-mönster)
* Databaser (NoSQL och relationsdatabas)

  

**Meriterande**  

* Erfarenhet av konversationella AI-agenter och flerstegsdialoger
* Erfarenhet av att nyttja och administrera API:er
* Erfarenhet av OAuth 2.0 och OIDC
* UV-pakethanterare, pytest för testning
* Erfarenhet av infrastruktur och CI/CD (Terraform, Docker, CI/CD med GitHub Actions)
* FE React

  

**Sista ansökningdatum:** 19-03-2026 **Om Oss**  

Att jobba på Deploja är något helt annat än att arbeta på ett vanligt konsultbolag – och det är vi riktigt stolta över. Vad är det då som gör oss unika?

  

Vi erbjuder helt enkelt mer än bara hög lön och större frihet, det är bara början. Hos oss hittar du den arbetsmiljö och de möjligheter du förtjänar. Här påverkar du din egen lön som helt och hållet som baseras på ditt timpris mot kund.


Vår lönemodell är en hybridlösning mellan en fast månadslön och en provisionsbaserad ersättning. Det innebär att din månadslön baseras på ditt timpris, fast om du mot förmodan skulle stå utan uppdrag så behåller du en grund lön fram tills vi hittat ett nytt uppdrag, bra va?

 **Vi erbjuder dig följande, Valet är ditt!**


Spännande uppdrag hos våra många kunder. Vi fokuserar på långsiktiga uppdrag, vilket ger dig möjlighet att skapa värde för kunden samtidigt som du utvecklas själv.


En trygg månadslön – tillsammans bestämmer vi en grundlön baserad på dina uppdrag.


Tjänstebil – vi uppmuntrar dig att välja en elbil för en mer hållbar framtid.


Tjänstepension och stora möjligheter till löneväxling.


Semester - Önskar du mer än 30 dagar semester, kanske 60 dagar?


Privat sjukvårdsförsäkring, olycksfallsförsäkring och livförsäkring för ökad trygghet.

  

Kompetensutveckling – du får själv sätta din budget och välja vilka utbildningar du vill delta i.


Livskvalitet - Har du kanske svårt att få ihop pusslet i vardagen och önskar arbeta lite mindre och ändå kunna tjäna lika mycket om inte mer?  

  

*Vi hanterar ansökningar löpande, med hänsyn till höga arbetstrycket är det extra viktigt med en kort motivering för tjänsten som förklarar hur man möter kraven.*

title: Senior mjukvaruutvecklare
description:
Vill du arbeta i ett globalt företag där du kan bidra till en mer hållbar livsmedelsproduktion? DeLaval är en ledande utvecklare, tillverkare och leverantör av lösningar för mjölkproducenter världen över. Som ett företag byggt på innovation arbetar vi ständigt för att hitta nya sätt att hjälpa våra kunder att göra mer med mindre.


Nu söker ett av våra utvecklingsteam en erfaren mjukvaruutvecklare som vill vara med och driva den fortsatta utvecklingen av våra embedded-lösningar.

**Roll och ansvarsområden**


I vårt team arbetar vi med produktutveckling från idé till färdig lösning, samtidigt som vi kontinuerligt vidareutvecklar och förbättrar befintliga system och komponenter. Vi utvecklar huvudsakligen embedded programvara i Java, där kraven specificeras i Polarion och även utgör grunden för våra automatiserade testfall.


Vi följer en agil arbetsmetodik med 10 veckors increment och 2 veckors sprintar för att säkerställa regelbundna leveranser och ett tydligt tempo i utvecklingsarbetet. Samarbete är en central del av vår vardag, och vi arbetar tätt med både kravteam och integrationstest för att skapa robusta och välfungerande lösningar.


För att kvalitetssäkra våra produkter har vi tillgång till egna testmiljöer, och vid behov utför vi också tester på riktiga robotsystem ute på gårdar. Detta säkerställer att våra lösningar fungerar i verkliga miljöer och uppfyller kundernas behov på bästa sätt.

**Kvalifikationer:**

**För att lyckas i denna roll tror vi att du har:**

* Du är en lagspelare som är stolt över ditt arbete och strävar efter hög kvalitet.
* Du har tillräcklig erfarenhet av mjukvaruutveckling för att kunna ta ett arkitektur ansvar.
* Du har en masterexamen inom datavetenskap eller motsvarande utbildning.
* Du trivs med att lösa komplexa problem och gillar nya utmaningar.
* Du behärskar svenska och engelska i tal och skrift.
* Du har erfarenhet av agilt arbetssätt.

**Det är också meriterande om du har:**

* Kunskap i Python, C eller C++ (används i äldre system).
* Erfarenhet av att skriva automatiserade testfall.
* Erfarenhet av verktyg som Jira, Confluence, Polarion, NetBeans och Git.
* Kunskap inom code quality assurance-verktyg.

title: React Developer - Agentic First Frontend Development
description:
Are you a React enthusiast who gets excited about creating exceptional user experiences? Do you thrive on staying ahead of the curve with AI-enhanced, agentic, development practices? We're looking for a talented React Developer to join our dynamic team at Spiris to help shape the future of our digital products!

#### **About the Role**


As a React Developer at Spiris, you'll be part of our ambitious AI transformation journey. We're committed to leading the industry in AI integration, with significant investments in AI technologies across our product portfolio. You'll work with cutting-edge tech stacks and have the opportunity to shape how we leverage AI in our frontend development, while collaborating with talented designers, developers, and AI specialists.


We're not just keeping pace with AI - we're helping define its future in business software. From AI-enhanced development practices to implementing AI features in our products, we're looking for developers who share our vision of AI as a transformative force in software development. We expect you're already familiar with AI-powered development tools like Claude Code, GitHub Copilot or Cursor, as these represent just the beginning of how we're integrating AI into our development workflow.

#### **What You'll Do**

* Design and implement sophisticated React applications with a focus on performance, reusability, and maintainability
* Collaborate with cross-functional teams to deliver exceptional user experiences
* Contribute to our component library and help establish best practices
* Participate in code reviews and technical discussions
* Stay current with front-end development trends and bring fresh ideas to the team
* Work with modern state management solutions and API integration patterns

#### **Who You Are**


We believe you are someone who:

* Has 3+ years of professional experience with React and modern JavaScript
* Demonstrates strong expertise in HTML5, CSS3, and responsive design principles
* Has experience with modern React patterns (Hooks, Context, React Query)
* Values clean, maintainable code and follows best practices
* Is comfortable with version control systems (Git) and CI/CD pipelines
* Has good knowledge of REST APIs and modern browser technologies
* Brings experience with testing frameworks (Vitest, React Testing Library, Playwright)
* Uses AI development tools as a genuine development partner, not just autocomplete
* Communicates fluently in English and Swedish

#### **What We Offer**

* The opportunity to grow alongside enthusiastic colleagues in one of Sweden's leading SaaS companies, part of Europe's largest tech group. We are proud to be recognized as a **Karriärföretag 2026** and a **Top 10 Most Attractive Employer for Women in IT**
* A hybrid work culture offering flexibility in your daily life, with the option to work from our wonderful offices or partially remote
* "My Competence Day" - dedicated time for your personal and professional development
* Health and wellness initiatives that promote both mental and physical well-being
* Regular tech talks, hackathons, and guild meetings where you can share and expand your knowledge
* A warm and inclusive work environment with helpful colleagues who share your passion for technology

#### **Sounds exciting? We'd love to hear from you!**


We review applications continuously. For more information about the position, please contact peter.harder@spiris.se. Tests and background checks are part of our recruitment process.

#### **About Spiris**


We're passionate about creating cloud-based solutions that empower businesses to focus on what they love. Our mission is to make business processes simple and efficient, allowing entrepreneurs to pursue their passions while we handle the technical heavy lifting.

  

When we ask our employees why they enjoy working here, most mention our company culture, the engagement among colleagues, and the abundant opportunities for growth. Join our team of approximately 500 colleagues in a workplace full of possibilities!

title: Senior Mjukvaruutvecklare
description:
**Om oss**  

På Techrytera AB börjar rekryteringen med dig. Vi är ett bemannings- och rekryteringsföretag med spetskompetens och ett tydligt fokus inom IT och Engineering. Med vår branschkunskap och nära dialog med både kandidater och kunder skapar vi träffsäkra matchningar där rätt kompetens möter rätt behov.


Vi tror att en riktigt bra matchning inte bara handlar om en rollbeskrivning – utan om dina erfarenheter, din potential och vad du faktiskt vill utvecklas inom. Därför utgår vi alltid från individen. Genom att förstå din bakgrund, dina drivkrafter och dina ambitioner kan vi koppla ihop dig med uppdrag och roller hos våra kunder där du får rätt förutsättningar att utvecklas och göra skillnad.


Vårt mål är att bygga långsiktiga och meningsfulla samarbeten – både för dig som kandidat och för våra kunder.  

  

**Arbetsbeskrivning**  

Vill du arbeta i ett globalt företag där du kan bidra till en mer hållbar livsmedelsproduktion? Kunden är en ledande utvecklare, tillverkare och leverantör av lösningar för mjölkproducenter världen över. Som ett företag byggt på innovation arbetar kunden ständigt för att hitta nya sätt att hjälpa sina kunder att göra mer med mindre.


Nu söker ett av kundens utvecklingsteam en erfaren mjukvaruutvecklare som vill vara med och driva den fortsatta utvecklingen av deras embedded-lösningar.  

  

Vi tror att:  

Du är en lagspelare som är stolt över ditt arbete och strävar efter hög kvalitet.


Du har tillräcklig erfarenhet av mjukvaruutveckling för att kunna ta ett arkitektur ansvar.


Du har en **masterexamen inom datavetenskap eller motsvarande utbildning.**


Du trivs med att lösa komplexa problem och gillar nya utmaningar.


Du **behärskar svenska och engelska i tal och skrift.**


Du har **erfarenhet av agilt arbetssätt.**


Det är också meriterande om du har:


Kunskap i **Python, C eller C++** (används i äldre system).


Erfarenhet av att skriva **automatiserade testfall.**


Erfarenhet av verktyg som **Jira, Confluence, Polarion, NetBeans och Git**.


Kunskap inom **code quality assurance-verktyg.**  

  

**Ansökan**  

När du söker via Techrytera AB söker du inte bara ett jobb – du påbörjar en dialog om din fortsatta karriär. Vi vill lära känna dig, din erfarenhet och dina ambitioner för att kunna matcha dig med rätt möjligheter hos våra kunder.


Låter det intressant? Skicka in din ansökan eller hör av dig till oss så berättar vi mer. Vi ser fram emot att hitta nästa steg i din karriär tillsammans med dig.

title: .Net Fullstack Developer
description:
We now have a new requirement and are looking for a consultant colleague with the qualifications listed below. The position is part of our consulting business, which means you will be employed by us and work either with clients or on internal projects and assignments.

*As part of your application, you may be presented to clients/partners as part of the recruitment process. If selected for the assignment, you will be employed by us and work either with clients or on internal projects and assignments as part of our consulting business.*

 **Your Profile (Must-have requirements)**  

* Experience of software development in C#, .NET, WPF, XAML
* Experience in asynchronus programming
* Experience in memory and performance profiling
* Experience from developing software for resource constraint platforms
* Some knowledge of windows system programming and configuration, HTML5/JavaScript and domain knowledge in Robotics.

 **Application deadline:** 27-03-2026

 **About Us**  

We currently employ experienced consultants in areas such as System Development, AI, Machine Learning, Testing, Cloud, Infra DevOps, and IT Project Management.  

  

Working at Deploja is something entirely different from working at an ordinary consulting company—and we are really proud of that. So, what makes us unique?  

  

We simply offer more than just a high salary and greater freedom; that’s just the beginning. With us, you’ll find the work environment and opportunities you deserve. Welcome to Deploja, where the grass is indeed greener!

 **Vi erbjuder dig följande, Valet är ditt!**


Exciting assignments with our many clients. We focus on long-term projects, which gives you the opportunity to create value for the client while also developing yourself.


A secure monthly salary – together we’ll agree on a base salary depending on your assignments.


Company car – we encourage you to choose an electric car for a more sustainable future.


Occupational pension and great opportunities for salary conversion.


Vacation – Would you like more than 30 days of vacation, perhaps 60 days?


Private health insurance, accident insurance, and life insurance for increased security.


Skills development – you set your own budget and choose the training you wish to attend.


Quality of life – Are you struggling to balance everyday life and wish to work a little less while still earning as much, if not more?

*We handle applications continuously, and due to the high workload, it's especially important to include a short motivation for the position, explaining how you meet the requirements.*

title: Game Client Developer
description:
*At Avanti, we are redefining the live casino experience by merging high-end technology with seamless interactivity. Our vision is to transform how people engage with digital entertainment, moving away from static platforms toward dynamic, real-time environments that feel alive and responsive. We exist to solve the complexity of live digital interaction, ensuring that every bet, every move, and every game round is delivered with absolute precision and technical excellence.*

*Our purpose is to build the architecture that allows for hyper-realistic and reliable gameplay at scale. To achieve this ambitious goal and connect our users directly to the action, we are now looking for a Game Client Developer to join our team.*

### **The Opportunity**


As a Game Client Developer at Avanti, you will hold a key role at the heart of our product development. you will be the "middle-man" for all communication—the link that connects our Live Experience, Game Tech, and the Platform. This is a unique chance to work in a role with the broadest overview of the organization, where your code directly enables users worldwide to interact with our games in real-time.


You will be part of building the game development frameworks of the future. Instead of just maintaining existing systems, you will drive constant R&D to create leaner libraries and boilerplates that make our development journey smoother and more scalable. Your work will have a direct impact on how sustainably and efficiently we can roll out new game titles in our portfolio.


In this environment, you will have the space to grow as technology is constantly adapted and evolved. You won’t just write logic for game starts and bet management; you will also influence the graphical interface and the rules that govern the experience. This is a role for someone who thrives with high ownership and wants to see the results of their work in a live, high-performance product.

### **Main Responsibilities**

* Develop and implement user interfaces (UI) and graphical elements for all game titles.
* Build and refine a lean framework and boilerplates to streamline future game development.
* Take responsibility for client-side logic regarding game starts, bet management, and compliance.
* Manage real-time communication and data streams via WebSockets and WebRTC.
* Integrate third-party solutions and handle post-messaging for seamless platform communication.
* Collaborate with the product team to translate design ideas into technical game statistics and rules.
* Create sustainable systems that allow non-technical staff to administrate parts of the game environment.

### **Who we are looking for**


We are looking for a social and outgoing team player who thrives in the role of a technical communicator. As you act as the bridge between several different teams, you must be comfortable explaining complex technical concepts to colleagues with different expertise without losing the technical nuances of the dialogue. You have a natural drive and the ability to take full responsibility for your domains in a fast-paced environment.


To succeed in this role, you need to be organized and capable of managing multiple parallel deadlines as our game portfolio grows. We value "self-drive," where you identify the next steps yourself and proactively seek feedback from relevant teams. You are someone who sees challenges as R&D opportunities and is attracted by the need to constantly adapt your methodology to the latest technology.

### **Qualifications**

* Excellent knowledge of HTML and TypeScript.
* Documented experience with real-time data and handling WebRTC.
* Strong understanding of REST APIs and communication via WebSockets.
* Experience in responsive design to ensure a seamless experience across all devices.
* Ability to write and implement complex game logic and rules.

### **It is a plus if you have**

* Experience with modern frameworks such as Angular or React.
* Previous experience within iGaming or Live Casino.
* Experience in developing multiplayer systems.

### **Who we are**


Avanti is an innovative player in the live casino industry, focusing on uniting technology and the joy of gaming in new ways. We are in an exciting expansion phase, building a portfolio of high-quality games. With a team of passionate experts, we strive to be the leading platform for the real-time entertainment of the future.

### **What we offer**

* A broad role where you work with everything from graphical development to deep system logic.
* The opportunity to conduct constant R&D and influence the choice of future technologies.
* A central role in the organization with contact points to the majority of teams.
* Competitive salary with a target around 60,000 SEK.
* A culture characterized by collaboration, openness, and technical curiosity.

### **Department & Location**


Game Tech Team, Stockholm.

### **Application**


We review applications continuously. Submit your application via our website: https://avanti.live/

title: Game server Developer
description:
*Avanti operates at the intersection of advanced real-time technology and interactive entertainment. Our mission is to redefine digital engagement by blurring the lines between the virtual and the physical, creating next-generation live experiences driven by hyper-realistic characters and AI-powered interaction. We exist to challenge established truths in the industry, injecting technical brilliance into systems that demand absolute stability and global scalability.*

*We are here to transform the landscape of live digital experiences by combining the high-fidelity aesthetics of AAA gaming with the complex logic of regulated interactive systems. Our goal is to build a future where passive viewing is replaced by active, seamless participation. To drive the core logic of our expanding product portfolio, we are now looking for a Game Design Developer.*

### **The Opportunity**


As a Game Design Developer at Avanti, you will have the unique opportunity to design and build the very heart of our interactive products. You will be responsible for developing the game servers that power our live experiences, ensuring that every round, interaction, and outcome is governed by robust, high-performance logic. This is a role where your technical decisions directly shape the mechanics and the fairness of the user experience.


You will join a high-growth scale-up where you are not just executing tasks but architecting systems. This role offers the chance to work with complex simulations and validation-heavy environments, where you will run millions of rounds to certify that our systems meet the highest standards of integrity. You will be a key player in a team that values innovation and technical depth, giving you the platform to influence game mechanics and betting logic for products that have never been seen before.


This is an opportunity to take full ownership of the server-side life cycle. You will move from conceptual design to technical implementation, ensuring our servers are secure, efficient, and capable of handling the demands of a global audience in real-time.

### **Main Responsibilities**

* Develop and maintain dedicated game servers for various live titles, ensuring unique logic for each game type.
* Build and execute large-scale simulations to validate game outcomes and ensure Return to Player (RTP) percentages are accurate.
* Design and implement core betting mechanics and game-round logic from the ground up.
* Secure the server architecture against external threats and ensure high levels of data validation and penetration resistance.
* Collaborate with the frontend and tech teams to ensure seamless communication between the game server and the Unreal Engine client.
* Create and manage tools for versioning and running simulations of millions of game rounds to meet certification requirements.

### **Who we are looking for**


We are looking for a developer who finds beauty in logic and thrives on technical precision. You are someone who understands that in a live environment, stability is just as important as creativity. You likely have a "nerdy" passion for complex systems and enjoy the challenge of building servers that are both highly secure and capable of processing massive amounts of data with zero margin for error.


Your mindset is proactive and detail-oriented; you don't just write code, you validate it through rigorous testing and simulation. You are a natural problem-solver who enjoys working in a fast-paced, iterative environment where you are expected to take initiative and own your domain. You are communicative, humble, and enjoy sharing technical insights with a team of like-minded specialists.

### **Qualifications**

* Proven experience in backend or server-side development, preferably within igaming or regulated industries.
* Strong proficiency in typescript.
* Experience of **WebSockets** and **Real-time protocols** and **implementation.**
* Experience with DDoS and validation.
* Experience in building simulation tools and performing large-scale data validation.
* Understanding of game mathematics, betting mechanics, and RTP calculations.
* Experience with server security, data integrity, and validation-heavy environments.
* Professional fluency in English.

### **It is a plus if you have**

* Experience from the iGaming industry or live casino development.
* Experience of multiplayer-systems
* Knowledge of certification processes for regulated gaming markets.
* Experience with cloud infrastructure and scalable server deployments.
* Experience or a background in statistics.

### **Who we are**


Avanti is an innovative technology company dedicated to creating the next generation of live interactive experiences. By combining technical excellence with creative height, we have established ourselves as a respected partner for global clients who demand world-class stability and immersion. We are currently in a strong growth phase, driven by an entrepreneurial spirit and a commitment to quality in every detail.

### **What we offer**

* A key role in a fast-growing company where your work defines the product core.
* The chance to work with cutting-edge real-time technology and AI-driven systems.
* A highly collaborative and prestige-less work environment.
* Opportunities for personal growth and technical specialization.
* Competitive compensation and benefits package.
* A central Stockholm office with a hybrid-flexible approach.

### **Location**


Stockholm (On-site).

### **Application**


Selection is ongoing. We look forward to receiving your application.


Read more about us at avanti.live

title: Senior Full-Stack .NET Developer
description:
Är du en passionerad .NET utvecklare som söker nya möjligheter? If är det ledande försäkringsbolaget i Norden. IT är en central del av vår verksamhet och vi arbetar intensivt med att vidareutveckla våra system för att möta våra kunder i den digitala världen. Våra stora strategiska projekt är baserade på .NET-plattformen. Användarupplevelse och kvalitet är viktiga drivkrafter för att våra kunder ska uppleva att ”If hjälper mycket”. Nu söker vi en passionerad .NET-utvecklare till vårt team i Stockholm.
 



  





**Om rollen** 




 Hos oss får du utveckla våra viktigaste IT-system där din kunskapsnivå och ditt intresse kommer att styra ansvarsområden och utvecklingsvägar. Du kommer att ingå i ett team som är en central del av vår nyutveckling och samtidigt arbetar med aktiv förvaltning av befintliga lösningar. Det är en Microsoftbaserad applikation med omkring 2500 användare i Sverige och Norge som bland annat hanterar våra kunder, produkter och försäkringsengagemang.
 



  





 Vi arbetar både med desktop-applikationer och webb. Tekniken är i huvudsak .NET/C#, SQL Server och en servicebaserad arkitektur (WebAPI och WCF). Annan teknik vi använder ASP.NET, Javascript/React och Cloud/Azure. Du har erfarenhet inom den senaste tekniken vilket gör dig till en nyckelspelare i teamet när vi kontinuerligt moderniserar systemen.
 



  





**Vi erbjuder** 



* En inkluderande arbetsmiljö där alla är välkomna
* Karriär- och utvecklingsmöjligheter i det största försäkringsbolaget i Norden
* Möjlighet till en hybrid arbetsplats
* Sociala aktiviteter
* Lunchförmån
* En hälsofrämjande arbetsplats som exempelvis erbjuder friskvårdsbidrag
* Rabatt på försäkringar tecknade hos If skadeförsäkringar
* Hög pensionsavsättning



  





**Om teamet** 




 Teamet består av 14 medlemmar. Det inkluderar roller såsom utvecklare, produktägare, scrum master, QA, arkitektur och support. Huvuddelen av utvecklarna har lång erfarenhet av både tekniken och domänen. Vi arbetar enligt agila principer och alla hjälper varandra att lyckas.
 



  





**Vem är du?** 




 Vi söker dig som är en ambitiös utvecklare med minst fem års erfarenhet av moderna lösningar inom .NET och har en akademisk utbildning inom IT. Du trivs med att arbeta i grupp och har erfarenhet av att arbeta enligt agila principer. Viktiga egenskaper är att du är positiv, drivande i ditt sätt att arbeta och vill dela med dig av din kunskap. Du är nyfiken, ser möjligheter och gillar att delta i och påverka förändring. Du kommunicerar obehindrat med kollegor på svenska och engelska.
 



  





**Mer information och rekryteringsprocessen** 




**Sista ansökningsdag:** 
 31 Mars 2026. För att ansöka vill vi att du bifogar ett CV och besvarar några frågor i vårt rekryteringssystem.
 



**Ort:** 
 Stockholm, Bergshamra
 



**Start:** 
 Enligt överenskommelse.
 



  





 Slutkandidater kommer genomgå en bakgrundskontroll innan en anställning kan bli aktuell.

title: Backend developer
description:
We are looking for senior backend engineers to join us and expand our team of talented backend developers. You share a passion for building systems that delivers high business value without sacrificing maintainability, availability, scalability and quality. You will work on the backend systems that power our casino platform and help us deliver the best customer experience.
   

  

**Job Description**
* Design, develop and help operate our systems
* Drive technical improvements throughout the stack
* Together with product teams deliver the best games and business solutions
* Help scale our solution to customer requirements and business opportunities


 Who you are
   

  

* You have 5+ years of experience working in a mixed Java, SQL, Javascript environment
* Master's degree in Computer Science or equivalent
* You are passionate about working in an environment of continuous learning
* You are curious, driven and not afraid to take charge and improve the system and add automation where needed
* Taking on technical challenges and solving them is something you take pride in
* You have experience from working on large Java systems and have a solid understanding of performance, scalability and availability challenges of distributed systems
* Quality, not only of the code you write, but the delivered system is important to you
* You thrive in an environment where you are responsible for your code and takes ownership of the change from editor to production system
* You know your way around a modern Unix/Linux system
* Experience with modern deployment, monitoring and logging solutions


 Who we are
   

  

 We are the best and fastest growing slot provider in the world with the operator and product in focus, and the mobile future on our minds. Nolimit is a team of experienced professionals from the gambling industry in Stockholm, Sweden, Malta and Gurugram, India. Our company has derived from hands on work at some of the most successful gambling software providers and operators over the last 15 years. Our mission is to offer a fast, reliable and flexible team that cooperates with the best operators in the world, taking gambling to the next level.
   

  

 We have a clean code high performance modern mini/micro service portable system platform for mobile and desktop that is 100 % under our own control. Since we have our own platform, this allows us to deliver special features and smooth, customizable marketing campaigns that are tailored to the operator's specific needs. We think it's time for a new angle to the gambling software industry – one where the product is in focus and we fully engage their promotion, marketing and country manager system/activities with our games. Nolimit work with customers on a global scale and the largest gambling operators in the world have our games everywhere.
   

  

 Nolimit City, Stockholm based development team. We provide you with your choice of OS and IDE.
   

  

 Send your application to hr@nolimitcity.com
   

  

 http://www.nolimitcity.com

title: Software Engineer
description:
**About Justera Group**
 Justera Group AB is a leading Swedish IT consulting firm with great experience specializing in building high-performing technology teams and delivering end-to-end IT solutions. Led by dynamic female executives, Justera Group focuses on helping businesses harness the power of digital technologies to continuously evolve in today’s rapidly changing economy. The company has deep expertise in IT consultancy, software development, and recruitment services, providing clients with purpose-driven, well-trained consultants who consistently deliver efficient and effective results. Justera Group manages the entire talent lifecycle, from hiring to ongoing management, ensuring the right fit for each project on time and within budget. With their strong commitment to quality, collaboration, and client success, Justera Group is a trusted partner for technology innovation across Sweden.
   

  

**About the Role:**
 We are looking for an experienced Backend Developer to support the development of backend systems related to post-purchase user journeys. The consultant will work closely with cross-functional teams to design, develop, and maintain scalable backend solutions that support customer-facing digital services. The role requires strong backend engineering expertise, experience with modern development practices, and the ability to work effectively in an Agile environment.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities:**
* Design, develop, and maintain backend services and APIs supporting post-purchase customer journeys.
* Develop scalable and reliable backend solutions using Kotlin and Java.
* Collaborate with product owners, developers, and other stakeholders within Agile teams.
* Implement and maintain automated tests to ensure system quality and reliability.
* Work with CI/CD pipelines to support efficient and continuous delivery.
* Contribute to cloud-native architecture and DevOps practices.
* Participate in troubleshooting, optimization, and continuous improvement of backend systems.


**Requirements:**
* Strong hands-on experience with Kotlin.
* Solid experience in Java backend development.
* Experience working with CI/CD tools (e.g., Jenkins, GitHub Actions, or similar).
* Experience with cloud-hosted environments, preferably Google Cloud Platform (GCP).
* Experience working in Agile development teams.
* Experience with GraphQL in Java-based environments.
* Strong knowledge of automated testing for backend systems.
* Familiarity with DevOps practices and modern development workflows.
* Understanding of cloud-native architecture.


**What We Offer:**
* A dynamic and innovative workplace, driving advancements in cutting-edge robotic technologies
* The opportunity to collaborate with talented cross-functional teams on meaningful and impactful projects
* Competitive compensation and a comprehensive benefits package
* A supportive culture that fosters continuous learning, growth, and professional development
* Flexible hybrid working model for an optimal work-life balance
* 25 days of annual leave to recharge and relax
* An annual wellness allowance of 3,500 SEK to support your health and wellbeing

title: Software Engineer - Billing Systems
description:
**Location**
 Our Software Engineer will be an integral part of our Business Systems Engineering team. This role is based remotely as a full-time employee in the UK, Ireland, Estonia, the Netherlands, Sweden and Israel. We are also open to contractors in Eastern Europe and Portugal.
   

  

**Who We Are**
 DoiT is a global technology company that works with cloud-driven organizations to leverage the cloud to drive business growth and innovation. We combine data, technology, and human expertise to ensure our customers operate in a well-architected and scalable state - from planning to production.
   

  

 Delivering DoiT Cloud Intelligence, the only solution that integrates advanced technology with human intelligence, we help our customers solve complex multicloud problems and drive efficiency.
   

  

 With decades of multicloud experience, we have specializations in Kubernetes, GenAI, CloudOps, and more. An award-winning strategic partner of AWS, Google Cloud, and Microsoft Azure, we work alongside more than 4,000 customers worldwide.
   

  

**The Opportunity**
 As a Software Engineer focusing on Billing Systems, you will be actively involved in the planning, design, and implementation of new features for our critical billing and invoicing systems. As a key contributor to the continuous development of these strategic platforms, you will be instrumental in scaling these systems to accommodate future growth.
   

  

 This role requires a keen interest in understanding Cloud Billing, engaging with stakeholders to identify challenges, and guiding the development of innovative solutions to streamline operations. You'll work closely with product managers, finance teams, and other developers across teams, participate in product decision-making, and have end-to-end ownership of projects. This is an opportunity to lead and shape the efficiency and accuracy of DoiT's core billing operations.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* **Leading feature implementation.** 
 From the proposal, through spec and implementation, to maintenance. You're expected to propose things that you think can be a good addition to the products and guide their execution.
* **Collaborating and problem-solving.** 
 Actively engage with business stakeholders (especially finance and operations) to understand their needs, identify inefficiencies in current billing and invoicing processes, and propose and lead the development of technical solutions.
* **Reviewing code.** 
 We believe in code reviews. And you will soon start reviewing pull requests as well! You will also mentor junior engineers on best practices for code quality and maintainability.
* **Improving the health of the codebase.** 
 We're mindful of accumulating technical debt. We dedicate one day per week to housekeeping, and you will guide efforts to improve code health.
* **Providing feedback and technical guidance.** 
 The team plans and discusses the upcoming work. We provide feedback to each other, trying to find challenges and unknowns as early as possible. You will provide technical leadership and mentorship to the team.


**Qualifications**
* 4+ years of software development experience.
* A Full Stack engineer or a Backend engineer with a desire to learn to become a Full Stack engineer.
* A solid understanding of programming languages, with 2+ years of hands-on experience in Go, and ideally knowledge of Python, React and Node.js. Experience with other languages is a strong plus, and you should be eager to learn and embrace new technologies.
* Proficiency in SQL.
* Experience developing solutions in the Cloud, and/or using Cloud services.
* Embraces continuous development and learning.
* Strong knowledge of software engineering practices, design patterns, and architectural principles.
* Demonstrated passion for creating high-quality web/SaaS apps.
* Experience with Git/GitHub.
* Excellent communication skills in English, both written and verbal, with the ability to articulate complex technical concepts to both technical and non-technical audiences.
* Self-organized, Goal-oriented, self-motivated individual who is confident, thorough and tenacious.
* Ability to effectively operate with flexibility in a fast-paced, constantly evolving team environment.
* Demonstrated ability to engage with non-technical stakeholders, understand their business challenges, and translate those into technical requirements and solutions.
* A strong interest in optimizing business processes and finding creative solutions to operational hurdles.
* Proven experience in leading technical projects from conception to deployment.
* A great sense of humor and enjoys having fun at work.


**Bonus Points**
* Experience with cloud billing for AWS, GCP and Azure
* Experience with Google BigQuery


**Are you a Do'er?**
 Be your truest self. Work on your terms. Make a difference.
   

  

 We are home to a global team of incredible talent who work remotely and have the flexibility to have a schedule that balances your work and home life. We embrace and support leveling up your skills professionally and personally.
   

  

 What does being a Do'er mean? We're all about being entrepreneurial, pursuing knowledge and having fun! Click here to learn more about our core values.
   

  

 Sounds too good to be true? Check out our Glassdoor Page.
   

  

 We thought so too, but we're here and happy we hit that 'apply' button.
   

  

* Unlimited Vacation
* Flexible Working Options
* Health Insurance
* Parental Leave
* Employee Stock Option Plan
* Home Office Allowance
* Professional Development Stipend
* Peer Recognition Program


**Many Do'ers, One Team**
 DoiT unites as
 *Many Do'ers, One Team* 
 , where diversity is more than a goal—it's our strength. We actively cultivate an inclusive, equitable workplace, recognizing that each unique perspective enhances our innovation. By celebrating differences, we create an environment where every individual feels valued, contributing to our collective success.

title: Front End Engineer, Console
description:
**Introducing evroc**
 At evroc, we are building a secure, sovereign, and sustainable hyperscale cloud to reimagine the digital future of Europe. By joining our company, you have an exciting opportunity to contribute to the development of next-generation cloud services. We are seeking intellectually curious and highly motivated team members who are ready to embrace the thrilling challenge of building the first European-owned hyperscale cloud.
   

  

**Location:** 
 London, Stockholm
   

  

**Job Type:** 
 Permanent Position
   

  

**Join the Pioneers**
 As an early member of the evroc Console team, you will play a critical role in shaping the user experience of our innovative cloud technology. Your contributions will not only focus on coding but will also influence the architecture of our applications and the overall engineering culture. This is an opportunity to work at the forefront of cloud technology and define how our users interact with our platform.
   

  

**What You’ll Tackle**
* Deliver Next Generation Cloud Computing Products: Design and implement responsive, intuitive, and efficient next-generation Cloud Developer Experiences.
* Collaborate Across Teams: Work closely with our backend engineers to ensure seamless integration of design and functionality.
* Optimise Performance: Create a scalable framework for building our UI which allows us to spend most of our engineering time on a small number of highly differentiated areas.
* Contribute to Code Quality: Participate in code reviews and contribute to the development of best practices to enhance code quality and maintainability.
* Implement Testing Strategies: Utilise testing frameworks like Playwright and Jest to ensure the reliability and stability of the codebase through rigorous testing practices.
* Stay Current with Technologies: Continuously explore and implement cutting-edge technologies, frameworks, and tools to enhance our development processes and improve user experience.
* Collaboration: Experience working with diverse teams and stakeholders, demonstrating the ability to communicate effectively and build relationships.
* Curiosity around AI: Interest in exploring how AI can enhance development and user experience.


 Experience with all of the technologies listed above is not necessary to apply. If your background is in front-end development and you possess some of the skills above, and you are passionate about building a better cloud, we'd love to hear from you.
   

  

 Why Join evroc? We offer a competitive salary and an equity package to attract the best talent. Come join us to help build the next generation cloud! At evroc, diversity is our strength. We champion an inclusive environment where every background - ethnicity, age, gender identity, beliefs, and culture - is celebrated. Applicants must possess a valid work permit.
   

  

**Skills We Value**
* Experience: Typically 5+ years of professional experience in front-end development.
* Proficiency in Modern Front-End Technologies: Strong skills in a modern JavaScript framework (bonus if you have familiarity with Svelte framework, but not necessary!); Knowledge of JavaScript (ES6+), TypeScript and NodeJS experience also desired.
* Cloud based computing experience: Experience in using the developer tooling of a cloud based computing platform such as AWS. Experience or knowledge of Kubernetes not necessary, but strongly valued.
* Responsive Design: Experience with responsive web design principles.
* Dedication to Quality: Dedication to Quality: Proficiency in testing frameworks such as Playwright and Jest to ensure high code quality and user experience.
* Version Control: Proficient in using Git for version control and collaboration on code repositories.
* Problem-Solving Skills: Strong analytical and problem-solving abilities, with a keen eye for detail in both functionality and design.
* Collaboration: Experience working with diverse teams and stakeholders, demonstrating the ability to communicate effectively and build relationships.
* Curiosity around AI: Interest in exploring how AI can enhance development and user experience.


 Experience with all of the technologies listed above is not necessary to apply. If your background is in front-end development and you possess some of the skills above, and you are passionate about building a better cloud, we'd love to hear from you.
   

  

 Why Join evroc? We offer a competitive salary and an equity package to attract the best talent. Come join us to help build the next generation cloud! At evroc, diversity is our strength. We champion an inclusive environment where every background - ethnicity, age, gender identity, beliefs, and culture - is celebrated. Applicants must possess a valid work permit.

title: Software Developer
description:
**Professional Galaxy** 
 är ett IT- och teknikkonsultbolag som tillhandahåller högspecialiserad kompetens inom IT, mjukvaruutveckling, SAP, inköp, elektronik och mekanisk konstruktion. Vi samarbetar med erfarna seniora experter och levererar strategiskt värdeskapande kompetens till några av Sveriges mest komplexa och analytiskt krävande projekt. Vårt fokus ligger alltid på hög kvalitet, professionalism och tydliga, mätbara resultat.
   

  

 Vi söker nu en
 **Software Developer** 
 hos vår kund.
   

  

**Beskrivning**
 Software Developer, nivå 4
   

  

 Utvecklare till ett av våra Scrum-team som tar fram mjukvara till våra system inom ESM (Electronic Support Measures) sökes. Det som efterfrågas är en erfaren programmerare med mångårig erfarenhet av framför allt C++, Python, CMake, testramverk, inbyggda system, mm.
   

  

 Personen ska ha lätt för att ta sig in i olika typer av kodbaser med både modern C++, och äldre C++. Viktigt att personen är en positiv lagspelare som är kommunikativ och gillar att utbilda och dela erfarenheter med mindre erfarna utvecklare. Uppdraget innefattar både nyutveckling, och felsökning/underhåll av mjukvaran till levererade produkter. Tidigare erfarenhet och förståelse från radar-/signalbehandling, och gärna uppdrag försvarsindustrin, är ett plus.
   

  

 Uppdraget innebär arbete på vårt kontor, med ingen eller mycket begränsad möjlighet att jobba hemifrån.
   

  

 Uppdraget kan omfattas av försvarssekretess, vilket innebär krav på svenskt medborgarskap och godkännande av säkerhetsprövning utförd av myndighet.
   

  

**Övrig information**
 Placeringsort: Stockholm
   

  

 Uppdragslängd: ca 12 mån
   

  

 Uppdragsform: Konsultuppdrag eller hyrköp
   

  

**Sista ansökningsdag:** 
 2026-03-19
   

  

 Är du rätt person för uppdraget, eller vill du rekommendera en stark kandidat? Tveka inte att kontakta oss.
   

  

 Ansök gärna redan idag, urval och intervjuer sker löpande
   

  

 Ansök genom att bifoga ditt CV (vi vill inte ha något personligt brev) och besvara urvalsfrågorna. Frågorna utgår från kravprofilen för den här rekryteringen och dina svar ligger till grund för det urval som sker i processen. Att besvara frågorna är en förutsättning för att din ansökan ska anses komplett.
   

  

 Vänligen notera att krav och eventuella meriter ska vara uppfyllda vid ansökningstillfället.

title: Fullstack Developer
description:
**Do you want to build B2C solutions that are used at scale – and actually matter to end users?**
 As a Fullstack Developer at GlobalConnect, you will be part of a team that owns the full B2C portal experience, from frontend to backend.
   

  

 If you enjoy variety, responsibility, and building solutions that are continuously evolving, this is a role where you can really make your mark. The role combines new development, integrations, and continuous improvement in a high-impact B2C environment. You will work across the entire value chain. Close collaboration with stakeholders, users, and business teams is a natural part of your day, and you combine technical insight with a strong sense of ownership. You will work in an agile setup, collaborating daily with other developers, product owners, and you take responsibility for both delivery and quality.
   

  

**Your Responsibilities**
* Develop and maintain B2C portals using modern frontend and backend technologies
* Work end-to-end with both frontend and backend development
* Build customer-specific portal solutions on top of a shared platform base
* Design and implement REST APIs and integrations with third-party systems
* Collaborate closely with business stakeholders and users to shape solutions
* Contribute actively in agile ceremonies and continuous delivery


**What You Need To Succeed**
* Strong experience in modern Spring Boot microservice development (Java, preferably Java 21)
* Solid experience designing and working with REST APIs
* Experience with Angular 20 for frontend development
* Experience working with Git and agile methodologies (Scrum)


 Beyond the technical skills, you are comfortable working in a stakeholder-heavy environment and enjoy being part of discussions that span both technology and business. Experience with designing and developing accessible digital solutions with a clear understanding of WCAG compliance is a plus, but not required.
   

  

**The team & collaboration**
 You will join a fullstack team with mixed seniority and strong collaboration. The team is distributed across several locations and works closely together using agile ways of working. Daily standups, close collaboration, and a strong sense of ownership are key parts of the team culture.
   

  

**Why join this role**
 This is a role for someone who wants to work broadly as a fullstack developer and take real ownership of complete solutions. You will be part of a long-term journey, continuously developing new functionality and delivering value at scale in a high-impact B2C context.
   

  

**About Us**
 GlobalConnect is one of the leading connectivity providers in Northern Europe. We’re 2000 passionate and talented individuals who want to make a difference, turning our customers’ visions into reality through connectivity. Our goal is to create the best possible conditions for engaged employees, a place where you can develop and grow, and create unforgettable memories and enjoyable experiences.
   

  

 We have helped develop and digitize societies across the Nordics for more than two decades. Our purpose is what drives us to continue - turning visions into reality by empowering society with connectivity.

title: Web3 - Frontend Software Engineer
description:
Are you a Frontend Software Engineer with a keen interest in everything Web3 and how this can be applied to iGaming? Then this is the role for you! We are looking for a Software Engineer to help us in the beginning of our journey to bring new and innovative iGaming products and brands to the market, leveraging the exciting possibilities provided by Web3 concepts and technologies.
 


**The Wow** 

 As a Frontend software engineer you will be part of a team working towards delivering innovative products and industry leading user experiences on a global scale. You will be responsible for ensuring the alignment of web design and user experience requirements.
 


**A taster of what you will be involved with** 
* Participate in sprint planning, task estimation, development testing, code reviews and deploying software
* Maintenance and improving of existing software
* Designing code, unit tests
* Managing SQL and NoSQL data models



  
 


 What we are looking for
 * 2+ years of experience working as a Frontend Engineer
* TypeScript and JavaScript
* At least one JavaScript Framework (Angular7+, AngularJS, React+Redux, or Vue.js)
* Experience with Native Web Components (Stencil.js)
* HTML, CSS, Sass or LESS
* RESTful APIs
* Unit and Integration Tests (Jasmine, Jest, Karma)
* JavaScript tooling (webpack, rollup.js)
* Scalable and performant web applications
* Agile product development



  
 


**What we offer** 

 Much like riding a rollercoaster, sometimes life at Betsson can be lightning fast with twists and turns but always FUN! Then again, what else would you expect from a business 75% millennial and 1700 strong, spread across 7 offices with 900 based out of our Malta HQ alone! We recognise it may not be for the faint-hearted, but if you’re a go-getter, initiator and adrenaline junkie, always striving to push the boundaries and challenge yourself, then you’ll fit right in.
 



  
 


 Challenge accepted?
 
***By submitting your application, you understand that your personal data will be processed as set out in our Privacy Policy***

title: Fullstack Developer
description:
**Expleo** 
 is seeking a highly skilled and experienced
 **Fullstack Developer** 
 to join our team in
 **Sweden** 
 (located in Gothenburg OR Stockholm).
   

  

 Our
 **ideal** 
 candidate has an always-on mindset with a strong background in designing, configuring, and managing solutions for devices, tools, and applications in a factory/corporate setting.
   

  

 If you are a full-stack engineer looking to expand your skill set, we'd love to hear from you. Join our team today and take the next step in your career!
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Understand and reflect on the customer needs to bring value to the organization.
* Take part in the development cycle using innovative technologies and frameworks.
* Secure qualitative, efficient and performance deliveries.
* Provide input for the design and construction of test cases and scenarios and help validate executed test results.

* Collaborate with suppliers, architects, engineers, developers, and internal stakeholders on upcoming and innovative technologies and standardization.

**Qualifications**
* Hold a bachelor’s degree in information technology, Computer Science or equivalent experience in a relevant field.
* Knowledge and experience in agile development practices, ITIL (incident, problem & change process), collaboration tools (such as Azure DevOps or similar)

* Eager to learn and grow (yourself and the company) using a modern approach to Software Engineering.

 Expleo is a rapidly growing consulting company dedicated to delivering innovative solutions in the fields of AI engineering, digitalization, hyper-automation, cybersecurity, and data science. With a strong commitment to integrity, diversity, sustainability, and societal security, Expleo is at the forefront of creating a better future. Join our dynamic team and be part of our journey to shape the future of technology and business.
   

  

**What do we offer?**
* Collaborative working environment – we stand shoulder to shoulder with our clients and our peers through good times and challenges
* We empower all passionate technology loving professionals by allowing them to expand their skills and take part in inspiring projects
* Expleo Academy - enables you to acquire and develop the right skills by delivering a suite of accredited training courses
* Always working as one team, our people are not afraid to think big and challenge the status quo

* Health benefits
* Expleo team activities


 "We are an equal opportunities employer and welcome applications from all suitably qualified persons regardless of their race, sex, disability, religion/belief, sexual orientation or age ”.

title: C++ Developer
description:
Technology is our how. And people are our why. For over two decades, we have been harnessing technology to drive meaningful change.
   

  

  

  

 By combining world-class engineering, industry expertise and a people-centric mindset, we consult and partner with leading brands from various industries to create dynamic platforms and intelligent digital experiences that drive innovation and transform businesses.
   

  

  

  

 From prototype to real-world impact - be part of a global shift by doing work that matters.

 We are seeking a talented C++ Developer to join our dynamic team in Stockholm, Sweden. In this role, you will be responsible for developing and maintaining high-performance C++ applications.

* Collaborate with cross-functional teams to improve software development lifecycle

 Discover some of the global benefits that empower our people to become the best version of themselves:

 :
   

 Career coaching, global career opportunities, non-linear career paths, internal development programmes for management and technical leadership;

 At Endava, we’re committed to creating an open, inclusive, and respectful environment where everyone feels safe, valued, and empowered to be their best. Hiring decisions are based on merit, skills, qualifications, and potential. If you need adjustments or support during the recruitment process, please let us know.

title: AI Software Developer (Junior level)
description:
*Join our AI team and help build the future of our product 🧑 💻* 




  





**About Hailey 🩷** 




 During the spring of 2020 Hailey HR was founded. We're a Swedish SaaS HR-tech company that want to digitalise, simplify and modernise the HR industry with our HR-system - join us on our journey!
 



  





**About the position 💼** 




 As an AI Software Developer at Hailey HR, you will be a part of our development team that includes frontend & backend developers - working in close collaborations with Quality Assurance Engineers, UX designers and Product owners to ensure continuous and accurate deliveries of high quality.
 



  





 Haileys platform manages large volumes of structured data and, with a growing customer base, we are in a unique position to create significant value through AI. We see strong opportunities to streamline processes and enable large-scale automation for HR, managers, and employees. As part of this journey, we are looking for analytically strong individuals to join our AI development team and help contribute building a range of AI-powered tools for our customers.
 



  





**What you will do:** 



* Architect and implement AI and LLM features in Hailey
* Ensure we utilize the latest and greatest LLM features, agentic tools etc
* Support our developers in implementing AI features in Hailey
* Develop evaluation tools and benchmarks for AI systems



  





**What are we looking for?** 



* Strong interest in programming
* A person with strong analytical abilities. Someone curious and eager to learn new technologies and AI models, proactive in taking initiative, and thrives in a collaborative team environment.
* Education: Newly graduated in a Master’s degree in Engineering Physics, Computer Science, or an equivalent field.
* Language: Full professional fluency in Swedish and strong English skills, both spoken and written.



  





**We believe you are:** 



* Flexible and thrives in an innovative and dynamic environment, where solutions are always open to discussion.
* Enjoy working in a team, pair programming, and see the value of code reviews because you work closely with your colleagues in the team.
* Loving table tennis! (or at least find it okay, it’s a part of our culture after all 🏓)



  





**More information:** 




**Process:** 
 We will have an ongoing selection and as part of the evaluation, you will be asked to submit your academic transcripts - please upload them directly with your application below. 👋
 



**Start:** 
 Whenever you’re ready!
 



**Scope:** 
 100%
 



**Location:** 
 Stockholm, Sweden (on-site)
 



  





 We’re looking forward to your application! 👋 💌

title: Software Engineer, iOS
description:
**Join us in building a world-class creative platform used by millions of people.** 




  





 Our product, SCRL, is a powerful photo and video editing platform loved by millions of creators worldwide.
 



  





 We're looking for a Software Engineer to join our iOS team and grow into the kind of engineer who can tackle the hardest problems in mobile.
 



  




 About the role
 
 SCRL isn't a typical app. It's a tool people use to create, which means the engineering challenges go far beyond standard iOS development: real-time image and video manipulation, complex multi-touch interactions, advanced layout systems, and performance-sensitive rendering.
 



  





 You'll be joining a team of experienced engineers who care deeply about their craft. You'll ship real features to millions of users, work on problems that stretch your abilities, and learn faster than you would almost anywhere else.
 



  




 What you will do
 **Build** 
* Develop features across SCRL's editing experience, from UI components to underlying logic.
* Work on gesture-driven interactions: touch handling, dragging, resizing, and snapping.
* Contribute to performance improvements where frame rates and responsiveness matter.
* Write clean, correct Swift that holds up as the product evolves.


**Learn & Grow** 
* Deepen your understanding of the iOS platform: UIKit, Core Animation, and frameworks like Core Image and AVFoundation.
* Build intuition for coordinate geometry, state management, and how complex editing features fit together.
* Get regular feedback through code reviews, pairing sessions, and direct collaboration with senior engineers.
* Take on increasingly complex problems as your skills and confidence grow.


**Collaborate** 
* Work closely with design to bring interactions, animations, and transitions to life.
* Participate in planning sessions and contribute ideas to how features are built.
* Share what you learn and help strengthen the team around you.


 You should have
 * Solid experience in iOS development and Swift.
* Experience building interactive, gesture-driven interfaces.
* Familiarity with UIKit and Core Animation.
* Curiosity about what happens beneath the surface of the frameworks you use.
* A desire to get significantly better at what you do.



  




 Strong signals
 * Experience working on consumer apps with a large user base.
* Interest in how tools and editors are built.
* A natural curiosity about what happens beneath the surface of the frameworks you use.
* Experience with animation, transitions, or motion in iOS apps.
* You've built something on your own time that you're proud of.



  




 What we offer
 * The chance to work on genuinely hard, interesting problems every day.
* A product that millions of people use to create, not just another feed or dashboard.
* A team that will push you to grow and give you the support to do it.
* Real ownership and visible impact from day one.
* Great colleagues and office in central Stockholm.
* Competitive compensation and opportunities for professional development.

title: Java Developer Product & Loyalty
description:
At Tele2, technology is the engine behind everything we do. In the role of a Java Developer, you’ll join a team that values quality, simplicity, and innovation, with the freedom to influence architecture and technical decisions. We believe in creating an environment where expertise thrives and ideas turn into impact.
   

  

**About The Job**
 We are looking for an experienced Java Developer to join our Loyalty & Product backend team within B2C IT Engineering. You will work on critical platforms such as Product Catalog, Loyalty Services, and Voucher Management, using modern microservice architecture. We combine technical excellence with business impact, ensuring that every line of code contributes to a better experience for our customers.
   

  

**What You Will Do**
* Develop and maintain high-performance backend services within the Loyalty & Product domain.
* Ensure stability, security, and maintainability through best practices in coding, testing, and monitoring.
* Collaborate across teams to translate business needs into robust, scalable solutions.
* Contribute to customer-facing features and internal tools, integrating with messaging and event-driven systems.


 We are proud of our agile culture and value people above everything else. We always try to question what we do and how we do things and focus on continuously experimenting with innovative ideas and technologies. Sounds interesting? Keep reading!
   

  

**Who You Are**
 You are pragmatic and dependable, with a passion for building software that matters. You value collaboration, continuous learning, and incremental improvements that drive real results.
   

  

* 5+ years of experience in backend development (Java, Spring Boot, SQL).
* Familiar with event-driven architecture (Kafka) and integration patterns (SOAP, REST APIs).
* Proven ability to handle complex business logic and enterprise-grade systems.
* Strong communication skills and a collaborative mindset.


 Pension and health care
   

  

 Hybrid and flexible work life balance
   

  

 Career opportunities
   

  

 Parental benefit
   

  

 Employee benefits and Tele2 discounts
   

  

 Inclusive workplace

title: ServiceNow Developer
description:
**Role: ServiceNow Developer** 




**Location: (Hybrid) Stockholm, Sweden** 




**Employment Type:** 
**Contract** 




  





**Basic Requirements:** 



* Relevant ServiceNow Experience. ServiceNow operations. 5+ years of hands-on experience in ServiceNow ITOM with specific focus on Discovery, Event Management and Service Mapping.
* Responsible for handling escalations, participates in escalation meetings and should be solution oriented in decision makings.
* Design, develop, and implement ServiceNow Service Mapping solutions for business-critical services.
* Identify business services and applications to be mapped using Service Mapping tools.
* Integrate discovery and mapping processes with the CMDB to ensure accuracy and completeness of service data.
* Work with stakeholders to understand service dependencies and document end-to-end service maps.
* Troubleshoot mapping errors and optimize patterns and probes for enhanced visibility.
* Collaborate with platform, infrastructure, and application teams to align Service Mapping with business needs.
* Customize and create new patterns, probes, and sensors as necessary.
* Ensure Service Mapping data supports Event Management, Incident, Change, and Problem Management processes.
* Provide expertise in ITOM best practices, including Discovery, CMDB Health, and CSDM alignment.
* Ability to communicate fluently with client stakeholders.
* CSA & CAD mandatory
* CIS – Discovery, Event Management is preferred.



  





**Preferred Skills:** 



* Deep understanding of ServiceNow Discovery, CMDB, MID Servers, and related integrations.
* Proficient in creating and customizing patterns, probes, and sensors.
* Experience working with CSDM (Common Service Data Model) and service taxonomy.
* Familiarity with network protocols (e.g., HTTP, SNMP, SSH, WMI) and infrastructure technologies (e.g., load balancers, databases, middleware).
* Knowledge of scripting (JavaScript, GlideScript) and regex.
* Experience in troubleshooting and resolving Service Mapping issues.
* ServiceNow Certified Implementation Specialist – ITOM / Discovery / Service Mapping.
* Familiarity with other ITOM modules: Event Management, Cloud Management, AIOps.
* Exposure to Agile methodologies and DevOps environments.
* Experience with enterprise tools like SolarWinds, AppDynamics, Dynatrace, or Splunk.

title: Backend Developer at Klart
description:
**Backend Developer (Go) – Build the backend behind Sweden’s leading weather service**
 At
 **Klart** 
 , we build weather products used by
 **hundreds of thousands of people every day** 
 . Our mission is simple: help people make better everyday decisions with accurate and accessible weather data.
   

  

 We’re a
 **small, product-focused engineering team** 
 with real ownership of what we build. As part of
 **Schibsted** 
 , our platform also powers weather experiences across brands like
 **Aftonbladet** 
 and
 **Svenska** 
**Dagbladet** 
 , reaching millions of users across the Nordics.
   

  

 We’re now looking for a
 **Backend Developer** 
 who wants to build scalable backend systems, work with real-world data, and help evolve the architecture of one of Sweden’s most popular weather services.
   

  

**What You'll Work On**
 You’ll be working across the core backend systems powering Klart’s products.
   

  

**Examples Of Things You Might Do**
* Design and build APIs and backend services used by web, mobile, and partner platforms
* Improve and evolve a cloud-native architecture on AWS
* Process and serve large volumes of weather and geospatial data
* Build systems that are fast, reliable, and scalable
* Take features from idea → prototype → production
* Improve observability, monitoring, and automated testing
* Work closely with product and other developers to solve technical challenges


 You’ll have real influence on technical decisions, architecture, and product direction.
   

  

**Tech stack**
 Our backend is primarily written in Go and runs on AWS using serverless and container-based infrastructure.
   

  

**Backend**
* Go (Golang)
* AWS (Lambda, ECS, DynamoDB, S3)
* Terraform
* Docker
* GitHub Actions
* Shell scripting


**Frontend / Apps**
* Node.js / React
* Kotlin (Android)
* Swift (iOS)


 We value clean architecture, maintainable code, and pragmatic engineering.
   

  

**What We're Looking For**
 You’ll likely enjoy this role if you:
   

  

* Have strong backend engineering experience (preferably at least 5-7 years)
* Have worked with distributed systems and cloud infrastructure
* Are comfortable building and maintaining production APIs
* Have experience with AWS or other cloud platforms
* Write clean, maintainable code and care about quality and performance
* Enjoy solving complex technical problems together with other engineers


 Experience with Go, Terraform, CI/CD pipelines, or containerization is a strong advantage.
   

  

**Nice To Have, But Not Required**
* Observability, monitoring, and automated testing
* GitHub Actions
* Geospatial data (GeoJSON, OpenStreetMap)
* Data processing pipelines
* JavaScript or Python


**Some things we've recently built**
 To give you a sense of what we work on:
   

  

* Integrated Pollenrapporten into the Klart platform
* Improved the logic behind weather day icons
* Built infrastructure for historical weather data from SMHI
* Added location-based discovery for ski resorts and beaches
* Rebuilt our search using AI-assisted suggestions and autocomplete
* Migrated our frontend from Nunjucks to modern React, dramatically improving performance
* Moved analytics to a shared Schibsted platform


**Why engineers enjoy working at Klart**
**Small team, real ownership**
 You’ll work in a compact team where engineers influence both product and architecture.
   

  

**Real users**
 Your work directly impacts millions of people across Swedish media platforms.
   

  

**Sustainable pace**
 Flexible hours, hybrid setup (2–3 days/week in our Stockholm office), and 30 days of paid leave.
   

  

**Engineering culture**
 Curious, collaborative, and pragmatic. We care about good solutions — not unnecessary complexity.
   

  

**Interested?**
 We review applications continuously, so feel free to apply anytime.
   

  

 Final candidates will undergo a background check in accordance with Schibsted policy.
   

  

 Questions about the role?
   

  

 Contact Frederick Hatakka
   

  

 frederick.hatakka@schibsted.com

title: Software Engineer - AI Developer Workflows
description:
**Description & Requirements**
 Electronic Arts creates next-level entertainment experiences that inspire players and fans around the world. Here, everyone is part of the story. Part of a community that connects across the globe. A place where creativity thrives, new perspectives are invited, and ideas matter. A team where everyone makes play happen.
   

  

**Frostbite** 
 is EA's proprietary game engine. Its versatile technology power creation on some of the world's most iconic and visually stunning games, including titles from EA Sports and Battlefield. Frostbite provides a unified platform that empowers developers to create hyper-realistic worlds, intricate gameplay, and lifelike animations with unmatched speed and quality.
   

  

**The Role**
 As
 **Software Engineer** 
 at Frostbite, reporting to a Manager of Engine Development, you will contribute to Frostbite's goals of transforming software engineering and quality processes with the power of generative AI, agents and context engineering. You will collaborate with other engineers and technical leaders, and you will roll out solutions to hundreds of engine and game developers, resulting in better games.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* You will develop AI-based foundations and services that allow the Frostbite community to benefit from agentic developer workflows.
* You will provide secure and scalable solutions for all stages of the software development lifecycle, including spec-driven coding, validation and releasing.
* You will pilot new AI capabilities to assess their impact on developer efficiency and quality.


**Qualifications**
* 4+ years of job experience in a hands-on coding role using languages like Python, C# or C++.
* 1+ years of experience using generative AI software engineering solutions such as GitHub CoPilot.
* Proficiency in good development practices (version control, code reviews) and validation (static code analysis, unit testing, CI/CD pipelines).


**Bonus but not mandatory**
* Experience with ML, GenAI and LLM concepts and technologies like knowledge graphs, vector databases, context engineering, MCP, LangChain, or RAG.
* Experience with observability of large data-driven services.
* Experience cloud infrastructure providers like Azure.
* Familiarity with game development processes.


 This is a hybrid remote/in-office role.
   

  

**About Electronic Arts**
 We’re proud to have an extensive portfolio of games and experiences, locations around the world, and opportunities across EA. We value adaptability, resilience, creativity, and curiosity. From leadership that brings out your potential, to creating space for learning and experimenting, we empower you to do great work and pursue opportunities for growth.
   

  

 We adopt a holistic approach to our benefits programs, emphasizing physical, emotional, financial, career, and community wellness to support a balanced life. Our packages are tailored to meet local needs and may include healthcare coverage, mental well-being support, retirement savings, paid time off, family leaves, complimentary games, and more. We nurture environments where our teams can always bring their best to what they do.
   

  

 Electronic Arts is an equal opportunity employer. All employment decisions are made without regard to race, color, national origin, ancestry, sex, gender, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, age, genetic information, religion, disability, medical condition, pregnancy, marital status, family status, veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by law. We will also consider employment qualified applicants with criminal records in accordance with applicable law. EA also makes workplace accommodations for qualified individuals with disabilities as required by applicable law.

title: Staff Software Engineer
description:
**Join us in building a world-class creative platform used by millions of people.** 




  





 SCRL is a creative design platform used by millions of people to make social media posts with complex layouts and advanced elements.
 



  





 We’re looking for a Staff Engineer to take on the hardest architectural and algorithmic challenges in our cross-platform codebase spanning iOS (Swift), Android (Kotlin) and Web (React).
 



  




 About the role
 
 This is a role for a deeply technical individual who enjoys the "how" as much as the "what." While our product engineers build features, you will focus on the systems that make those features possible.
 



 You’ll spend your time designing the core architecture, optimizing our rendering pipelines, and solving the complex mathematical problems that come with a high-end creative editor. You won't just write code; you’ll ensure the entire system remains fast, stable, and flexible as we grow.
 



  




 What you will work on
 * Core Architecture
 **:** 
 Design the foundational systems for SCRL, ensuring the codebase stays maintainable and modular.
* Algorithmic Challenges: Solve deep problems in coordinate geometry, complex state management, and advanced photo editing features.
* Performance & Rendering: Identify and fix bottlenecks in our rendering engine. You’ll deal with memory management, GPU efficiency, and making sure the app stays fluid even with huge assets.
* Technical Leadership:
 
 Help set the technical direction for the team. You’ll lead design docs for major changes and help other engineers level up through high-impact code reviews.
* System Design: Build the logic for complex features like undo/redo and real-time synchronization between clients on different platforms.



  




 What we’re looking for
 * Deep Systems Experience: You have spent years building complex software systems. You understand how small architectural choices impact performance and scale years down the line.
* Strong Mathematical Intuition: You are comfortable with linear algebra, geometry, and data structures. You enjoy the logic behind the UI.
* Clear Thinker: You can take a messy problem and break it down into a clean, predictable system.
* Collaborative: You enjoy discussing technical trade-offs and can explain complex ideas simply.
* Quality Obsessed: You believe in writing code that is correct, testable, and built to last.



  




 Strong signals
 * Experience building editors, game engines, or graphics-heavy applications.
* Deep knowledge of Metal, C++, or other low-level optimization.
* A background in computer graphics, physics, or competitive programming.
* Experience working on large-scale apps where performance is a top priority.



  




 What we offer
 * Challenging problems that require real engineering.
* A small, focused team that values technical excellence.
* Real ownership and the ability to shape the future of a product used by millions.
* Great colleagues and an office in central Stockholm.
* Competitive compensation and growth opportunities.

title: Senior Software Engineer (Golang) - Billing Systems
description:
**Location**
 Our Senior Software Engineer will be an integral part of our Business Systems Engineering team. This role is based remotely as a full-time employee in the UK, Ireland, Estonia, the Netherlands, Sweden and Israel. We are also open to contractors in Eastern Europe and Portugal.
   

  

**Who We Are**
 DoiT is a global technology company that works with cloud-driven organizations to leverage the cloud to drive business growth and innovation. We combine data, technology, and human expertise to ensure our customers operate in a well-architected and scalable state - from planning to production.
   

  

 Delivering DoiT Cloud Intelligence, the only solution that integrates advanced technology with human intelligence, we help our customers solve complex multicloud problems and drive efficiency.
   

  

 With decades of multicloud experience, we have specializations in Kubernetes, GenAI, CloudOps, and more. An award-winning strategic partner of AWS, Google Cloud, and Microsoft Azure, we work alongside more than 4,000 customers worldwide.
   

  

**The Opportunity**
 As a Senior Software Engineer focusing on
 **Billing Systems,** 
 you will be actively involved in the planning, design, and implementation of new features for our critical billing and invoicing systems. As a key contributor to the continuous development of these strategic platforms, you will be instrumental in scaling these systems to accommodate future growth.
