The goal isn’t only about enabling new ways of building software for human usage, but also creating software that will be used by AI agents.  

  

  



This position is for a high-agency, multidisciplinary engineer who thinks beyond linear workflows and established patterns. Someone who cares deeply about craft, but is equally motivated by experimentation, systems thinking, and inventing better ways of working. You will work closely with designers and engineers to explore how design, engineering, delivery, and AI should work together in practice inside a real enterprise environment.


You will establish principles, architecture and processes that enable the product organization to become AI-first through using the new design system. A core part of the role is shaping how AI generates templates, screens, and flows by learning from design system components, markdown, templates, and user flows within our enterprise landscape.  

  

  



You will:


* Own the technical foundation of an AI-first, scalable enterprise design system.
* Translate design into code and continuously improve the system.
* Experiment with and establish AI-assisted workflows for design and engineering, using tools such as Figma Make, Vercel AI SDK, Replit, and Cursor.
* Shape how design system assets are created, versioned, and used when AI is part of the workflow.
* Reduce manual handoffs and repetitive work through better system structure, tooling, automation and by using ready-made assets from e.g. Tailwind.
* Build and maintain reusable frontend components with attention to accessibility, interaction, and consistency.
* Design workflows across MCPs, Storybook, Vercel AI SDK, and module federation.
* Support other engineers by making the design system clear, reliable, and easy to adopt.
Document learnings, patterns, and guidelines.  
* 

  

Your profile

* Fundamentally excited about how AI can improve the way products are built.
* You’ve experimented with a bunch of AI tools in the past few years and have a desire to improve ways of working with the help of your learnings.
* Fluent in modern TypeScript, primarily React, GitHub synchronization, Tailwind, Storybook, and willing to dive into Figma MCP.
* Skilled at turning design intent into production-ready code and bringing static screens to life through interaction and motion.
* Experienced implementing design systems and translating Figma designs into production-ready code, adhering to accessibility-focused practices.
* Strong visual sensibility. You notice the difference when elements are off by a pixel or spacing is slightly off rhythm.
* Cares about typography, grids, responsive scales, and meaningful animation.
* Collaborative and detail-obsessed. You work well with designers and see code as a form of creative expression.
* Comfortable navigating ambiguity.
* You’ve shipped real products and you care deeply about the user's experience.
* Familiar with Figma Tokens, Tokens Studio, or similar tools.
.


Application  

Do you feel this description matches your profile? We warmly welcome your application and look forward to reading it. Please note that including a link to your portfolio is essential for your application to be considered.  

  

What you'll like about working here


We are shaping a new class of AI-first enterprise platforms and the design systems that support them. We believe in thoughtful craft, radical collaboration, and building with care. The person in this role will sit at the center of that, transforming design into something functional, elegant, and highly interactive.  

  

  



When you join Capgemini, you don’t just start a new job, you become something bigger.  

  

  



Capgemini’s purpose is to “unleash human energy through technology for an inclusive and sustainable future”. Established in 1967 and now headquartered in Paris, we have become one of the largest technology consulting firms providing services to government, the environment, retail, health, manufacturing and aerospace. We live by our brand values: honesty, boldness, trust, freedom, fun, modesty and team spirit.  

  

  



Group IT delivers a comprehensive portfolio of technology services to the entire Capgemini Group. We look after more than 340,000 employees in countries and continents across the world, around the clock. We work with a wide variety of business lines, each requiring specific IT solutions and support. With people from a diverse range of cultures, all collaborating to achieve a common set of goals.  

  

  



The global User Experience team’s mission is to make IT simple. We do this by focussing on the end-user with the aim of making their lives easier and more productive through outstanding UX and automation. We run monthly UX meetups for the whole company and host an annual conference.


About Capgemini


Capgemini is an AI-powered global business and technology transformation partner, delivering tangible business value. We imagine the future of organizations and make it real with AI, technology and people. With our strong heritage of nearly 60 years, we are a responsible and diverse group of 420,000 team members in more than 50 countries. We deliver end-to-end services and solutions with our deep industry expertise and strong partner ecosystem, leveraging our capabilities across strategy, technology, design, engineering and business operations. The Group reported 2024 global revenues of €22.1 billion.


Make it real | www.capgemini.com

title: Business Analyst / Kravanalytiker
description:
* Permanent
* Experienced Professionals
* Business Analysis
* ID 402546-en\_US

Job Description


Som Business Analyst på Sogeti Västerås & Eskilstuna blir du en nyckelspelare i att identifiera behov, analysera verksamhetsprocesser och driva förbättringar som gör verklig skillnad för våra kunder. Du hjälper verksamheter att lyckas med digitalisering genom att översätta mål och utmaningar till tydliga krav, smarta lösningar och konkreta förbättringsförslag.


Intresserad? Ansök i formuläret eller pinga oss direkt här: https://www.sogeti.se/ping-vasteras/

  

Om Sogeti Västerås & Eskilstuna


På Sogeti arbetar vi nära våra kunder i Mälardalen och levererar lösningar som skapar verklig effekt i deras verksamheter. Här är du en del av ett starkt och stöttande lokalt team, samtidigt som du har tillgång till ett nationellt och globalt nätverk av specialister inom digitalisering, verksamhetsutveckling, AI och teknisk innovation.


Vi tror på att utvecklas tillsammans och satsar stort på kompetensutveckling, community-engagemang och kunskapsdelning. Och inte minst: vi värdesätter en lokal och hållbar livsstil. Vi bor i eller kring Västerås och Eskilstuna, nära både kontor, kollegor och våra kunders verksamheter.




Din roll hos oss


I den här rollen kommer du att:

* Kartlägga och analysera verksamhetsprocesser, behov och utmaningar för att identifiera digitaliseringsmöjligheter.
* Ta fram krav, lösningsunderlag och förbättringsförslag som är tydliga, realistiska och värdeskapande.
* Faciliterar workshops, intervjuer och analysmöten som engagerar och skapar samsyn hos verksamhetsrepresentanter.
* Arbeta nära produktägare, utvecklingsteam och andra specialister för att säkerställa att lösningar möter användarnas behov.
* Stötta kunder i att införa nya arbetssätt, digitala verktyg och datadrivna beslut som förbättrar vardagen för medarbetare och kunder.
* Bidra till att utveckla vårt lokal‑ och nationellt erbjudande inom digitalisering och verksamhetsanalys.
* Vara en del av ett inkluderande, prestigelöst och omtänksamt team där du kan vara dig själv och växa genom nya utmaningar.




Hybridarbete


På Sogeti erbjuder vi ett flexibelt arbetssätt.Du arbetar främst från våra kontor, hos kund eller hemifrån beroende på uppdrag och behov. Vi tror på frihet under ansvar, samtidigt som vi värdesätter närvaro, samarbete och en lokal förankring i Mälardalen. Du bor, eller planerar att flytta, till Västerås/Eskilstuna med omnejd och kommunicerar obehindrat på svenska.




Om du blir erbjuden tjänsten


Sedvanliga bakgrundskontroller ingår i rekryteringsprocessen enligt vår standard.




Din bakgrund och erfarenhet


Vi söker dig som har:

* Erfarenhet av att arbeta som Business Analyst, verksamhetsutvecklare eller kravanalytiker.
* Förmåga att förstå verksamhetens mål, problem och drivkrafter — och översätta dem till konkreta krav, rekommendationer och lösningsförslag.
* Vana av att kartlägga processer, analysera data och leda workshops och dialoger med olika intressenter.
* Ett starkt engagemang för att förbättra verksamheter genom digitalisering, smarta lösningar och användarcentrerat tänk.
* Förmåga att arbeta strukturerat, kommunicera tydligt och skapa förtroende i komplexa uppdrag.
* En vilja att fortsätta utvecklas, gärna genom kurser, certifieringar och community-engagemang.

  

Meriterande:  

Erfarenhet av agila arbetssätt, förändringsledning, UX-orienterad analys, kravmetodik, eller arbete med datadrivna förbättringar.

title: Praktikplatser inom systemutveckling, olika inriktningar
description:
Länsstyrelsernas IT-avdelning är i en spännande utvecklingsfas där digitalisering, innovativa lösningar och säkerhets- och beredskapsfrågor är i fokus. Vår IT-miljö är omfattande och varierande. Den innefattar allt från modern infrastruktur till system som vi utvecklar själva. Framför allt kommer våra idéer hela samhället till nytta. Det ger en alldeles speciell känsla som är svår att slå.  

  

Länsstyrelsernas verksamhet har en stor bredd och verkar inom områden som är högst aktuella i dagens samhälle. Digitalisering är en stark drivkraft för länsstyrelserna där IT ofta har en nyckelroll i att realisera behoven.  

  

Länsstyrelsernas IT-avdelning är nationell och jobbar för samtliga 21 länsstyrelser i Sverige.

**Sök praktikplats hos oss på Länsstyrelsernas IT-avdelning!**


Länsstyrelsernas IT-avdelning växer för att möta länsstyrelsernas alla behov inom IT och digitalisering. Vill du bli en av oss? Hos oss får du lära dig nytt och utvecklas i din roll. Du får varierande arbetsuppgifter där du tillsammans med dina kompetenta kollegor gör skillnad för samhället!


Länsstyrelsernas IT-avdelning stöttar landets 21 länsstyrelser och cirka 7000 medarbetare med IT. Hos oss arbetar du med digitala lösningar för ett demokratiskt, hållbart och säkert samhälle. Du har utmanande och utvecklande uppdrag inom många olika teknikområden.

**Praktikbeskrivning**

Som praktikant hos Länsstyrelsen får du chansen att kliva rakt in i vår digitala utveckling – tillsammans med erfarna systemutvecklare, testare och specialister som gärna delar med sig av sin kunskap.


Du gör din praktik på något av våra kontor i Göteborg, Karlstad eller Kalmar, med möjlighet till hybridarbete. All utrustning står vi för. Från dag ett får du en personlig handledare som stöttar dig, utmanar dig och hjälper dig växa. Du blir en del av ett tvärfunktionellt team där vi jobbar smart, nära och tillsammans!


Vi erbjuder tre utvecklande spår – välj det som bäst matchar din utbildning och ambition.

**1. .NET-utveckling**


Du har kunskaper inom flera av följande områden:

* Praktisk erfarenhet av .NET-utveckling
* Databasmodellering och SQL
* Backendtekniker & API:er som REST och GraphQL
* Frontend med MVC, Blazor, JavaScript/TypeScript, HTML, CSS
* Ramverk som Vue, React, Angular eller jQuery


Har du dessutom varit i kontakt med äldre .NET-stack? Grymt – det är en klar fördel!

**2. Test & kvalitetssäkring**


Som praktikant inom test får du insyn i hela DevOps-flödet och möjlighet att testa brett och på riktigt. Det är extra positivt om du har erfarenhet eller intresse av:

* Last-, prestanda- och penetrationstester
* Säkerhetstester
* .NET-kunskap – bra för att förstå systemens tekniska struktur
* Testramverk som xUnit, Selenium, Playwright

**3. UX & Frontend**


För dig som vill skapa användarvänliga digitala upplevelser och snygga, moderna gränssnitt.


Vi ser gärna att du har:

* Erfarenhet av JavaScript och moderna SPA-ramverk
* Färdigheter i Figma (design, prototyper, användarflöden)
* Intresse för användarresor, tillgänglighet och interaktionsdesign

**Önskvärda kvalifikationer**


För att kunna göra praktik hos oss behöver följande vara uppfyllt:

* Du är inskriven som student vid svenskt universitet, högskola eller yrkeshögskola
* Praktiken ingår i din utbildning
* Du är försäkrad genom ditt lärosäte
* Praktiken omfattar minst åtta veckor, helst heltid, och som längst en termin


Välkommen in med din ansökan om du har förutsättningarna ovan uppfyllda!

**Bra att veta**


Antal platser: 2-3


Arbetsort: Göteborg, Karlstad eller Kalmar.


Lön utgår inte under praktikperioden.


Vi ställer höga krav på våra medarbetares säkerhetsmedvetenhet. Säkerhetsprövning enligt Säkerhetsskyddslagen (2018:585) kommer att genomföras innan vi fattar beslut om anställning eller praktikplats. Läs mer om säkerhetsprövning Personalsäkerhet – Säkerhetspolisen (sakerhetspolisen.se).


Ansökan ska innehålla:

* Svar på urvalsfrågorna om varför du är intresserad av Länsstyrelsen som myndighet och dina kopplingar till de olika inriktningarna, samt frågor kring din utbildning. Där ber vi dig också besvara vilket av uppdragen du är mest intresserad av och varför.
* Ditt CV med pågående studier.
* När och hur länge praktikperioden pågår.


Din ansökan blir en allmän handling när du söker tjänster hos oss. Därför är det viktigt att du med skyddade personuppgifter inte registrerar dig via vårt rekryteringssystem. Posta din ansökan till HR-enheten, Länsstyrelsen Västra Götaland, 403 40 Göteborg. Delge inte några känsliga uppgifter i din ansökan men ange någon form av kontaktuppgift så att vi kan kontakta dig om du är aktuell för tjänsten. Vid frågor, ta kontakt med rekryterande chef som står med i annonsen.


Anställningsform: säsongsarbete | Anställningens omfattning: heltid | Antal lediga befattningar: 3 | Sysselsättningsgrad: 100% Praktikperiod: 8 veckor upp till en termin. | Ort: Göteborg, Karlstad eller Kalmar | Län: Västra Götalands län | Land: Sweden | Referensnummer: 112-10541-2026 | Kontakt: Thomas Johansson, funktionschef 010-2244403, | Publicerat: 2026-03-12 | Sista ansökningsdag: 2026-04-05

title: IT-Arkitekt
description:
*Här får du arbeta med långsiktig produktutveckling tillsammans med kompetenta och seniora kollegor. Vi lägger stort fokus på din utveckling och du får en skräddarsydd utvecklingsplan som passar dig och dina personliga mål. Vi arbetar dessutom utifrån en hybrid arbetsmodell där det finns stort utrymme för flexibilitet. Välkommen till oss på CAB!*

**Om tjänsten**
---------------


Nu erbjuder vi en spännande roll som IT-Arkitekt för våra produkter som bidrar till ett mer effektivt flöde i vården. Tillsammans med dina kollegor verkar du i en miljö där stabilitet, prestanda och tillgänglighet står i fokus. Du bidrar till att säkerställa en stabil drift och utveckla en hållbar plattform som fungerar över tid.


Ditt huvudfokus kommer vara inriktat på databaser och datalagring, liksom containerbaserade miljöer och orkestrering med Kubernetes. Rollen kombinerar hands-on arbete inom plattform och drift med ett helhetsperspektiv på hur moderna SaaS-lösningar samverkar i en stabil och effektiv leveransmiljö.


En annan viktig del av uppdraget är att stötta utvecklingsteamen genom att skapa goda tekniska förutsättningar, ge vägledning i plattforms- och driftsfrågor samt bidra till kunskapsspridning som stärker den gemensamma kompetensen.


I dagsläget är vi mer än 100 medarbetare; utvecklare, arkitekter, testare och UX-designers - som arbetar inhouse i våra utvecklingsteam i Örebro, Göteborg och Oslo.


För att läsa mer om våra produkter inom hälsa, klicka här!

**När du utvecklas, utvecklas vi!**
-----------------------------------


Här blir du en del av ett företag med stark tillväxt. Vi förespråkar en lärandekultur som bygger på att vi ständigt lär av varandra och där kompetensutveckling ses som en framgångsfaktor. Detta gör att vi gärna tar till oss ny teknik och framgångsrika arbetsmetoder. Dessutom tror vi på en sund balans mellan jobb och fritid där det finns stort utrymme för flexibilitet.

**Vad får du som anställd på CAB?**
-----------------------------------

* Vi arbetar enligt en hybrid arbetsmodell och strävar efter att ge de bästa förutsättningarna för en bra balans mellan privat- och arbetsliv
* Fokus på din kompetensutveckling
* 6 veckors semester samt andra lediga dagar per år
* Maxat friskvårdsbidrag
* Förmånligt pensionsavtal

**Klicka här och läs mer om vårt förmånspaket och hur vi strävar efter att alltid vara en riktigt bra arbetsplats!**

**Är du den vi söker?**
-----------------------


Vi söker dig som har erfarenhet från driftfokuserat arbete där stabilitet, prestanda och tillgänglighet varit centralt. Vi tror också att du har djup förståelse för databaser och datalagring i kombination med ett praktiskt kunnande kring containerbaserade miljöer och orkestreringsplattformar.


Som person är du analytisk, säkerhetsmedveten och har en förmåga att se helheten i komplexa tekniska miljöer. Du kommunicerar tydligt och tar ansvar för att driva frågor framåt, från idé till leverans.


För att trivas i rollen tror vi att du tycker om att ta dig an ny teknik men även dela med dig och bidra till utvecklingen i teamet.

 **Låter det som något för dig? Tveka inte att söka redan idag!**

  

*På CAB vill vi ta tillvara de kvalitéer som mångfald tillför verksamheten. Därför arbetar vi med kompetensbaserad rekrytering för att säkerställa att alla kandidater bedöms på samma premisser och att vi alltid anställer de mest kvalificerade medarbetarna. Drivkraft, attityd, engagemang och ansvar är centrala delar i bedömningen- inte bara kunskap och tekniska färdigheter. Detta innebär att vi inte bara mäter vad kandidaten kan, utan även motivation och inställning. Med det sagt så välkomnar vi en bredd av sökande till våra tjänster- och ser fram emot att höra från dig!*

***Urval sker löpande men annonsen stänger 1/4.***


Har du frågor kring tjänsten är du välkommen att kontakta Julia Lindmark, tfn 070-615 84 06 eller julia.lindmark@cab.se.


I alla våra rekryteringar genomför vi bakgrundskontroll på slutkandidat.

title: Product UX Designer
description:
We now have a new requirement and are looking for a consultant colleague with the qualifications listed below. The position is part of our consulting business, which means you will be employed by us and work either with clients or on internal projects and assignments.
   

  

*As part of your application, you may be presented to clients/partners as part of the recruitment process. If selected for the assignment, you will be employed by us and work either with clients or on internal projects and assignments as part of our consulting business.*
**Your Profile (Must-have Requirements)**
* 5+ years of experience designing for digital platforms (web, apps, internal tools) in large scale environments.
* Experience designing for native iOS and Android applications.
* Strong interaction design and UI craft skills.
* Experience using both qualitative and quantitative research methods.
* Proven experience working with Design Systems and system thinking in design.
* Strong communication skills and the ability to bring clarity in ambiguous situations.
* A self directed mindset and experience leading design initiatives end to end.
* Proficiency in tools such as Figma, Miro, UserZoom and Jira.


**Application deadline:** 
 16-03-2026
   

  

**About Us**
 We currently employ experienced consultants in areas such as System Development, AI, Machine Learning, Testing, Cloud, Infra DevOps, and IT Project Management.
   

  

 Working at Deploja is something entirely different from working at an ordinary consulting company—and we are really proud of that. So, what makes us unique?
   

  

 We simply offer more than just a high salary and greater freedom; that’s just the beginning. With us, you’ll find the work environment and opportunities you deserve. Welcome to Deploja, where the grass is indeed greener!
   

  

**Vi erbjuder dig följande, Valet är ditt!**
 🚀 Exciting assignments with our many clients. We focus on long-term projects, which gives you the opportunity to create value for the client while also developing yourself.
   

  

 🌟 A secure monthly salary – together we’ll agree on a base salary depending on your assignments.
   

  

 🚗 Company car – we encourage you to choose an electric car for a more sustainable future.
   

  

 💼 Occupational pension and great opportunities for salary conversion.
   

  

 🌴 Vacation – Would you like more than 30 days of vacation, perhaps 60 days?
   

  

 🏥 Private health insurance, accident insurance, and life insurance for increased security.
   

  

 📚 Skills development – you set your own budget and choose the training you wish to attend.
   

  

 🕑 Quality of life – Are you struggling to balance everyday life and wish to work a little less while still earning as much, if not more?
   

  

*We handle applications continuously, and due to the high workload, it's especially important to include a short motivation for the position, explaining how you meet the requirements.*

title: UX Designer
description:
*Kreditz is transforming how businesses assess credit and risk using real-time data and NextGen Credit Scoring solutions.*
*As one of Europe’s fastest-growing FinTech scaleups - we’ve earned a place on the* 
***Sifted 100: Nordics & Benelux***
*list in both 2024 and 2025 and most recently, we were proud to receive a* 
***double win at the Credit Management & Compliance Awards 2025***
*, being named both "* 
***Fintech Rocket of the Year***
*" and "* 
***Breakthrough of the Year***
*".*
*With strong growth across the Nordics and Europe, our clients range from leading banks and iGaming giants to fast-moving digital innovators.*
**About The Position**
 We are looking for a
 **Senior UX Designer** 
 who can make complexity feel effortless.
   

  

 This is not a role for someone who only wants to “make things look pretty.” It’s a role for a strategic designer who thrives in high-stakes, data-heavy environments and who can turn sophisticated financial workflows into intuitive, world-class experiences.
   

  

**What Can Kreditz Offer**
* A once-in-a-lifetime growth journey, from startup to Global scaleup
* A journey where everyone in the team plays a crucial role for our company’s success
* Fun-loving, driven, and passionate colleagues who support each other’s success
* A culture that celebrates progress, humility, and teamwork
* We win together
* 24/7 access to gym, sauna and sports facilities at our office, plus additional wellness allowance
* Competitive base salary


**RESPONSIBILITES**
**You Will**
* Drive end-to-end user research to uncover deep behavioral patterns, maintaining a customer-centric mindset that bridges the gap between complex financial data and intuitive user experiences.
* Master the art of data-storytelling, translating quantitative findings into intuitive illustrations that make complex financial decisions feel like second nature.
* Translate complex technical and business requirements into clear problem definitions and seamless user journeys.
* Design high-velocity workflows where precision, clarity, and trust are non-negotiable.
* Create prototypes and iterate quickly in close collaboration with Product and Engineering.
* Facilitate workshops and design sprints with cross-functional teams to align stakeholders and accelerate delivery.
* Drive user-obsessed workflows and help establish UX as a scalable capability across multiple product domains.
* Support and evolve design patterns and system thinking across the platform.


 Success means users experience our platform as intuitive, confident, and effortless even when the underlying financial logic is complex.
   

  

**WE ARE LOOKING FOR**
 We believe that you are a strategic UX Designer with strong product instincts, high standards, and a deep interest in solving complex problems.
   

  

**You Likely**
* Have 5+ years of experience as a UX Designer, ideally within B2B SaaS and/or FinTech.
* Are comfortable working with financial data and using quantitative insights to validate decisions.
* Think in systems, not screens and care about scalability across products.
* Are strong in turning ambiguity into structure: clear problems, clear journeys, clear solutions.
* Collaborate naturally with developers and understand what it takes to implement design systems in real products.
* Communicate with clarity and presence — whether presenting to leadership or working hands-on with peers.
* Thrive in a fast-paced environment and can manage multiple initiatives without losing quality.


**Bonus Points If You Also Have**
* Strong qualitative research skills.
* Experience in high-transaction or high-risk product environments.
* Experience building or scaling design systems.


**WHY JOIN NOW?**
 At Kreditz, your work shapes how financial decisions are made across Europe. You’ll tackle real complexity, have real ownership, and help build a category-defining FinTech platform. With continued growth, and profitability on the horizon, strong investor backing, and a growing client base across Europe, we are entering our most exciting phase yet.
   

  

**APPOINTMENT OF ROLE**
 Q2 2026
   

  

**SCOPE**
 Full-time, permanent employment (tillsvidareanställning)
   

  

**SALARY**
 Competitive salary
   

  

**REPORTING**
 You will be reporting to the company’s CPO
   

  

**WORKPLACE**
 Danderyd, Stockholm
   

  

**RECRUITMENT PROCESS**
 Ongoing selection, we review candidates continuously.
   

  

*Last day for applications 31st March 2026*
**CRIMINAL RECORDS EXTRACT**
 As part of our recruitment process we will ask you to present a clean criminal records extract
   

  

**CONTACT**
 Lorenzo Puccio, VP Strategic Operations, Lorenzo@kreditz.com
   

  

 For more information about the role feel free to reach out to our CPO, Spilios Tzouras, spilios.tzouras@kreditz.com
   

  

 Intelligent credit- & risk decisions made easy with open banking & AI-technology

title: Visual Designer
description:
**Visual Designer** 




 We’re partnering with a
 **forward-thinking design agency based in Malmo with an office in Stockholm** 
 known for creating thoughtful, high-quality digital experiences for a wide range of clients—from fast-growing startups to well-established global brands. Their team blends strategy, design, and technology to build digital products and services that are both beautiful and meaningful.
 



  





 They’re now looking for a
 **Visual / Product Designer** 
 to join their growing team and help shape engaging digital experiences across web, product, and interface design.
 



  





 What you’ll bring
 


* A
 **degree in Design, Interaction Design, Digital Media, or a related creative field** 
 (or equivalent professional experience).
* **4–7 years of experience in visual or product/UI design** 
 , with a strong interest in creating engaging digital experiences — from websites and apps to internal tools and data-driven interfaces.
* A
 **strong portfolio showcasing modern digital design** 
 , demonstrating creativity, attention to detail, and a clear understanding of usability.
* The ability to
 **translate product requirements, user insights, and business goals into thoughtful design solutions** 
 .
* Strong
 **design thinking and communication skills** 
 , with the ability to explain your process and present your ideas clearly.
* Experience using
 **modern design tools such as Figma or Sketch** 
 and working in collaborative environments.
* Comfort working in
 **fast-moving teams alongside developers, product managers, and stakeholders** 
 .
* **Experience with design systems, prototyping, or motion/micro-interactions** 
 is a plus.
* **Fluency in English** 
 , with additional languages considered a bonus.



  





 Why join?
 



  





 You’ll be part of a
 **creative, collaborative environment** 
 where designers are encouraged to push ideas, experiment, and shape impactful digital experiences. The team values curiosity, craft, and collaboration, and offers the chance to work on
 **varied projects across industries with talented colleagues.** 




  





 If you’re passionate about
 **designing thoughtful digital experiences and working in a creative agency setting** 
 , we’d love to hear from you.

title: Interface Designer
description:
**Role: Interface Designer** 




**Required Technical Skill Set: SAP BTPIS/CPI, Biztalk, Azure & UC4** 




**Location of Requirement: Solna, Sweden** 




  





**Responsibility of / Expectations from the Role** 




 Work on tickets related to the BMC ITSM applications
 



 Support and maintain Helix ITSM suite. Identify and resolve issues arises in Helix ITSM application suite
 



 Upgrade and patch Helix ITSM suite
 



 Prepare effort estimation for new projects and change requests
 



 Integrate Helix ITSM applications with other third party software/tools
 



 Collaborate with the team to troubleshoot issues, suggest improvements
 



 Work with BMC support to get solution for product related issues
 



 Report the Status, Raise the Risk/Issue(s) and provide the feedback to the Project Manager.
 



  





**Must-Have:** 




 Interface Designer
 



 Analyse incoming requirements, match to Architecture Pattern, define strategy per IF
 



 Break down and document strategy per IF into technical spec. if needed support with functional spec.
 



 Request input from IF owner (e.g. mappings) for IF spec completeness
 



 Coordinate and monitor documentation contribution of technical delivery teams
 



 Deliverables / Artifacts May Be Responsible (ensuring documentation of the following & ensuring that it is pristine) For:
 



 • Interface Requirement Document (IRD)FS
 



 • Interface Design Document (IDD / TS) -->TS
 



 • Technical Interface Specification (TIS) TS
 



 • Mapping Specification Document FS, IF Designer sanity check of this.
 



 • Interface Monitoring Checklist & Error Handling / Monitoring Plan
 



  





 Architectural at the moment. Capabilities offered, IF Design to ask how to handle error handling. IF Designer needs to have a general understanding of this and how this works.
 



 • Interface Catalogue Maintenance-> Masterlist in excel, DevOps etc, Solman
 



  





 Technical knowledge: General understanding SAP capacities, e.g. SAP clean core (CDS) and SAP S4 capabilities. Understanding of middleware in general such as SAP BTPIS/CPI, Biztalk, Azure & UC4.
 



 Skills: Tidiness, Patience, being able to adapt to the project landscape where work is done.
 



 Communication skills: Ability to present design decisions and rationales to stakeholders and collaborate effectively within a team. It is important to pick up questions and clarify these with the relevant experts.
 



 Medior/senior, confident to discuss with stakeholders
 



 Technical project management

title: Service Designer
description:
We’re looking for a
 **Service Designer** 
 to join us at Telia.
   

  

 I’m
 **Angelika Gertell,** 
 Head of Customer Experience & Digital Concepts, and I’m currently searching for someone ready to grow with us. We’re a creative, forward-thinking team combining UX, service design, business processes and customer insights to design and implement frictionless, insight‑driven flows across all touchpoints to improve conversion, reduce effort, and ensure a consistent experience regardless of channel.
   

  

**What you’ll do:**
 You will drive transformation by applying human-centered design to understand customer experiences, identify key problems, and shape a clear vision for improvement. You will work across stakeholder initiatives while proactively identifying opportunities and mobilizing teams to deliver meaningful change.
   

  

* Develop and maintain the end‑to‑end Customer Journey vision.
* Lead and execute Service Design projects with structure and momentum.
* Create strong visualizations that foster alignment and enable decisions.
* Analyze customer data to generate insights and help shape customer journey improvements using market best practices and new concepts.
* Act as a key advocate for customer experience and Service Design, driving a customer-centric culture and embedding insights across the organization.


**What will help you thrive in this role:**
 The suitable candidate is proactive, solution-oriented and driven professional who believes customer experience can always be improved. You are a strategic thinker who can move between the big picture and details, combine digital and AI literacy with a human-centered approach, and confidently turn ideas into action.
   

  

* Formal education in design or a related field.
* 3+ years of hands-on service/UX design experience, preferably from a big, international organization.
* Experience working in an NPS-driven environment.
* Solid project management skills.
* Strong data analytics skills.
* Fluency in both Swedish and English language (written and spoken).
* Experience with tools such as Figma, Miro or similar.


**Join us to shape smarter living for people, businesses, and the planet**
 At Telia, we’re a team of 15 000 colleagues across the Nordics and Baltics, passionate about technology and connectivity. As a
 **Leading Telecommunications Operator** 
 &
 **Climate Leader** 
 , we drive change with large-scale, impactful projects while building a sustainable, inclusive world.
   

  

 Here, you can
 **grow your skills, lead meaningful projects, and thrive in a supportive, diverse environment.** 
 Whether you’re taking your first step or your next, Telia is a place to grow, belong, and make a real impact.
   

  

**What We Offer**
 When you join us, you'll receive a comprehensive benefits package tailored to your local market, opportunities for remote work, and more. You'll also have the chance to earn a bonus based on your performance and Telia's results.
   

  

**Ready to make better happen?**
 We look forward to receiving your application by
 **April 10th, 2026** 
 . Please note that we might close the position earlier if we find the right candidate, so don’t wait too long to apply!
   

  

 Background and reference checks will be part of the process.
   

  

 Want to know more about this role? Please reach out to
 **Angelika Gertell** 
 at angelika.gertell@teliacompany.com.
   

  

**Equal opportunities**
 At Telia, we recognize talent by
 **professional skills and growth potential.** 
 We champion diversity, ensuring every individual’s needs are met, regardless of disability, gender, age, nationality, sexual orientation, or social status. Together, we’re dedicated to fostering an inclusive work environment where
 **your uniqueness is our strength.**
**Join us and let’s make better happen - together!**

title: Staff Product Designer
description:
**About Us**
 Legora is on a mission: to redefine how legal work gets done. From the very start we have been very clear about the fact that we are not building a solution for lawyers, we are building it with them, because it is the only way to make sure it gets done the right way; working side-by-side every step of the way.
   

  

 Our AI-native workspace empowers legal professionals not just to work faster - but to ask better questions, unlock new insights. Every day, we push the boundaries of legal tech to make complex processes smarter, faster, and more human. From thousands of documents analysed in minutes to intelligent workflows designed in collaboration with leading practices, we’re turning possibility into reality.
   

  

 Today we are trusted by global firms like Cleary Gottlieb, Goodwin, Bird & Bird and Linklaters in over 40 countries, but we have no plans on stopping here. We ship fast, we iterate effectively, and we scale rapidly - not by accident, but by design.
   

  

 When you join Legora, you become part of a team that believes "good enough" isn’t good enough and that the way to win is together, by empowering lawyers to do their best work with technology that truly understands them. If you’re excited by building from first principles, working with exceptional people, and accelerating change in a high-stakes, high-impact domain—then this is the moment and the place.
   

  

**We’re not just shaping the future of legal tech — we’re defining it. Ready to join us in building the intelligent future of law?**
**The role**
 At Legora, we’re building the category-defining AI product for legal work. As a Staff Product Designer, you’ll operate at the highest level of our design org. You’ll shape how the entire product fits together, drive strategy for our most complex problem spaces, and set the standard for design quality across the company.
   

  

 You’ll partner directly with leadership in design, product, and engineering to define where we’re going, while still rolling up your sleeves to deliver best-in-class interaction and visual design. This is a role for a designer who thrives on solving hard problems and multiplying the impact of the whole team.
   

  

**What You Will Be Doing**
* Lead design across multiple product areas, ensuring coherence and clarity at the system level.
* Shape product strategy: frame the hardest problems, influence roadmaps, and push for bold but practical solutions.
* Set and evolve the quality bar for design craft, accessibility, and usability across Legora’s product.
* Partner with engineering and product leadership to make tradeoffs that preserve experience while shipping fast.
* Explore entirely new product directions, from zero-to-one ideas to scaled launches.


**Who You Are**
* Extensive product design experience with a track record of shipping complex, high-impact products.
* Exceptional craft in interaction and visual design, combined with the ability to connect details to strategy.
* Comfortable working in complex domains and navigating ambiguous problem spaces.
* Skilled at moving seamlessly between hands-on design and high-level product thinking.
* Strong communication skills: you inspire confidence across product, engineering, and leadership.


**Legora is an Equal Opportunity Employer**
 At Legora, we believe great teams are built on diversity of thought and experience. We’re proud to be an equal opportunity employer and committed to creating an inclusive, high-performance culture where everyone can do their best work. We welcome people of all backgrounds and don’t discriminate based on race, color, religion, national origin, gender, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, age, disability, veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by law.

title: SAP Interface Designer
description:
**Interface Designer** 



* Analyse incoming requirements, match to Architecture Pattern, define strategy per IF
* Break down and document strategy per IF into technical spec. if needed support with functional spec.
* Request input from IF owner (e.g. mappings) for IF spec completeness
* Coordinate and monitor documentation contribution of technical delivery teams
* Deliverables / Artifacts May Be Responsible (ensuring documentation of the following & ensuring that it is pristine) For
* Interface Requirement Document (IRD)FS
* Interface Design Document (IDD / TS) -->TS
* Technical Interface Specification (TIS) TS
* Mapping Specification Document FS, IF Designer sanity check of this.
* Interface Monitoring Checklist & Error Handling / Monitoring Plan
* Architectural at the moment. Capabilities offered, IF Design to ask how to handle error handling. IF Designer needs to have a general understanding of this and how this works.

title: Product Owner - Customer Experience & Frontend
description:
Northmill Bank is a challenger bank at the intersection of technology and finance, committed to revolutionizing the way people manage and protect their financial well-being. We are creating a different kind of banking experience,
 **digital yet personal** 
 .
   

  

 Northmill Bank was founded in 2006 and have grown to over 240 employees in 3 countries, 4 000 business clients and 600 000 end users. We use the latest technology to develop safe, smart, and user-friendly products for our customers. They are the sole reason why we do what we do. We are a 100% cloud-based product company where technology is the driver to create smarter banking products.
   

  

 Grab this opportunity to be a part of us and our journey!
   

  

**About The Role**
 We are now looking for a Product Owner – Customer Experience & Frontend who will play a key role in coordinating and prioritizing all frontend development work across the organization.
   

  

 This role sits at the intersection of product, engineering, and customer experience. You will ensure that initiatives impacting our customer-facing surfaces are prioritized coherently, delivered predictably, and aligned with both product roadmaps and our overall experience strategy.
   

  

 You will work closely with the Head of Customer Experience, Engineering Manager (Frontend), and multiple Product Managers to create transparency, coordination, and reliable delivery across frontend initiatives.Your role is to ensure that frontend capacity is allocated effectively and that initiatives move smoothly from concept to delivery.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
 You will maintain the consolidated roadmap for frontend work and ensure initiatives are prioritized in line with strategic goals.
   

  

* Maintain the consolidated roadmap for all frontend development
* Coordinate initiatives impacting frontend across Product, Growth, Marketing, Operations and other teams
* Align prioritization with Product Managers and Engineering leadership
* Ensure frontend capacity is allocated according to strategic priorities
* Maintain transparency around dependencies, trade-offs, and delivery timelines


**Qualifications**
 We believe you combine product thinking, delivery coordination, and strong stakeholder management.
   

  

* 4+ years of experience as a Product Manager in a digital-first environment
* Experience from fintech or other regulated digital products is a strong plus
* Strong understanding of frontend development, UX principles, and digital customer journeys
* Experience coordinating work across multiple product teams and stakeholders
* Comfortable prioritizing technical work and navigating trade-offs
* Structured and pragmatic in how you drive prioritization and delivery
* Data-driven and outcome-oriented with a focus on measurable impact
* Strong communicator who creates clarity across diverse teams


**What we offer**
* A fantastic office in a prime Stockholm location with great spaces and views
* An independent role with the opportunity to make a real impact
* Great opportunities for professional development
* Health - 5 000 kr health care allowance
* Conference abroad every other year
* Breakfast and fruits every day, as well as "holy fika” each Friday
* Regular after work and celebrated successes at the office


**Apply today and be a part of Northmill!**

title: Customer Support Specialist
description:
**About CheckProof** 
 At CheckProof, we are transforming the way inspections are carried out in the construction materials and heavy industry sectors with our innovative digital platform. Our solutions streamline maintenance, quality control, and reporting, helping businesses operate more efficiently, safely, and with greater transparency.
   

  

 As a pioneering SaaS company established a decade ago, we are now in an exciting scale-up phase. Headquartered in Stockholm, Sweden, CheckProof serves customers in over 45 countries and continues to expand globally with a strong focus on innovation and customer success.
   

  

 You will play an important role in ensuring our customers receive fast, professional support and have the knowledge they need to succeed with CheckProof.
   

  

**The Role** 
 As Customer Support, you will be responsible for helping customers solve problems, answer questions, and get the most out of the CheckProof platform.
   

  

 A central part of the role is managing incoming support requests from customers. You will troubleshoot issues, guide users through solutions, and ensure timely responses and clear communication. In addition, you will actively contribute to developing and improving our support processes, with the goal of continuously raising the quality of our support and delivering the best possible experience for our customers.
   

  

 At the same time, the role includes developing and maintaining CheckProof Academy, our learning platform and knowledge base. By creating tutorials, guides, and documentation, you will help customers learn how to use the product more effectively while reducing repetitive support questions.
   

  

 You will work closely with Customer Success, Product, QA, Engineering, and Sales to ensure customer feedback is captured and used to improve both the product and the customer experience.
   

  

 Your key responsibilities include:
   

  

**Customer Support**
* Managing incoming customer requests across chat, email, and phone
* Responding to customer questions about product usage
* Troubleshooting issues and guiding customers through solutions
* Managing support tickets from request to resolution
* Ensuring customers receive timely updates and follow-ups
* Escalating bugs and technical issues to QA and Engineering
* Collaborating with Customer Success Managers on customer cases
* Contributing to the continuous improvement and development of our customer support to deliver the best possible support experience for our customers


 Your goal is to ensure that customer issues are handled efficiently, professionally, and with clear communication.
   

  

**CheckProof Academy & Customer Enablement** 
 You will also be responsible for developing and maintaining CheckProof Academy and other learning resources that help customers succeed with the platform.
   

  

 Responsibilities include:
   

  

* Maintaining and improving the CheckProof Academy and knowledge base
* Creating tutorials, guides, and help documentation
* Updating learning materials when new product features are released
* Ensuring documentation reflects real customer needs and questions
* Supporting Customer Success with product knowledge materials


**Support Development & Product Feedback** 
 This role also contributes to improving how we support customers as the company grows.
   

  

 Responsibilities include:
   

  

* Identifying recurring customer questions and improvement opportunities
* Helping develop better support processes and workflows
* Providing structured feedback to Product and Engineering
* Highlighting usability issues or documentation gaps


**What We’re Looking For**
* Experience in SaaS customer support or customer success is a plus
* Experience working with support tools and ticketing systems
* Strong product understanding and technical curiosity
* Experience creating knowledge base articles or help documentation
* Strong written and verbal communication skills in both Swedish and English, as we work with customers around the world


 Nice to have:
   

  

* Experience working in a growing SaaS company
* Experience with customer education platforms or learning systems
* Experience collaborating with product and engineering teams
* Additional language skills beyond Swedish and English are considered a strong plus


**What We Offer**
**Innovative Culture** 
 Join a team that’s not just about work, but about making a difference. Creativity and innovation are part of our DNA.
   

  

**Growth Opportunities** 
 We’re scaling fast, and you will have the opportunity to shape how CheckProof supports customers globally.
   

  

**Flexible Work Environment** 
 Hybrid setup in Stockholm with a strong focus on work-life balance.
   

  

 If you are passionate about customer experience, enjoy solving problems, and want to help build world-class customer support in a fast-growing SaaS company, we’d love to hear from you.
   

  

 We are handling applications on an ongoing basis, so the position may be filled before the final application date.
   

  

**The recruitment process**
* Submit your resume for review
* Phone interview with our recruiter
* Digital interview with recruiting manager
* Complete personality and logic tests
* Interview at our office in Täby
* Final step: references and full assessment


 CheckProof is an equal opportunity employer. We celebrate diversity and are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees.

title: Motion Designer
description:
**About Us**
 Legora is on a mission: to redefine how legal work gets done. From the very start we have been very clear about the fact that we are not building a solution for lawyers, we are building it with them, because it is the only way to make sure it gets done the right way; working side-by-side every step of the way.
   

  

 Our AI-native workspace empowers legal professionals not just to work faster - but to ask better questions, unlock new insights. Every day, we push the boundaries of legal tech to make complex processes smarter, faster, and more human. From thousands of documents analysed in minutes to intelligent workflows designed in collaboration with leading practices, we’re turning possibility into reality.
   

  

 Today we are trusted by global firms like Cleary Gottlieb, Goodwin, Bird & Bird and Linklaters in over 40 countries, but we have no plans on stopping here. We ship fast, we iterate effectively, and we scale rapidly - not by accident, but by design.
   

  

 When you join Legora, you become part of a team that believes "good enough" isn’t good enough and that the way to win is together, by empowering lawyers to do their best work with technology that truly understands them. If you’re excited by building from first principles, working with exceptional people, and accelerating change in a high-stakes, high-impact domain—then this is the moment and the place.
   

  

**We’re not just shaping the future of legal tech — we’re defining it. Ready to join us in building the intelligent future of law?**
 As a Motion Designer on the Design team, you will bring the Legora brand to life through motion, animation, and storytelling. You’ll craft motion systems that scale across channels, product marketing, social, campaigns, ads, and events, and help define how we use movement to communicate clearly and feel alive. You’ll work closely with Marketing to concept, build, and ship compelling creative work that captures attention and elevates our brand in a B2B context.
   

  

 We’re looking for a motion designer with strong execution skills and a sharp design eye, someone who sees motion as a tool for clarity, emotion, and momentum.
   

  

**What You Will Be Doing**
* Design and animate motion assets for product launches, campaigns, social, explainers, and ads
* Build a scalable motion system and toolkit to ensure quality and consistency at speed
* Support major product launches with high-quality motion
* Collaborate with Marketing and other designers to explore and ship motion-driven work


**Who You Are**
* A motion-first designer with a strong foundation in visual design and storytelling
* Portfolio that showcases high-quality motion work across brand, product, and marketing
* Expert in tools like After Effects, Premiere, Illustrator, Jitter, and Figma
* Comfortable working fast and iterating based on feedback
* Experience designing for B2B or tech companies
* Early adopter of AI tools to accelerate creative workflows


**What’s In It For You**
* Career development opportunities in a rapidly evolving entrepreneurial environment
* A collaborative, high-energy team environment where your ideas and contributions are valued and implemented
* Competitive salary complemented with a transparent and highly competitive options program
* Centrally located offices in Stockholm, designed as a space for you to do your life’s work


**Legora is an Equal Opportunity Employer**
 At Legora, we believe great teams are built on diversity of thought and experience. We’re proud to be an equal opportunity employer and committed to creating an inclusive, high-performance culture where everyone can do their best work. We welcome people of all backgrounds and don’t discriminate based on race, color, religion, national origin, gender, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, age, disability, veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by law.

title: Kris- och beredskapsspecialist till Human Factors på Vattenfall Power Solutions
description:
**Vill du arbeta med krisberedskap och samtidigt bidra till fossilfrihet? Då borde vi prata.**
 Vi söker nu en
 **Kris- och beredskapsspecialist** 
 till någon av våra två enheter inom Human Factors på Vattenfall Power Solutions. Enheterna består idag av ca 20 medarbetare som arbetar uppdragsbaserat mot ett flertal samverkanspartners inom Vattenfall-koncernen.
   

  

 I rollen som kris- och beredskapsspecialist hos oss utgör du ett stöd i olika projekt som syftar till att stärka förmågan att hantera, utveckla och följa upp kris- och beredskapsverksamheten.
   

  

**I Rollen Kommer Du Bland Annat Att**
* Stötta organisationen och dess samverkanspartners i utveckling av krisberedskapen och bidra till robusta kris- och beredskapsorganisationer.
* Planera, genomföra och utvärdera övningar, workshops och utbildningsinsatser inom kris- och beredskapsområdet.
* Vid behov utveckla, vidareutveckla och kvalitetssäkra dokumentation relaterat till kris och beredskap.
* Arbeta nära både interna och externa intressenter och agera rådgivare inom krishantering.
* Utgöra enhetens expert inom området


 Enheterna har ett brett uppdrag och du kan även komma att stötta verksamheten i frågor kopplade till säkerhetskritiska processer och bidra med analyser inom Human Factors (MTO), utredningar och anläggningsändringar.
   

  

**Vi vet att våra anställda är nyckeln till vår framgång** 
 . För oss är din utveckling viktig och därför kommer vi alltid att uppmuntra dig till att använda dina kunskaper och ge dig möjligheter till att utvecklas genom nya utmaningar, utbildningar och kompetensöverföring. Hos oss får du förtroendet att agera med stor frihet och eget ansvar, vilket tillsammans med bra arbetsvillkor och ömsesidigt förtroende ger en hög flexibilitet och balans mellan arbete och privatliv.
   

  

 Kvalifikationer
   

  

 För att lyckas i rollen ser vi att du har:
   

  

* Flera års erfarenhet av arbete inom kris- och beredskapsområdet, gärna kris- och beredskapsledare.
* Erfarenhet av att planera, genomföra och utvärdera övningar, workshops eller liknande aktiviteter.
* Erfarenhet av beredskapsplanering.
* Bakgrund från säkerhetskritisk verksamhet i större, komplexa organisationer inom privat sektor.
* Mycket goda kunskaper i svenska och engelska, både i tal och skrift.
* B-körkort.


**Det Är Även Meriterande Om Du Har**
* Erfarenhet eller utbildning inom Human Factors (MTO), exempelvis kopplat till anläggningsändringar, utredningar eller utbildning.
* Kompetens inom HSE.
* Erfarenhet av olycksutredningar eller annan kvalificerad analysverksamhet.


 I rollen behöver du vara en kommunikativ person som trivs med att utbilda och leda grupper. Du anpassar dig lätt till olika situationer och målgrupper och visar ett tydligt driv, nyfikenhet och vilja att bidra till utveckling. Du uppskattar en vardag med många kontaktytor och samarbetspartners, både internt och externt, och arbetar tryggt även när förutsättningarna förändras. Du har förmåga att prioritera i komplexa situationer och behåller lugnet när andra runt dig söker riktning och stöd.
   

  

 Ytterligare information
   

  

 Förutom att du får vara med och forma framtidens smarta energisamhälle erbjuder vi dig ett utvecklande och omväxlande arbete med många kontaktytor. För oss på Vattenfall är det viktigt att arbete och privatliv har en god balans, därför erbjuder vi flexibilitet i arbetet samt möjlighet till att arbeta hemifrån vid behov. Vi har även en hel del andra personalförmåner som exempelvis arbetstidsförkortning, förmånliga tjänstepensionsavtal, föräldraledighetstillägg med mera. Läs mer om våra förmåner här.
   

  

**Placeringsort** 
 är Solna, Västerås eller Göteborg. Resor ingår som en naturlig del av tjänsten men vi arbetar aktivt med tekniska hjälpmedel för att minska dessa,
   

  

 För ytterligare
 **information om tjänsten** 
 är du välkommen att kontakta rekryterande chef Diana Knutsson, diana.knutsson@vattenfall.com. För frågor om
 **rekryteringsprocessen** 
 , vänligen kontakta rekryterare Åsa Vallin, 070 277 12 46.
   

  

**Fackliga representanter** 
 för denna tjänst är Gustaf Treiber (Akademikerna), Jan Stigbert (Unionen), Philip Carendi (Ledarna), Ingemar Eriksson (SEKO). Alla kontaktpersoner nås via Vattenfalls växel 08-739 50 00.
   

  

**Välkommen med din ansökan senast den 6 april 2026.** 
 Vi tar inte emot personligt brev i ansökan. Du söker snabbt och enkelt genom att svara på urvalsfrågor och bifoga ditt CV. Vi tar endast emot ansökningar via vår webbplats.
   

  

 I den här rekryteringsprocessen kan tester förekomma.
   

  

 På Vattenfall värdesätter vi att vara aktiva, positiva, öppna och säkerhetsmedvetna. Vi söker medarbetare som delar vår vision och kan bidra till att stärka vår företagskultur. Vi är övertygade om att mångfald bidrar till att bygga ett mer lönsamt och tilltalande företag och strävar efter att vara goda förebilder när det gäller mångfald. Vattenfall arbetar aktivt för att alla medarbetare ska ha samma möjligheter och rättigheter oavsett ålder, etnisk eller kulturell bakgrund, könstillhörighet, religion/tro, sexuell läggning eller funktionsvariation. Läs mer om hur vi arbetar med mångfald och inkludering här.
   

  

 Vattenfall är en del av Sveriges kritiska infrastruktur och vår verksamhet omfattas bland annat av regler om säkerhetsskydd, nukleär icke-spridning och exportkontroll. På grund av dessa regler genomförs en kontroll av kandidaten för många av tjänsterna i vår verksamhet innan anställning sker. För de tjänster som leder till deltagande i säkerhetskänslig verksamhet eller placering i säkerhetsklass innebär denna kontroll att säkerhetsprövning genomförs i enlighet med säkerhetsskyddslagen. Förutom säkerhetsprövning genomförs även drogtest. Du kan komma att bli krigsplacerad. Eventuell krigsplacering sker med stöd i anställningsavtalet och lagen om totalförsvarsplikt.
   

  

 Företagsbeskrivning
   

  

 Business Unit (BU) Vattenfall Power Solutions är en affärsenhet på ca 700 personer inom Business Area (BA) Vattenfall Generation som utbildar personal inom svensk kärnkraft, levererar kärnbränsle till Vattenfalls kärnkraftverk, utvecklar och genomför projekt och uppdrag samt tillhandahåller interna tekniska specialisttjänster för samtliga utav Vattenfalls verksamheter, koncernstaber och intressenter. Detta innebär verksamhet i form av bl. a. framtagning och tillhandahållande av utbildningar, projektledning och projektstöd, analysledning och utredning, produktframtagning, kärntekniska säkerhets- och dammsäkerhetsuppdrag. Fokus inom affärsenheten Vattenfall Power Solutions är att utveckla vår förmåga inom projektledning samt valda tekniska nyckeldiscipliner. Vi arbetar aktivt med ständiga förbättringsinitiativ och utveckling av våra modeller, där vårt arbete och kompetens skapar stora värden för Vattenfall och dess satsningar.

title: Electronics Design Engineer – MedTech
description:
Join Sii Sweden as an Electronics Design Engineer and contribute to the development of a cutting-edge medical device platform used in critical care. You will work within a cross-functional R&D team responsible for a modular system enabling the development, design, and production of user interface screens for medical devices.
 



 In this project, you will focus on replacing electronic components on existing PCBs, qualifying new components, and ensuring that they meet safety, quality, and regulatory requirements. The work includes evaluation, testing, analysis, documentation, and design modification within defined timelines.
 



 This role is ideal for a proactive and structured engineer who thrives in a regulated environment, enjoys hands-on design and problem-solving, and wants to make a real impact on products that support patient care worldwide.
 



 Sii ensures that all employment-related decisions are made solely on the basis of qualifications and competencies. We are committed to equal treatment of all individuals, regardless of any protected characteristics, and promoting a diverse and inclusive work environment.
 



  





**Your tasks** 



* Performing electronic design changes and component replacements on existing PCBs
* Creating and updating schematics and selecting suitable components
* Ensuring compliance with medical device requirements and safety standards
* Conducting tests, measurements, and validation of new components
* Supporting EMC activities and ensuring adherence to relevant regulations
* Participating in hardware risk analysis and documentation work
* Maintaining accurate technical documentation throughout the design lifecycle
* Collaborate with cross-functional engineering teams



  





**Requirements** 



* At least 5 years of experience in electronic circuit and PCB design
* Proficiency with schematic capture and hardware CAD tools (as Altium, Xpedition)
* Strong understanding of embedded hardware architectures, microcontrollers, memory interfaces, and peripheral components
* Experience with testing, debugging, and validating electronic hardware
* Knowledge of medical device standards, regulatory requirements, and safety-critical design principles is a huge plus
* Ability to interpret datasheets, design specifications, and electrical constraints
* Fluent in Swedish and English

title: SuccessFactors Integration Specialist to Sweco IT
description:
*Sweco plans and designs the sustainable societies for tomorrow. As we continue to strengthen our digital HR landscape, we are looking for a skilled SuccessFactors integration specialist, who will play a key role in ensuring that our HR ecosystem is seamless, scalable and future proof.*
**About The Role**
 As an IT SuccessFactors Integration Specialist, you will be pivotal in supporting, maintaining and developing our global HR system SuccessFactors inbound and outbound integrations. Your primary responsibilities will include daily support and operations, developing and improving our SuccessFactors integrations and providing solutions to ensure seamless application performance.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Respond to Super-User Queries Troubleshoot and resolve tickets and change requests submitted by key users.
* Diagnose and Resolve Issues Analyze and resolve issues related to application functionality, user access, and data retrieval.
* Collaborate with Solution application specialists Partner with our SuccessFactors application specialists to identify, report, and fix incidents, as well as developing and implementing enhancements.
* Application Monitoring Continuously monitor the performance of applications using various tools to ensure optimal functioning.
* Documentation Management Create, update, and maintain comprehensive documentation for applications, including user guides, FAQs, and troubleshooting tips.
* System Updates and Upgrades Assist in rolling out application updates, patches, and upgrades, ensuring minimal disruption for users.
* Compliance and Security Ensure applications adhere to IT security policies, procedures, and compliance standards.
* Feedback Loop Gather user feedback to identify recurring issues and areas for improvement and communicate findings to the IT and development teams.
* Proactive Problem-Solving Anticipate potential application issues and implement preventative measures.


**About You**
 To excel in this role, you should be solution-oriented, proactive, quick learner, possess a curious mindset, and enjoy helping colleagues with technical challenges. You enjoy working collaboratively within the team. Key aspects of your daily work will focus on continuously improving the system's delivered solution. This involves regular communication with key users to understand their needs and enhance collaboration with frequent system users. Working closely with system leads, you will develop the solution, offering an excellent opportunity for growth and learning.
   

  

* You have a 2-3 years’ experience working with SuccessFactors integrations (Have basic knowledge of how message transformation & transmission happens between the two systems).
* Strong hands on / user experience on Employee Central module.
* A structured, proactive, and collaborative approach to work
* Fluent in English; Swedish is a plus


**Why join Sweco?**
* A pleasant and dynamic working atmosphere in a growing and leading company.
* A purpose-driven company where your work contributes to meaningful societal impact
* A culture that values inclusion, innovation, and continuous learning
* Flexibility, development opportunities, and a work culture built on trust and autonomy


 Can you see yourself as a part of Sweco?
   

  

 Then don’t hesitate to send us your application and CV via the link below. We will review applications ongoing, so make sure you apply as soon as possible.
   

  

 We do not accept applications via email, however if you have any questions regarding the role or the recruitment process, don’t hesitate to contact us. We will get back to all applicants after the recruitment process has been completed.
   

  

 Do you want to be part of shaping the future? Then we look forward to receiving your application!
   

  

**Contact Us**
 If you want to know more about the position or Sweco as a workplace, please contact Head of HR Applications, Cecilia Torbiörnsson at Cecilia.torbiornsson@sweco.se
   

  

 Background checks will be carried out on the final candidate as part of this recruitment process.
   

  

*Sweco plans and designs the sustainable communities and cities of the future. Together with our customers, our 23,000 architects, engineers and other experts develop solutions to manage urbanization, take advantage of the opportunities of digitalization and make the societies of the future more sustainable. Sweco is the leading consulting company in technology and architecture in Europe with a turnover of approximately SEK 29 billion. The company is listed on Nasdaq Stockholm. For further information,* 
*http //www.sweco.se*

title: Senior Full Stack Developer - VC backed Scale Up
description:
We’re looking for a Senior Full Stack Engineer to take ownership of core product areas and play a key role in shaping the technical direction of a modern, cloud‑native platform. This role offers a high level of autonomy, responsibility, and the opportunity to influence both architecture and long‑term product strategy. The position is hybrid, and you must be comfortable commuting into the Stockholm office 2 to 3 days per week.
 



  





**What You’ll Do** 




 • Lead the end‑to‑end development of new product features across both frontend and backend
 



 • Contribute to architectural decisions, technical standards, and best practices
 



 • Build scalable, reliable, well‑tested services
 



 • Work closely with product, design, and engineering leadership
 



 • Drive performance improvements, system reliability, and technical quality
 



 • Support both greenfield projects and broader platform enhancements
 



 • Help evolve a cloud‑native, microservice‑driven environment
 



  





**What You Bring** 




 • 6+ years working across modern JavaScript and TypeScript environments
 



 • Strong hands‑on experience with React on the frontend
 



 • Extensive backend experience with Node.js (Express, NestJS or similar)
 



 • Good understanding of AWS or similar cloud platforms
 



 • Experience with CI/CD, Docker, and modern DevOps workflows
 



 • Ability to take ownership, work independently, and deliver high‑quality solutions
 



 • A product‑focused mindset with an interest in improving user experience
 



 • Comfortable commuting to the Stockholm office 2 to 3 days per week
 



 • Strong engineers outside the 6+ year range are encouraged to apply
 



  





**Nice to Have** 




 • Experience with microservices or distributed systems
 



 • Knowledge of PostgreSQL or other relational databases
 



 • Familiarity with system performance, observability, or event‑driven architecture
 



  





 Please feel free to apply directly and/or reach out to me on the below:
 



 ✉ Email: w.stanton@tenthrevolution.com
 



 ☎ Contact number: +46 77 588 86 06

title: Systemarkitekt/Systemdesigner
description:
Uppdragsbeskrivning:
   

  

 Polismyndigheten söker en senior systemarkitekt/systemdesigner som ska ha en central roll i utvecklingen av den tekniska plattformen i polisbilen. Lösningen utgör ett viktigt arbetsverktyg i den operativa polisverksamheten och ställer höga krav på robusthet, tillgänglighet och driftsäkerhet.
   

  

 Du kommer att arbeta i ett tvärfunktionellt team bestående av systemutvecklare, testare, uppdragsledare, UX-designer och tekniska produktspecialister. Arbetet styrs både av lagar och förordningar samt av verksamhetens behov. Därför ingår även verksamhetsbesök och workshops i arbetet.
   

  

 I rollen förväntas du ta ett övergripande ansvar för den tekniska arkitekturen och systemdesignen för lösningar där både mjukvara och hårdvara samverkar i en fordonsmiljö. Du kommer att arbeta i gränslandet mellan hårdvara och mjukvara och säkerställa att tekniska lösningar fungerar i en mobil och verksamhetskritisk miljö.
   

  

 Du kommer att fungera som en teknisk ledare i teamet och stödja systemutvecklare i arkitekturfrågor, fatta tekniska beslut och bidra till att driva arbetet framåt. Rollen innebär också att tillsammans med kravanalytiker och andra intressenter analysera behov från verksamheten och omsätta dessa till hållbara tekniska lösningar.
   

  

 Vi söker en person som snabbt kan sätta sig in i miljön och ta ett aktivt ansvar i arkitektur- och designfrågor från start. Resor i tjänsten kan förekomma. Huvudsaklig placering är på Kungsholmen i Stockholm.
   

  

 Kompetenskrav: Nivå 4
   

  

* Kunskap – hög generalistkompetens eller mycket hög kompetens inom aktuellt området
* Erfarenhet – 9-12 års erfarenhet inom området. Har deltagit i stora och komplexa uppdrag och utfört dessa med mycket hög kvalitet. Är förebild för andra konsulter på lägre nivå.
* Ledning – Tar huvudansvar för ett område och kan leda en större grupp
* Självständighet – Mycket stor


  

  

 Kvalificeringskrav (Skallkrav):
   

  

* Examen inom IT, alternativt annan relevant utbildning eller erfarenhet som arbetsgivaren bedömer likvärdig
* Minst 10 års erfarenhet inom systemutveckling, systemdesign eller lösningsarkitektur
* Minst 5 års erfarenhet av systemarkitektur eller systemdesign i tekniskt komplexa system där både hårdvara och mjukvara ingår
* Minst 5 års erfarenhet av arbete inom fordonsindustrin eller andra mobila och tekniskt komplexa systemmiljöer
* Erfarenhet av att delta i och driva tekniska vägval och val av tekniska lösningar och komponenter
* Erfarenhet av kravställning kopplat till prestanda, tillgänglighet, robusthet och driftsäkerhet
* Erfarenhet av att driva tekniska eller strategiska frågor inom systemutveckling eller arkitektur
* Erfarenhet av agilt arbetssätt i produktutvecklingsmiljö
* Mycket goda kunskaper i svenska i tal och skrift
* Svenskt medborgarskap


 Meriterande krav (Börkrav):
   

  

* Erfarenhet av Jira/Confluence
* Erfarenhet av projektledning eller produktägare


 Se bifogad fil "Kompetensmatris"
   

  

 Personliga egenskaper
   

  

 Vi söker dig som har en analytisk förmåga, är ansvarstagande och ha ett starkt driv tillsammans med ett kreativt tänkande. Du vill hela tiden arbeta för att vi tillsammans kontinuerligt levererar så bra lösningar som möjligt. Du är en anpassningsbar lagspelare som har lätt för att samarbeta, du är även kommunikativ och kan hantera många kontaktytor. Vår kravanalytiker driver workshops och expertgrupper med verksamheten för att ta fram utvecklingsbara krav – din kommunikationsförmåga är central.

title: Embedded Software Developer in Stockholm
description:
**Job Title**
 Embedded Software Developer in Stockholm
   

  

**Job Description**
*At Axis, we’ve always been about pushing the boundaries in pursuit of innovating for a smarter, safer world. We do this by developing IP-based products and innovations for security and video surveillance. We are expanding our Stockholm team and looking for an Embedded Developer interested to work in Go to join us!*
**The team**
 At Axis, our teams work cross-functionally in projects to develop and deliver world class products! The teams are small, empowered agile teams who support each other, cooperate to reach their goals together and foster an environment of collaboration and openness to new ideas. We believe diverse perspectives are key to innovation. And one thing for sure; teamwork, collaboration and openness to each other’s ideas are essential to everyone at Axis.
   

  

 Many of our teams have Innovation days and Free Fridays where you can freely experiment your ideas. We trust our teams to decide on the best ways of working, the tools to use, and which ideas to explore – a level of freedom that truly empowers our developers.
   

  

**The role**
 Your team is a new cross-functional team working on a new product. The team brings together firmware engineers with application developers building high-level functionality in collaboration with frontend developers and UX designers. You play an important role in the product development by writing well designed, efficient, scalable, readable and testable code in Go. You take an early part in feature investigations and pre-studies, including collaborating on prototype code and evaluating using real world testing. Together with your team, you will be involved in setting the coding standards and ways of working for your team.
   

  

**Who are we looking for/Who are you?**
 You are curious, love challenges and to solve them in a team focused atmosphere. You get inspired by working in an environment of openness, creativity, trust, commitment, playfulness and encouragement.
   

  

 We hope you enjoy modern software development, focusing on incremental releases, user needs and data monitoring. You actively contribute with your ideas and thoughts. You like creating your own network of peers to discuss issues and designs. You value open communication and readily connect with colleagues to get the input you need to progress, whether in Stockholm, Lund or any other Axis site.
   

  

 While the role focuses on Go/Golang, we believe strong embedded C++ experience (especially object-oriented) provides a good foundation to build your Go expertise.
   

  

**We’d love to hear that you have:**
* Experience in C++ programming, preferably in an embedded environment like Linux of which around 2 years within product development
* Engineering bachelor’s or master’s degree in computer science, physics, mathematics engineering or equivalent.


**Perhaps you also have:**
* Experience in Go/Golang, C, or Rust
* Experience in multi-threaded programming
* An interest in Software design and architecture.


**What Axis Can Do For You**
 At Axis Stockholm we are a newer R&D site with 45+ engineers so far. You will be part of creating and maintaining the collaborative atmosphere and can influence how we want to work in our part of Axis.
   

  

 Axis is a world leader in network video, where innovative technology meets global impact. Here, you’ll contribute to meaningful projects that shape the future of security and surveillance — developing solutions used worldwide.
   

  

 As a fast-growing company, we offer exciting career opportunities. You’ll grow professionally through continuous learning, supported by a collaborative team that values creativity, innovation, and work-life balance.
   

  

 Your well-being matters to us. We offer a range of benefits, including a company bonus, Friday cake, parental leave policies, wellness benefits, health insurance — and even your own Axis bicycle.
   

  

 To learn more about Axis, our innovative products, solutions, and vibrant company culture, explore:
   

  

 Life at Axis blog
   

  

 Engineering at Axis blog
   

  

 Innovation at Axis
   

  

**Ready to Act?**
 Axis is a company realizing the benefits of a diverse workforce. We know that diversity in groups creates a better working environment and promotes creativity, something that is fundamental for our success. We welcome all applications (CV and cover letter).
   

  

 We're looking for the real you, cover letters written in your own words are highly valued!
   

  

 We go through applications continuously so don’t wait – send in your application today!
   

  

 In case of questions, please reach out to recruiting manager Hanna Al-Maawali at +46 46 272 1800.
   

  

 Type of Employment
   

  

 Permanent Employment
   

  

 Posting End Date
   

  

 2026-03-20
   

  

*Certain roles at Axis require background checks, which means applicable verifications will be done in these recruitments.* 
*Notice will be provided before we take any action.*
**About Axis Communications**
 We enable a smarter, safer world by creating innovative solutions for improving security and business performance. As a network technology company and industry leader, we offer solutions in video surveillance, access control, intercom, and audio systems, enhanced by intelligent analytics applications.
   

  

 With around 6000 committed employees in over 50 countries, we collaborate with partners worldwide. Together, we thrive in our friendly, open, and collaborative culture and inspire each other to think beyond the expected. United by our commitment to inclusion, diversity, and sustainability, we consistently seek to develop our skills and way of working.
   

  

**Let´s create a smarter, safer world**
 For more information about Axis, please visit our website www.axis.com.
   

  

 Listen to Get To Know Axis – Podcast

title: Senior .Net Fullstack Developer
description:
At NOBA, we’re all about collaboration, curiosity, and tackling tech challenges together. As part of our skilled dev team, you’ll dive into both backend and frontend work, solving problems with people who genuinely enjoy building great things.
   

  

 We’re forming a brand-new development team in Stockholm and are looking for two
 **Senior .Net Fullstack Developers** 
 to join us. We aim to bring together people with varied backgrounds and experiences, united by a passion for solving tech challenges and building great digital solutions!
   

  

**About The Role**
 You’ll have the chance to work across the full stack, developing new web services, improving system usability, and maintaining existing solutions. You will be trusted in designing, building and implementing modern web services for internal and external users.
   

  

 We’re big on continuous learning and knowledge-sharing - plus, we believe in a healthy work-life balance, giving you time to recharge and pursue your passions outside of work. Join a team of friendly and highly skilled developers, based in the central of Stockholm.
   

  

**What You Will Do**
* Develop web applications with a focus on great user experiences
* Build internal tools that make life easier for your colleagues
