Anställningsform: tillsvidare med provanställning | Anställningens omfattning: heltid | Antal lediga befattningar: 1 | Sysselsättningsgrad: 100% | Ort: Uppsala | Län: Uppsala län | Land: Sweden | Referensnummer: 2026/18 | Kontakt: Martin Bergström, sektionschef +4618674000, | Facklig företrädare: ST 018-674000, SACO, Magnus Thelander 018-674000, Seko, Theres Andersson 018-674000, | Publicerat: 2026-03-09 | Sista ansökningsdag: 2026-03-23

title: Customer Success Manager
description:
The Customer Success Manager (CSM) helps Spacewell customers realize measurable value from our Workplace, Energy, Asset, and Maintenance solutions, driving retention, expansion, and advocacy across our full portfolio. Using the Winning by Design SPICED framework, you turn customer insights into concrete outcomes that make buildings smarter, more sustainable, and more efficient.


**Your mission**


As a Customer Success Manager, you are the strategic partner for a portfolio of B2B customers across all Spacewell products: Workplace, Energy, Asset, and Maintenance. You ensure customers achieve their desired impact by guiding them from onboarding and adoption to value realization, renewal, and expansion, always grounded in SPICED: Situation, Pain, Impact, Critical event, and Decision.


**What you'll do**


* Oversee onboarding and implementation for new customers, turning their Situation and Pain into clear success plans, training programs, and adoption milestones across the Spacewell suite.
* Act as the primary point of contact for your accounts, building strong relationships with business and technical stakeholders and aligning our solutions to their evolving goals and impact metrics.
* Use SPICED framework to structure ongoing customer conversations and QBRs: review value delivered, quantify Impact, discuss Critical events (renewals, audits, ESG deadlines), and agree on next Decisions and actions.
* Monitor product usage and health scores, proactively addressing risks, orchestrating remediation plans, and coordinating with Support, Professional Services, and Product where needed.
* Identify and qualify upsell and cross‑sell opportunities across Workplace, Energy, Asset, and Maintenance by linking additional modules or sites to measurable customer outcomes.
* Capture structured product feedback and insights from customers, and share them with Product and Marketing to inform roadmap, content, and go‑to‑market improvements.
* Prepare clear reports and account reviews summarizing health, adoption, risks, expansion potential, and progress against agreed success plans.

**What we're looking for**


* At least 2–4 years of experience in Customer Success or account management in a B2B SaaS environment, ideally in PropTech, facility management, energy management, or building operations.
* Proven track record in driving retention and expansion, with concrete examples of reducing churn, increasing product adoption, or growing ARR within existing accounts.
* Strong consultative skills: you can translate data, dashboards, and workflows into clear business value for operational leaders, finance, and C‑level stakeholders.
* Familiarity with or strong interest in working with the SPICED framework and other modern, customer centric methodologies, using them to structure discovery, success planning, and internal handovers.
* Comfortable working with CRM and customer success tools, tracking health scores and capturing SPICED fields to support forecasting and risk management.
* Excellent communication skills in Dutch and English; you can explain complex topics in a clear, concise way and facilitate workshops or QBRs with confidence.
* A customer‑centric, curious, and proactive mindset, with a can‑do attitude and the ability to work both autonomously and closely with cross‑functional teams.
* Bachelor's degree in engineering, IT, Business, or a related field is preferred.

**Why join Spacewell**


You will join an international, mission‑driven team that connects Workplace, Energy, Asset, and Maintenance into one smart building platform, helping customers run safer, more sustainable, and more efficient buildings. You'll have a direct influence on customer outcomes, working with innovative technology and a modern SPICED‑based customer success approach that supports your growth and impact.

**Our Spacewell benefits**

* A company laptop to work efficiently, wherever you are
* Occupational Injury Insurance (TFA) and TGL for extra peace of mind
* A mobile phone to stay connected
* Healthcare cheques worth 3000 SEK per year, supporting your wellbeing
* 30 legal holidays to rest, recharge, and enjoy time off
company_description: Spacewell is a global software and consulting firm focused on solutions for the entire value chain of managing buildings including real esta

title: Software Engineer
description:
This is a career-changing opportunity to work alongside world-class engineers and scientists on a mission to reimagine what machines can do. You will help us productionize cutting-edge research and integrate it with key partners. Your work will shape how intelligent machines learn, adapt, and act in the physical world. We are looking for the right person with a solid foundation, who finds learning fun and embraces deep, challenging work.


Our Strategic Engagements team focuses on transforming research into products. We work in close collaboration with our partners and integrate the Intui model with their systems. This role involves tackling integration hurdles to bring our model to our partners, ensuring it supports both research and pilots effectively.


As a Strategic Engagements Software Engineer, you will bridge our core AI research with client systems. You will **adapt, productionize, and stabilize** advanced algorithms for robust operation on diverse hardware - from embedded systems to complex platforms. This requires:

* **Deep systems expertise** to optimize high-performance native code.
* **A hands-on approach** to client deployment and resilient interface design.
* **A focus on flexibility**, creating configurable systems under strict performance constraints.

**What You’ll Do**


Translating research into a successful product hinges on several core attributes: **reliability, portability, and flexibility.** Additionally, success requires efficiency, developer experience, observability, and configurability.


The role requires **comprehensive DevOps responsibility** across the entire software development lifecycle:

* **Development:** Coding, quality assurance, and testing.
* **Infrastructure:** Building CI/CD pipelines and release management.
* **Operations:** Server maintenance, system monitoring, and site reliability.

**What you bring**

* **Technical Stack:** Strong proficiency in C++; comfortable with Python and TypeScript for integration and tooling.
* **Systems Fluency:** Expertise in Linux environments with a focus on memory management, concurrency, and performance.
* **Engineering Mindset:** You don't just write code; you design for testability and maintainability.
* **Growth Orientation:** A strong desire to adapt alongside an evolving tech stack.

**Bonus Signals**

* Proficient in establishing **build infrastructure**.
* Demonstrated experience with **Continuous Integration (CI)**.
* Familiarity with **container technologies**.
* Experience with **Rust**.
* Experience with **CUDA**.

**Who You Are**

* **Systems Thinker:** You translate deep technical understanding into effective software solutions.
* **Proactive Owner:** You take full accountability for projects from inception to completion.
* **Complexity Arbiter:** You have a nuanced understanding of when to embrace or avoid technical complexity.
* **Collaborative Peer:** You prioritize sharing insights and ideas over territorial ownership.
* **Builder:** Your primary motivation is creating lasting, fundamental capabilities rather than superficial demos.


Please note that we are strictly seeking direct individual contributors and do not work with consultants or third-party agencies.

title: Functional Solution Architect Microsoft Dynamics 365 F&SCM
description:
**Functional Solution Architect**


Microsoft Dynamics 365 F&SCM


Drömmer du om en öppen och inkluderande arbetsplats där du får vara dig själv? Har du innovativa idéer som du vill förverkliga och söker en plats där de kan bli verklighet? Då är BE-terna rätt plats för dig! Hos oss får du tänka utanför boxen och friheten att ta modiga steg mot framtiden. Vi främjar en kultur som bygger på förtroende och uppskattning, där vi tillsammans når framgång och skapar något stort. Tillsammans med våra partners och kunder skriver vi spännande framgångshistorier som vi är stolta över – vill du vara med och skapa nästa kapitel?

 **#yourmission**

* Som Functional Solution Architect kommer du ge professionell vägledning och stöttning vid implementering av nytt affärssystem såsom att förstå kundens behov, driva workshops och designa affärssystemet samt guida teamet på bästa möjliga sätt
* Rollen kräver bred branschkunskap samt en vilja att hålla dig uppdaterad med nya teknologier och funktioner
* Du arbetar nära både teamet och kunder för att säkerställa framgångsrika projektleveranse

**#yoursuperpowers**

* Arbetslivserfarenhet som Solution Architect inom affärssystemsområdet
* 5+ års erfarenhet av Microsoft Dynamics AX eller av Dynamics 365
* Eftergymnasial utbildning
* Erfarenhet inom Retail är meriterande
* Goda kunskaper i svenska och engelska

**#beternasuperpowers**

* Moderna arbetsförhållanden, arbetstider och flexibel placering
* Kontorsplacering i Halmstad eller Helsingborg
* Spännande och utmanande internationella kunder inom olika branscher
* Professionell utveckling och certifieringar
* Internationell arbetsmiljö

*På BE-terna sätter vi människor i centrum. BE-YOU: Var dig själv och låt din unika personlighet blomstra hos oss. Vi välkomnar mångfald och söker talanger med olika bakgrunder och perspektiv. Det är mångfalden som gör våra team unika - följ med oss på vår resa.*

 *Vi erbjuder spännande och varierande projekt, och vårt team är lika unikt som våra lösningar. BE-terna är en av Europas ledande leverantörer av affärslösningar. Med en passion för de senaste teknologierna hjälper vi våra kunder att arbeta enklare, effektivare och med mer transparens. Hos oss har varje medarbetare möjlighet att bidra med sina idéer och sin kompetens – vi tror på kraften i teamwork! Vill du veta mer om oss och vår kultur? Besök vår karriärsida.*

title: IT-Konsult till 2nd Line Support
description:
Vi söker en engagerad IT-konsult till vår 2nd line support som brinner för att skapa förbättringar och driva proaktiva lösningar!


I din roll kommer du att ta hand om varierande supportärenden, där uppgifterna kan handla om allt från installation av hårdvara till att ställa in skrivare hos våra användare. Då vi nyligen har migrerat till Windows 11, ser vi gärna att du har erfarenhet av att arbeta i den miljön.

**ARBETSUPPGIFTER**

* Hantera inkommande 2nd line-supportärenden
* Proaktivt utveckla och förbättra supportfunktionen
* Säkerställa effektiva processer och samordna supporten
* Dokumentera och uppdatera befintliga supportdokument och rutiner


Vi söker dig som är strukturerad, självgående och har erfarenhet av liknande arbetsuppgifter inom IT-support. För att trivas i rollen behöver du vara kommunikativ och tycka om att lösa problem och driva förändring.

**INFORMATION**


Plats: Västerås  

Befattning: Heltid 100%, minst 3 månader med option till förlängning  

Start: Januari 2025  

Övrigt: Konsulten kommer att säkerhetsklassas inför uppdraget

**LÅTER DET INTRESSANT?**


Då välkomnar vi dig att ansöka till oss så snart som möjligt då vi hanterar ansökningar löpande. Skicka in ditt CV till oss redan idag via ”Skicka ansökan”.


Har du frågor gällande tjänsten, vilka Tavana är eller konsultrollen så är du välkommen att skicka mail till info@tavana.se


Vi ser fram emot din ansökan!
company_description: Tavana IT är ett nytänkande och spännande konsultbolag som har varit verksamma inom IT-branschen sedan 2013. Vi levererar en bred bas av förstklassiga tjänster till våra kunder i hela Sverige.

title: Senior Full-Stack .NET Developer
description:
Är du en passionerad .NET utvecklare som söker nya möjligheter? If är det ledande försäkringsbolaget i Norden. IT är en central del av vår verksamhet och vi arbetar intensivt med att vidareutveckla våra system för att möta våra kunder i den digitala världen. Våra stora strategiska projekt är baserade på .NET-plattformen. Användarupplevelse och kvalitet är viktiga drivkrafter för att våra kunder ska uppleva att ”If hjälper mycket”. Nu söker vi en passionerad .NET-utvecklare till vårt team i Stockholm.
 



  





**Om rollen** 




 Hos oss får du utveckla våra viktigaste IT-system där din kunskapsnivå och ditt intresse kommer att styra ansvarsområden och utvecklingsvägar. Du kommer att ingå i ett team som är en central del av vår nyutveckling och samtidigt arbetar med aktiv förvaltning av befintliga lösningar. Det är en Microsoftbaserad applikation med omkring 2500 användare i Sverige och Norge som bland annat hanterar våra kunder, produkter och försäkringsengagemang.
 



  





 Vi arbetar både med desktop-applikationer och webb. Tekniken är i huvudsak .NET/C#, SQL Server och en servicebaserad arkitektur (WebAPI och WCF). Annan teknik vi använder ASP.NET, Javascript/React och Cloud/Azure. Du har erfarenhet inom den senaste tekniken vilket gör dig till en nyckelspelare i teamet när vi kontinuerligt moderniserar systemen.
 



  





**Vi erbjuder** 



* En inkluderande arbetsmiljö där alla är välkomna
* Karriär- och utvecklingsmöjligheter i det största försäkringsbolaget i Norden
* Möjlighet till en hybrid arbetsplats
* Sociala aktiviteter
* Lunchförmån
* En hälsofrämjande arbetsplats som exempelvis erbjuder friskvårdsbidrag
* Rabatt på försäkringar tecknade hos If skadeförsäkringar
* Hög pensionsavsättning



  





**Om teamet** 




 Teamet består av 14 medlemmar. Det inkluderar roller såsom utvecklare, produktägare, scrum master, QA, arkitektur och support. Huvuddelen av utvecklarna har lång erfarenhet av både tekniken och domänen. Vi arbetar enligt agila principer och alla hjälper varandra att lyckas.
 



  





**Vem är du?** 




 Vi söker dig som är en ambitiös utvecklare med minst fem års erfarenhet av moderna lösningar inom .NET och har en akademisk utbildning inom IT. Du trivs med att arbeta i grupp och har erfarenhet av att arbeta enligt agila principer. Viktiga egenskaper är att du är positiv, drivande i ditt sätt att arbeta och vill dela med dig av din kunskap. Du är nyfiken, ser möjligheter och gillar att delta i och påverka förändring. Du kommunicerar obehindrat med kollegor på svenska och engelska.
 



  





**Mer information och rekryteringsprocessen** 




**Sista ansökningsdag:** 
 31 Mars 2026. För att ansöka vill vi att du bifogar ett CV och besvarar några frågor i vårt rekryteringssystem.
 



**Ort:** 
 Stockholm, Bergshamra
 



**Start:** 
 Enligt överenskommelse.
 



  





 Slutkandidater kommer genomgå en bakgrundskontroll innan en anställning kan bli aktuell.

title: Support Agent
description:
*Binero is a growth company listed on Nasdaq First North Growth Market. We enable sustainable digital development for companies and organisations with our comprehensive range of IT services, from robust IT infrastructure to media content distribution for public activities and 24/7 support. We are the silent engine that gives your business the power to grow.*
*We have three business areas: Cloud Services, Managed Services and Connected Services*
**We are now looking for a committed and driven Support Agent** 
 located in Bromma Stockholm,
   

  

 As a Support Agent, you will play a central role in delivering high quality technical support across our entire support stack. Your primary responsibility is to provide prompt and efficient support for IT-related issues and requests, ensuring minimal disruption to users' daily work.
   

  

**Your Primary Responsibilities Will Consist Of**
* Serve as a key point of contact for customers, handling support inquiries via phone, email, and the service desk platform.
* Take full ownership of support cases from initial analysis to final resolution, including troubleshooting and clear documentation.
* Manage a broad range of technical issues involving hardware, software, networks, user accounts, and mobile devices.
* Perform advanced troubleshooting and collaborate closely with internal 2nd and 3rd line specialists when deeper expertise is required.
* Ensure consistent, proactive communication with customers and close cases only once a sustainable and verified solution has been delivered.
* Administer user accounts and access rights, including onboarding and offboarding workflows.
* Contribute to the creation and improvement of documentation, processes, and knowledge base articles.
* Provide guidance, training, and best practice support to users to help increase their digital confidence and efficiency.
* Actively participate in enhancing our support processes, ways of working, and the overall customer experience.


**Your profile**
 To succeed in this role, you combine strong influencing skills with the ability to build alignment across stakeholders. You’re a skilled negotiator who can reach win-win outcomes while protecting the business’s interests. You communicate clearly and professionally—whether in writing or in conversation—and you present with confidence, tailoring your message to different audiences and making complex topics easy to understand.
   

  

**Education And Experience**
* Experience working in a technical support environment handling cases across multiple support tiers.
* Strong understanding of Windows operating systems, Microsoft 365, and commonly used productivity applications.
* Solid knowledge of hardware, networking fundamentals, and general troubleshooting methods.
* Knowledge with ITSM frameworks such as ITIL is an advantage.
* Excellent communication skills with the ability to explain technical concepts in a clear and accessible way.
* Strong ability to prioritize, stay organized, and work effectively in time‑sensitive situations.
* Service‑minded with an analytical, solution‑oriented approach.


 Does this sound like you? Then we can offer you an exciting and rewarding position in a fast-paced environment at a driven and rapidly growing company with sound values, where humility and freedom under responsibility are key. In this recruitment process, we place great emphasis on your personal qualities.
   

  

 You will report to the Head of Support.
   

  

 If you have any questions about the position, please contact our Head of Support at mattias.lilliehook@binero.com
   

  

*We value security and integrity. That is why we always conduct an extended background check in the form of CV verification, credit checks, and checks of legal events via an external partner before hiring.*
**About Binero Group**
 The Binero Group consists of a merger of Binero, Infrateq, Serit Tromsø and Xpeedio, where we collectively have more than 60 years of experience. We are a customer-focused technology partner that positions itself with ‘Powering Customer Delight’.
   

  

 Whether it's project management for digital transformation, cloud services, digital media distribution, development or IT support, we have the expertise and capacity to
 **deliver top-class results** 
 .
   

  

 Binero has its headquarters in Stockholm and employs approximately 160 people in Sweden, Norway, Finland and Denmark.

title: Technical Customer Support
description:
**Location:** 
 Stockholm - In our office in Solna or our Stockholm office which will be available soon.
 



**Hours:** 
 Full-time
 



**Start date:** 
 As soon as possible
 



  





 Do you have a
 **technical background within energy, electricity, or power systems** 
 - and enjoy helping people understand and use technology correctly?
 



 Do you like remote troubleshooting
 **real, physical systems** 
 and software? And do you want to work with products that actively support the green transition?
 



 Then this role might be for you.
 



  





  





**About Us 🌱** 




 At Emaldo, we create smart, sustainable energy systems for modern homes - making clean energy accessible and effortless for everyone.
 



 We’re passionate about the green transition and about people. We believe that technology is only as powerful as the service that supports it - and that’s where you come in.
 



 We’re growing fast, and our global support team collaborates closely and is the friendly voice and helping hand our customers rely on.
 



  





  





**About the Role ⚙️** 




 As
 **Technical Customer Support at Emaldo** 
 , you will be the first technical point of contact for
 **customers and installers in Sweden** 
 .
 



  





  





 You will work with:
 



  




* Residential energy storage systems.
* Electrical installations and system behavior.
* Inverters, alarms, connectivity and energy flows.
* Real-world technical questions from electricians and end-customers.



  





 Your mission is to ensure that Emaldo systems are understood, configured correctly, and operating safely and reliably.
 



  





 You will collaborate closely with:
 



  




* Emaldo support team.
* Certified electricians and installers.
* Customers with technical questions about their energy system.



  





 Key Responsibilities
 



  




* Provide technical support and guidance on Emaldo’s energy systems to installers and end-customers.
* Answer questions related to electricity, system behavior, alarms and operational status.
* Support customers in understanding and using Emaldo’s apps and subscriptions.
* Assist with system setup, basic diagnostics and troubleshooting
* Ensure customers feel confident in how their energy system works – not just the software



  





 We are specifically looking for candidates with a technical background relevant to energy systems.
 



 This role is ideal if you love helping people and creating trust – and also diving deep into technical details.
 



  





 You have:
 



  




* A technical education or hands-on experience within electricity, energy, power systems, installations, automation or similar.
* Basic understanding of electrical systems, energy flows, and hardware/software-based troubleshooting.
* Fluent Swedish and English (spoken and written).
* Able to work from our office in Stockholm.
* Legal right to work in Sweden.



  





 You are:
 


* Curious and technically minded.
* Comfortable talking to electricians and technically skilled customers.
* Motivated by understanding how systems work in real life.



  





 ⚠️ This role is not suited for profiles with a purely IT/software or consulting background without experience in energy or electrical systems.
 



  





**Why join Emaldo** 




 🤝 Real teamwork – Your ideas matter from day one
 



 🌍 International & connected – Support team in 5 countries, strong daily collaboration
 



 💬 People first – We build trust, not just solve technical issues
 



 🌱 Growth – Learn new skills and help shape how we work
 



 💚 Shared purpose – Driving the clean energy transition together
 



 🌈 Inclusive culture – Kindness, respect, and openness always
 



  





  





  





**How to Apply** 




 Apply directly via LinkedIn (Quick Apply) with your CV, highlighting your motivation for joining Emaldo, your interest in clean energy, and your experience in technical support.
 



  





 📩 Questions? Contact Farid Runklint, Head of Customer Care & Technical Services:
 
 farid@emaldo.com
 




  





 We believe in equal opportunities – whether you’re returning to the job market, changing careers, or ready for new challenges, we’d love to hear from you.

title: Solution Architect to Warehouse Management and Automation
description:
**Job Description**

 We are looking for a Solution Architect to shape the architecture for H&M’s
 **Warehouse Management and Automation** 
 landscape across both H&M-operated and 3PL warehouses. You will translate business needs into scalable designs, analyse current solutions, identify gaps, and guide teams toward stable, efficient, and future-proof warehouse operations.
   

  





 You will be part of the Warehouse Value Stream, working closely with logistics, operations, engineering, and external partners to ensure our warehouses run with high performance, automation readiness, and strong integration across the supply chain. You will also contribute to strengthening our Architecture Community by developing standards and best practices.
   

  





 This is a unique opportunity to join team of Solution Architects working on cutting edge retail solutions within our company within several different areas from product creation, through warehouses and tech.
   

  





  

  





**WHAT YOU’LL DO:**



* Translate business and technical requirements into clear architectural blueprints
* Analyse and improve existing WMS, automation, and integration landscapes
* Create solution roadmaps and transition architectures for global warehouses
* Design integrations across WMS, automation systems, ERP/SAP, and logistics platforms
* Provide architectural guidance on options, risks, dependencies, and security considerations
* Align stakeholders on business and tech implications of future warehouse direction
* Ensure solutions follow enterprise architecture, data privacy, and continuity standards
* Support technology evaluations and vendor selections
* Analyse, design, develop, maintain, and communicate solution roadmaps and transition architectures.
* Create architectural designs to contextualize solution(s) development, provide leadership and collaborate with teams to ensure the products/solutions are aligned with business and IT goals including the overall enterprise architecture – e.g. relevant technology strategies, policies, standards and practices are applied.
* Evaluate and drive continuous improvement, reducing technical debt and enhancing end-to-end business value.



  

  





**WHO YOU’RE:**



* 5+ years of experience designing complex solutions
* Experience with
 **Warehouse Management Systems** 
 (WMS) and/or
 **Warehouse Automation** 
 (AS/RS, conveyors, robotics, sorters)
* SAP WM or EWM exp is plus
* Strong problem-solving skills and ability to conceptualize end-to-end warehouse flows
* Ability to communicate technical concepts clearly to both technical and non-technical audiences
* High ownership, attention to detail, and adherence to architectural governance
* Collaborative mindset with openness to change and learning
* Depth in one architectural area plus broad knowledge across logistics or supply-chain tech domains



 Nice to Have
   

  




* Experience with large-scale Agile product organizations
* Knowledge of Azure or GCP
* Experience with data/AI solutions in logistics or warehouse optimization



  

  

  

  




**Additional Information**

***Please note***
 : As our culture and teamwork are very important to us, four days (80%) per week of in-office presence in our office are required.
   

  





 This is a full-time position with placement in
 **Stockholm** 
 .
   

  





  

  





**WHO WE ARE:**
  

 Shaping the future of fashion with people, data, and tech. The fashion and retail industries are going through a transformation, driven by customers' technology and sustainability expectations. At H&M Group, we want to shape the future of fashion and lifestyle by harnessing the power of smart tech and data. With our 74-year history of innovation, we understand the need to collaborate and co-create with engineers and tech specialists around the world to achieve our vision.
   

  





  

  





**WHAT WE OFFER!** 
  

  

 You are joining a unique value-driven culture, a large tech network and community where you can be yourself. Besides the obvious perks such as staff discount card, flexible work life, learning communities, wellness benefits, parental benefits etc. There are endless opportunities to experiment and grow in any direction that you want, and when you grow, we grow. Being a major player gives us countless opportunities to make a real impact and shape the future.

title: CIO/CISO-konsult
description:
*För dig som vill ta ett bredare ansvar – och forma rollen själv* 




 Vissa uppdrag behöver en CIO.
 



 Vissa behöver en CISO.
 



 Andra behöver båda – men inte på heltid.
 



 Den här rollen är för dig som har kompetens inom både IT‑ledning och informationssäkerhet, och som vill ta de uppdrag där det är mest värdefullt att kombinera perspektiven.
 



 Du får en roll med stor frihet och tydlig påverkan: seniort ledningsnära ansvar, flexibelt upplägg (CIO, CISO eller båda) och möjlighet att vara med och bygga bolaget på riktigt.
 



  





**Om Zala Management AB** 




 Zala Management AB är ett specialistbolag inom IT-ledning och informationssäkerhet. Vi kliver in när organisationer behöver seniort CIO- och/eller CISO-stöd – strategiskt, operativt eller i kombination – och anpassar ansvar och leverans efter kundens faktiska behov. Vi bygger ett platt bolag med starkt eget ansvar, nära samarbete och möjlighet till delägarskap för att skapa långsiktigt engagemang.
 



  





**Så arbetar vi** 




 Du arbetar i uppdrag som kan vara:
 



 ·      renodlade CIO‑uppdrag
 



 ·      renodlade CISO‑uppdrag
 



 ·      kombinerade uppdrag där IT‑ och säkerhetsansvar hänger tätt ihop
 



 Du anpassar ditt ansvar efter kundens verkliga behov, inte en fast rollbeskrivning. Det kräver senioritet, omdöme och helhetssyn – och ger i gengäld stort inflytande.
 



  





**Nyckelparametrar** 




 ·       Upplägg: anpassas per uppdrag (CIO, CISO eller kombinerat) och kan vara heltid eller deltid.
 



 ·       Ersättning: du sätter själv din lön/ersättning utifrån din tilltänkta fakturering, med flexibilitet kring ledighet och förmåner.
 



 ·       Start: enligt överenskommelse.
 



 ·       Plats: beror på uppdrag och kund – vi strävar efter ett upplägg som fungerar långsiktigt.
 



  





**Om rollen som CIO- och/eller CISO‑konsult** 




 Du:
 



 ·      arbetar nära kundens ledning
 



 ·      tar ansvar för både riktning och genomförande
 



 ·      kombinerar strategiskt arbete med operativ förmåga
 



 ·      ser IT och informationssäkerhet som möjliggörare för verksamheten
 



 Detta är rollen för dig som inte vill placeras i ett fack, utan vill bidra där din kompetens gör mest nytta.
 



  





**Att bygga bolaget – tillsammans** 




 För oss är det självklart att:
 



 ·      samarbeta tätt
 



 ·      dela insikter och erfarenheter
 



 ·      ta gemensamt ansvar för helheten
 



 Vi tror på ägande i praktiken och erbjuder möjlighet till delägarskap för att skapa långsiktigt engagemang och gemensam drivkraft.
 



  





**Frihet under ansvar** 




 Du har stort handlingsutrymme och hög grad av frihet. Du planerar ditt upplägg med kund och bolag – från uppdragsmix och ansvar till hur du disponerar ersättning, ledighet och förmåner utifrån din fakturering. Detta förutsätter mognad, ansvarstagande och affärsmässighet. Det är inget vi detaljstyr – och inget som passar alla.
 



  





**Vem rollen passar för – och inte** 




 Det här passar dig som:
 



 ·      är senior och trygg i din roll som IT‑ledare (t.ex. ansvarat för IT-strategi, styrning och leverans i komplex miljö)
 



 ·      vill arbeta nära ledning och verksamhet – och kan ta ansvar för både riktning och genomförande
 



 ·      trivs med ansvar, frihet och förtroende
 



 ·      vill bygga något långsiktigt tillsammans med andra
 



  





 Det här är inte för dig som:
 



 ·      vill ha tydliga instruktioner och färdiga ramar
 



 ·      förväntar dig att någon annan äger kundrelationen
 



 ·      föredrar traditionell konsultleverans framför helhetsansvar
 



  





**Nästa steg** 




 Låter det här som rätt typ av ansvar och frihet för dig? Ansök via LinkedIn och skriv några rader om dig själv (och vilken typ av uppdrag du vill ta: CIO, CISO eller kombinerat) så tar vi kontakt. Första steget är ett förutsättningslöst samtal där vi lär känna varandra – du ska välja oss minst lika mycket som vi väljer dig.

title: Senior Cyber Security Engineer
description:
**Job Description**

**WHAT YOU’LL DO​**




 The Cyber Defence Centre (CDC) is a key security function at H&M Group, forming the last line of defence verifying and supporting other security controls, safeguarding company staff and assets 24/7.  This role will strengthen our Cyber Defense Engineering capability as demand; regulatory requirements and assistance are needed throughout the organization.
   

  





 You have previously worked in the Azure cloud and with \*nix shells and have no problem navigating in VM’s or containers while doing some Python development. Now you want to grow or become the driver of good processes and system ownership, improving security posture in a global enterprise.
   

  





 Example of the work our team is doing:
   

  




* Owners of the SOC Registry, ongoing work of documenting, documenting and alerting.
* Continuously improving our ingest sources from both enterprise and e-com to filter out security events and work together with analysts visualizing current information.
* Creating patch, updates and architectural processes and routines adhering to H&M security standards and external frameworks and regulations.
* Improve way or working in the team as well as towards other teams.



  

  





**WHO YOU’LL WORK WITH​**




 We are a collaborative team that works closely with analysts and other security functions within the group that we visualize data for. We have the ownership and responsibility to develop, setup, manage requirements on systems and services that we deliver to security analysts.
   

  





 It is important to this role that you are familiar with Infrastructure as Code, Terraform, Containers and a CI/CD pipeline way of working. Understand the importance of ITIL and the following processes that we visualize so that everyone can improve and enhance. We do not expect you to know everything; but you have to want to improve and move forward with the team.
   

  





  

  





**WHO YOU ARE​**




*We are looking for people with…​*



* ​Broad and deep knowledge in Python and/or Azure.
* Experience in operations, understanding importance of documentation and process flows.
* Ability to navigate in \*nix and have your favorite shell and maybe even a favorite prompt.
* An interest in security field with at least an overall knowledge of ISO standards, security frameworks and understanding of log handling and ingestion.
* Previous experience of handling large log volumes.
* Willingness to learn modern technology stacks/services.
* A proactive and collaborative mindset.



  

  





**WHO WE ARE​**




 H&M Group is a global company of strong fashion brands and ventures. Our goal is to prove that there is no compromise between exceptional design, affordable prices, and sustainable solutions. We want to liberate fashion for the many, and our customers are at the heart of every decision we make.​
   

  





 We are made up of thousands of passionate and talented colleagues united by our shared culture and values. Together, we want to use our power, our scale, and our knowledge to push the fashion industry towards a more inclusive and sustainable future. ​
   

  





  

  





**WHY YOU’LL LOVE WORKING HERE ​**




 At H&M Group, we are proud to be a vibrant and welcoming company. We offer our employees attractive benefits with extensive development opportunities around the globe. ​
   

  





 All our employees receive a staff discount card, usable on all our H&M Group brands in stores and online. Brands covered by the discount are H&M (Beauty and Move included), COS, Weekday, Monki, H&M HOME, & Other Stories, ARKET. In addition to our staff discount, all our employees are included in our H&M Incentive Program – HIP. You can read more about our H&M Incentive Program here.
   

  





 In addition to our global benefits, all our local markets offer different competitive perks and benefits. Please note that they may differ between employment type and countries.
   

  





  

  





**JOIN US​**




 Our uniqueness comes from a combination of many things – our inclusive and collaborative culture, our strong values, and opportunities for growth. But most of all, it’s our people who make us who we are.​
   

  





 Take the next step in your career together with us. The journey starts here.​
   

  





*\*We are committed to a recruitment process that is fair, equitable, and based on competency. We therefore kindly ask you to not attach a cover letter in your application.​*
  

  

  





**Please note** 
*: Interviews will start after 7 January 2026*

title: Head of Cyber Defence
description:
**Job Description**

 H&M Group is transforming the way it addresses the continuously evolving and complex cyber security threats and risks. To do this we have a Tech Centre focused solely on managing Cyber Security for all our brands and majority investments.
   

  





 Within this Cyber Security Tech Centre, we have a Cyber Defence Center (CDC) that is a key security function at H&M Group, which aims to detect and respond to threats to our data or technology systems, 24 x 7. The CDC has 3 teams located both in Stockholm and India, and consists of Cyber Defence Analysts, Attack Surface Reduction Analyst and Cyber Defence Engineers. The CDC also leverages the best-in-class security technology and security providers.
   

  





 This role reports to the Chief Technology Risk Information Officer (CISO).
   

  





**Responsibilities:**



* Lead and manage the Cyber Defence Center, ensuring effective coordination and collaboration among cyber defence teams.
* Develop and implement comprehensive cyber security strategies to protect the organization's digital assets.
* Provide leadership and technical guidance to managers of cyber defence teams, fostering a culture of continuous improvement and innovation.
* Enable strong organizational health by making sure that your employees prioritize both deliveries as well as own competence development.
* Oversee the identification, assessment, and mitigation of cyber threats and vulnerabilities.
* Ensure compliance with relevant cyber security regulations and standards.
* Own and manage the cyber incident response and recovery processes, including coordination with stakeholders.
* Monitor and analyze cyber security trends and emerging threats to proactively address potential risks.
* Collaborate with other departments to integrate cyber security measures into business processes and initiatives.
* Prepare and present regular reports on the status of cyber security initiatives to senior management.
* Manage the units’ budget and monitor its financial effectiveness.
* Formal staff responsibility, including salary review, performance dialogues and support in individual development plans and competence needs.
* Contribute operationally, where necessary.


**Qualifications**
* Minimum of 10 years of experience in cyber security, with at least 5 years in a leadership role.
* Proven track record of managing and leading cyber defense teams.
* In-depth knowledge of cyber security frameworks, standards, and best practices.
* Strong understanding and a hands-on approach to threat intelligence, risk management, and incident response.
* Strong communication experience with demonstrated ability to influence people, even at senior levels, and ability to communicate in a timely and clear way
* Ability to coach others in a way that enables them to grow professionally and to increase their performance
* Experience setting and handling resource allocation budget.
* Experience with handling difficult situations both in uncertain circumstances as well as in employee related matters.
* Good at balancing striving for speed, reducing complexity, and focusing on the outcome
* Experience in managing complex cyber security projects and initiatives in a global scale
* Exceptional leadership skills, with the ability to develop and grow your colleagues in complex environments.
* Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.
* Ability to work under pressure and handle multiple priorities.
* Relevant certifications such as CISSP, CISM, or equivalent.


**Additional Information**

 This is a fulltime permanent position. The role is
 **based in our office in Stockholm.**
  

 Apply by sending in your
 **CV in English** 
 as soon as possible. Due to data policies, we only accept applications through career page.
   

  





**Benefits**




 We offer all our employees at H&M Group attractive benefits with extensive development opportunities around the globe. All our employees receive a staff discount card, usable on all our H&M Group brands in stores and online. Brands covered by the discount are H&M (Beauty and Move included), COS, Weekday, Monki, H&M HOME, & Other Stories, ARKET, Afound. In addition to our staff discount, all our employees are included in our H&M Incentive Program – HIP. You can read more about our H&M Incentive Program here.
   

  





 In addition to our global benefits, all our local markets offer different competitive perks and benefits. Please note that they may differ between employment type and countries.
   

  





**Inclusion & Diversity**




 At H&M Group, we’re determined to create and maintain inclusive, diverse and equitable workplaces throughout our organisation. Our teams should consist of a variety of people that share and combine their knowledge, experience and ideas. Having a diverse workforce leads to a positive impact on how we address challenges, on what we perceive possible and on how we choose to relate to our colleagues and customers all over the world. Hence all diversity dimensions are taken into consideration in our recruitment process.
   

  





 We strive to have a fair and equal process and therefore kindly ask you not to attach a cover letter in your application as they often contain information that easily can trigger unintentional biases.
   

  





**Company Description**




 H&M Group is a family of brands; H&M, COS, Weekday, Monki, H&M HOME, & Other Stories, ARKET and Afound. At H&M Group, our people are the driving force behind our commitment to creating meaningful growth and more sustainable lifestyles. Help us re-imagine fashion and together we will re-shape our industry. Learn more about H&M Group here.

title: Chief Information Officer EMEA & APAC
description:
**Be part of something bigger. Decode the future.**
 At Electrolux Group, as a leading global appliance company, we strive every day to shape living for the better for our consumers, our people and our planet. We share ideas and collaborate so that together, we can develop solutions that deliver enjoyable and sustainable living.
   

  

 Come join us as you are. We believe diverse perspectives make us stronger and more innovative. In our global community of people from 100+ countries, we listen to each other, actively contribute, and grow together.
   

  

 Join us in our exciting quest to build the future home.
   

  

**All about the role:**
 Electrolux Group has an IT organization structure based on a strong central IT team providing Group-level shared services across the organization, and regional IT leaders delivering IT within the regions. These Regional CIO roles will lead the digital transformation of IT and business within the region, act as the business partner and focal point of contact between the regional business and IT and build the organization to deliver on key strategic priorities. Electrolux is now seeking to recruit the regional CIO for Europe & Asia Pacific (EA).
   

  

 As Electrolux Group strives to digitally enable its business in every unit and function and across all channels to market, the
 **CIO Region EMEA and APAC** 
 will be a one of the key leaders on this journey, creating a best-in-class IT organization and focusing on enabling integrated front-to-back capabilities to deliver a streamlined customer experience.
   

  

 The following key priorities for the role have been identified:
   

  

* Act as the strategic technology partner and natural focal point of contact for the regional and global IT organization; partnering with business leadership and other key stakeholders to define opportunities. Identify and prioritize projects to ensure a cohesive, future‑focused portfolio of initiatives, based on key criteria (return on investment, productivity, compliance, etc.).
* Proactively define and deliver on the IT financial targets in line with Region and Group requirements.
* Champion and orchestrate the region’s digital transformation, steering the evolution of digital capabilities, data-driven decision making, and the global IT operating model across the enterprise.
* Shape the future-ready IT organization - developing teams and talent, enhancing leadership capability, and fostering a culture where IT enables and accelerates business transformation. Build bridges between the digital and legacy parts of the business, to enable an integrated, seamless digital ecosystem.
* Contribute to the Group technology vision for modern, scalable, and reliable platforms that support business growth and secure cost-efficient delivery towards all value domains.


 The role will report to the CEO EMEA and Group CIO. It will be an active member of both the Regional leadership team of EMEA as well as the global IT & Digital leadership team. It will be responsible for a team of 340+ resources, as well as delivery of services using a matrix-based IT model. The Regional EMEA & APAC IT organization includes teams related to value enables, value domains and technology (group solutions teams).
   

  

**What you'll do** 
 :
   

  

* Lead and manage the IT function and its personnel to continuously drive value, operational excellence and efficiencies while ensuring proper IT communications and IT governance.
* Assume full budget responsibility for all IT activities in the region and ensure delivery on agreed financial targets.
* Be an active member of the Region Leadership Team as well as the global IT Leadership Team.
* Develop, maintain and enforce Group IT strategy, standards and procedures.
* Actively build cross-functional and cross-competence collaboration within and outside the direct area of control.
* Identify and drive opportunities for synergies and efficiencies across IT and the business Manage on/offshore third-party IT providers.
* Drive the regional AI agenda by identifying high‑value use cases, driving responsible implementation, and ensuring AI solutions are embedded into core business and IT processes to enhance productivity, decision‑making, and innovation.
* Collaborate with the Group Chief Information Security Officer on regional Cybersecurity topics, ensuring robust governance, risk management, and resilience across all technology environments. Oversee the implementation of Group security standards, regional threat monitoring, and continuous improvement of cybersecurity posture.
* Ensure proper IT planning in close cooperation with business stakeholders in the region. Partner with business leadership and other key stakeholders to define opportunities, identify and prioritize projects based on predefined criteria (return on investment, productivity, compliance, etc.).
* Facilitate and/or be a catalyst for successful implementation of large IT projects.
* Provide guidance and leadership in digital transformation and IoT initiatives
* Own the end‑to‑end technology strategy for CDI (PoM, D2C, C&A), defining architectural principles, long‑term roadmaps, and standards enabling scale, resilience, and speed.
* Drive cross‑functional alignment, ensuring consistent technology standards, prioritization, and execution across markets and regions.
* Be proactive in identifying operational issues and drive resolution.
* Direct personnel involved in the development and implementation of business applications and/or maintenance and support of the existing application portfolio.
* Develop people and capabilities in the IT organization to meet current and future needs. Coach and mentor line managers within IT.
* Review and approve project deliverables and functions in project Steering Groups.
* Direct activities to ensure work adheres to processes, procedures and standards.
* When required, manage projects in a professional and active manner, improving quality and reducing project risks.
* Manage IT risks by taking active steps to mitigate such risks in day-to-day IT service delivery.


**Who you are:**
* A dynamic, strategic, and proactive leader, able to shape the digital agenda and provide a bridge between IT and business to interpret and define strategy and drive execution to maximize business value.
* A leader who can bring experience in moving from legacy environments to cloud based digital solutions, and for driving projects where technologies such as IoT, analytics, automation, connected devices, online and mobile have been used to increase efficiency and create new functionality.
* A leader with exceptional skills in technology, innovation, technology adoption (change management), communication and people leadership.


**Qualifications & Requirements:**
* Proven record of business and people leadership in a multi-cultural and multi-disciplined environment
* Previous experience leading a large IT organization in a matrix model.
* Strong business acumen and broad working knowledge of business functions and processes (Sales, Manufacturing, Finance, Supply chain, etc.) and CX (Consumer Experiences).
* Broad experience across all facets of the IT discipline (Infrastructure, application development, commercial off-the-shelf software, project management, portfolio management, etc.) with deep experience in more than one area.
* Proven record of developing IT portfolio governance in close cooperation with business stakeholders.
* Previous experience managing Projects and /or support around enterprise level applications in a multi-functional user environment.
* Previous experience managing third party resources and services in an on/offshore model.
* Experience of identifying, structuring, and implementing IT solutions in a project environment.
* Ability to prepare and present material to all levels, including Senior Management.
* Able and willing to travel as required.


**Where you'll be:**
 This is a position based at our Global Headquarters in Stockholm (Sweden).
   

  

 We are proud of our culture of inclusivity and diversity. At our Global Headquarters we have 60+ nationalities working together for our common goals. You will be part of this dynamic international team where English is the natural language.
   

  

 We look forward to receiving your application!
   

  

 As part of Electrolux Group, we will continuously invest in you and your development. There are no barriers to where your career could take you.

title: IT-specialist med fokus på Infrastruktur
description:
**Anställningsform:** 
 tillsvidare/provanställning
 **| Tillträdesdag:** 
 efter överenskommelse
 **| Ansök senast:** 
 25 mars
   

  

 Vill du arbeta med modern IT-infrastruktur i en organisation där teknik, verksamhet och människor möts? Hos Spendrups får du en viktig roll i att säkerställa stabila och framtidssäkra IT-lösningar. Vi söker en kunnig och engagerad IT-specialist till vårt IT-team! Den idealiska kandidaten har en stark bakgrund inom Microsoft-baserade miljöer samt praktisk erfarenhet av VMware-virtualisering.
   

  

 Rollen innebär att underhålla och stödja IT-infrastrukturen, säkerställa systemens tillförlitlighet och bidra till pågående IT-projekt och förbättringar. Du arbetar nära verksamheten för att fånga upp behov och krav på IT-lösningar – samtidigt som du bidrar till att skydda våra system, nätverk och data mot cyberhot.
   

  

 Hos oss blir du en del av ett engagerat IT-team där samarbete, kunskapsdelning och förbättringsarbete är en naturlig del av vardagen. På Spendrups präglas kulturen av öppenhet och god stämning, och dina idéer värdesätts. Här får du inte bara lösa tekniska utmaningar – du får också möjlighet att aktivt bidra till att utveckla och förbättra våra IT-lösningar och arbetssätt.
   

  

**Arbetsuppgifter**
* Administrera och stödja Microsoft-baserade system, inklusive Windows Server, Active Directory, Exchange och Microsoft 365.
* Administrera och stödja Microsoft Azure miljö.
* Hantera och underhålla VMware vSphere-miljöer, inklusive ESXi-servrar, vCenter och virtuella maskiner.
* Övervaka systemprestanda, felsöka problem och säkerställa hög tillgänglighet för IT-tjänster.
* Implementera och underhålla backup- och katastrofåterställningslösningar.
* Ge teknisk support till slutanvändare och lösa hårdvaru-/mjukvaruproblem.
* Delta i planering och genomförande av uppgraderingar och migreringar av IT-infrastruktur.
* Dokumentera system, processer och rutiner.
* Säkerställa efterlevnad av IT-policyer, säkerhetsstandarder och bästa praxis.


**Vi söker dig med:**
* Erfarenhet av arbete i Microsoft-baserad IT-miljö.
* God kunskap om Windows Server, Active Directory, Group Policy och Microsoft 365.
* God kunskap om Azure Infrastruktur.
* Praktisk erfarenhet av VMware.
* Grundläggande erfarenhet kring storage och SAN lösningar.
* Grundläggande förståelse för nätverkskoncept (TCP/IP, DNS, DHCP, VPN).
* Utmärkta problemlösnings- och kommunikationsförmågor.


**Meriterande:**
* Certifieringar såsom MCSA, MCSE, VMware VCP eller liknande.
* Erfarenhet av PowerShell-skript och automatisering.
* Kunskap om backup-lösningar (t.ex. Veeam, Acronis).


 Tjänsten kan vara placerad på vårt huvudkontor på i Stockholm eller på vår produktionsenhet i Grängesberg. Stockholm- ska vara i grb ca en gång i måanden. I tjänsten rapporterar du till Head of IT Operations.
   

  

**Kontaktperson** 
 : Niklas Dahlgren, Operativ IT-chef, 08-58635306
   

  

**Din ansökan**
 För denna tjänst behöver vi inget personligt brev, du ansöker istället genom att svara på några korta urvalsfrågor och bifoga ditt CV. Om du uppfyller kraven kommer du även att få göra två urvalstester som skickas till din mejl.
   

  

*Slutkandidater kommer efter sitt godkännande att omfattas av en bakgrundskontroll.*
 Spendrups vision är att vara ett bryggeri i världsklass. Det innebär att vi stolt vill kunna jämföra oss med de bästa i världen i allt vi gör. Det gäller de produkter vi lanserar och de relationer vi bygger, hur vi agerar i nuet och hur vi satsar på sikt. Vår mission är att med kreativ kraft, långsiktigt ansvarstagande och passion skapa smakupplevelser och relationer i världsklass. Som medarbetare på Spendrups har du en viktig roll i vår gemensamma strävan mot världsklass och vi ser gärna att du identifierar dig själv med våra värderingar: Äkthet, Nyskapande och Handlingskraft.
   

  

**Välkommen in!**

title: Senior Infrastructure Domain Architect
description:
**Job Description**

 The Senior Infrastructure Domain Architect for the Global Infrastructure Unit is responsible for defining and governing the technical infrastructure that supports all sites across the H&M Group (stores, warehouses, offices, datacenters, cloud), digital commerce platforms, supply chain systems, and enterprise applications and operations. The role focuses on delivering a scalable, secure, and high-performing infrastructure environment that enables omnichannel retail experiences and operational efficiency.
   

  





 The Global Infrastructure Unit at H&M Group consists of approx. 60 people plus a large manage service delivery and spans across four delivery areas: Cloud & Datacenter, Site Tech, Network, and Digital Workplace.
   

  





  

  





**WHAT YOU’LL DO:**




**Architecture & Strategy:**



* Define and maintain the infrastructure architecture roadmap, principals, guidelines, and guardrails and ensure alignment with business strategy.
* Translate enterprise architecture future state vision and principles into concrete infrastructure designs and standards.
* Proactively and holistically lead architecture activities that guide development and management of infrastructure platforms and services.
* Drive the transformation of systems into hybrid or cloud-native platforms (e.g. Azure, AWS).
* Drive adoption of new technology and reuse existing technology for enabling capabilities and processes, information and technical solutions.
* Define reference architectures for third-party vendor solutions and ensure long-term fit into H&M’s architecture landscape.



**Operational excellence**



* Architect resilient infrastructure to support critical systems, including:
	+ E-commerce platforms
	+ Point-of-Sale (POS) systems
	+ Inventory and order management systems (OMS/WMS)
	+ CRM and loyalty platforms
* Design infrastructure to ensure minimal downtime and fast recovery across all sites and digital platforms.
* Lead capacity planning for high-volume retail periods.
* Analyze current technology environment to identify dependencies, detect critical deficiencies and proactively recommend solutions for improvement.
* Define and implement monitoring, logging, and disaster recovery strategies for all infrastructure components.
* Work closely with DevOps, security, and IT operations teams to streamline deployments and incident response.



**Collaboration & Governance:**



* Provide leadership and motivate teams to standardize and harmonize solutions, to lower the total cost of ownership, develop investment plans and reduce technical debt.
* Advice on and make architectural decisions needed to deliver targeted business outcomes.
* Establish and enforce infrastructure standards and governance for store rollouts, cloud deployments, and vendor integrations.
* Act as the primary infrastructure interface to Enterprise Architecture and business architecture teams.
* Mentor and coach architects and engineers in the teams, promoting their professional growth - confidently provide architectural leadership, guidance, and support for others.



  

  





**WHO YOU ARE:**



* Proven experience designing and governing large-scale, global infrastructure environments.
* Experience applying architecture frameworks, principles, standards, and reference architectures.
* Ability to perform architectural trade-off analysis across cost, risk, performance, and operability.
* Expertise in hybrid infrastructure environments (on-prem + cloud).
* Familiarity with retail-specific systems such as:
	+ POS platforms
	+ ERP/WMS integrations
	+ Mobile device management for store tablets and handhelds
* Experience with infrastructure systems across network and hosting.
* Strong understanding of cybersecurity in a retail environment (PCI compliance, secure payment processing).
* Ability to design high-availability and disaster recovery solutions for global retail operations.
* Proven experience in working strategically with third-party relationships, vendors and influencing their offerings and roadmaps.
* Excellent communication and leadership skills; able to present to both technical and non-technical audiences.
* Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Information Systems, or a related field.
* 15+ years of IT infrastructure experience with at least 5 years in a Domain Architect role (or equivalent).
* Proven experience in leading architecture teams. Formal leadership training is required.
* Experience in a retail or e-commerce environment is highly preferred.
* Hands-on knowledge of cloud infrastructure (Azure or AWS), hosting technologies, networking, and data center technologies.



 Preferred Certifications:
   

  




* Azure Solutions Architect Expert or GCP/AWS Certified Solutions Architect
* TOGAF or equivalent EA framework certification
* Cisco, VMware, or retail technology certifications



  

  

  

  




**Additional Information**

***Please note***
 : As our culture and teamwork are very important to us, four days (80%) per week of in-office presence in our office are required.
   

  





 This is a full-time position with placement in
 **Stockholm** 
 .
   

  





  

  





**WHO WE ARE:**
  

 Shaping the future of fashion with people, data, and tech. The fashion and retail industries are going through a transformation, driven by customers' technology and sustainability expectations. At H&M Group, we want to shape the future of fashion and lifestyle by harnessing the power of smart tech and data. With our 74-year history of innovation, we understand the need to collaborate and co-create with engineers and tech specialists around the world to achieve our vision.
   

  





  

  





**WHAT WE OFFER!** 
  

  

 You are joining a unique value-driven culture, a large tech network and community where you can be yourself. Besides the obvious perks such as staff discount card, flexible work life, learning communities, wellness benefits, parental benefits etc. There are endless opportunities to experiment and grow in any direction that you want, and when you grow, we grow. Being a major player gives us countless opportunities to make a real impact and shape the future.

title: Business Analyst at Trading Services | SEB, Stockholm
description:
Are you a technically strong Business Analyst passionate about Python and automation, ready to transform financial processes? Join Trading Services at SEB and turn complex business challenges into innovative technical opportunities that shape the future.
   

  

 At SEB, we recognise that the world of finance is evolving at an extraordinary speed. That’s why we’re committed to driving towards a more sustainable future for everyone — people, businesses, and society. Since we welcomed our first customer in 1856, we have been a catalyst for positive change by providing reliable advice and capital to people with ideas for the future. If you are ready to make your mark on our industry and positively shape the world, you will thrive at SEB
   

  

**About the role:**
 As a Business Analyst in Trading Services, you will be a key contributor to our intelligent automation journey, leveraging Python development in an agile environment. Your focus will be on transforming business challenges into technical opportunities, enhancing process efficiency and customer service. You’ll explore new technologies, apply secure development principles, and manage stakeholder expectations, providing actionable insights to boost operational efficiency. Join our global team of around 200 professionals accelerating the future of trading services.
   

  

**To thrive in this role, we believe you have:**
* Basic proficiency in Python and SQL, coupled with a passion for software development and evolving technical solutions.
* Demonstrated problem-solving and analytical skills, ideally with a Computer Science, Engineering degree, or equivalent work experience.
* A curious, self-driven, and collaborative mindset, eager to learn and grow, with excellent communication skills.
* Familiarity with Cloud/GCP development and data management
* Experience with Business Intelligence tools such as Power BI, Tableau, or Looker.


**What we offer:**
* Cross-functional team practicing modern software development
* Dedicated time and support for learning as part of everyday work
* Opportunity to work on complex systems that play a key role in the financial infrastructure


**Do you want to be part of SEB?**
 It is our fundamental belief that inclusion and diversity is crucial for our future success. We strive to have an inclusive, value-driven culture where employees feel valued, respected, and involved irrespective of who they are, what they believe or where they come from.
   

  

 Since we select candidates continuously, feel free to send in your application today via the link in this ad, but no later than
 **2026-03-27** 
 . If you have questions about the position, please contact Kaveh Rezania, kaveh.rezania@seb.se, note that we will not process applications via email.
   

  

 Please be aware that our final candidates undergo background checks, a process that includes for example identity control, verification of qualifications, credit checks, company engagements and history of crime. In some cases, we also apply random drug checks. During employment, employees within SEB can also expect to undergo recurring background checks.
   

  

 SEB Sweden has a redeployment responsibility, which means that this position might be covered by internal redeployment.
   

  

**Learn more about working at SEB** 
 on our Career website or through our Career podcasts.
   

  

*sebgroup.com/career*
*bit.ly/SEBcareer*

title: Founders Residency
description:
**Phareyes is a selective program for exceptional early careers who feel a real compulsion to build.** 




 Sometimes the hardest part is just starting.
 



 Most people this age are pushed toward the same path: internships, credentials, optionality, and the safe next step.
 



 That makes sense for most people.
 



 But not for everyone.
 



 Some people keep coming back to the same problem, question, or frustration. They are not mainly looking for another credential. They want to start real work.
 



**Phareyes is for that moment.** 




 You do 
 **not** 
  need a company already.
   

 You do 
 **not** 
  need a co-founder.
   

 You do 
 **not** 
  need a polished pitch deck.
   

 You do 
 **not** 
  need the whole path mapped out.
 



 What matters is whether there is something you cannot leave alone — and whether you are serious enough to begin making it real.
 



 This is for people who would rather begin important work than drift further into the default path.
 


 Who this is for
 
 This may be a fit if you:
 


* keep returning to a problem or question that will not leave you alone
* want to build, not just talk about building
* can tolerate uncertainty, difficulty, and long stretches without recognition
* are highly self-directed and do not need to be managed closely
* have real depth in something technical, scientific, product, commercial, or domain-specific
* care more about doing important work than looking impressive



 We are especially interested in exceptional builders early in their career, including students, dropouts, self-taught operators, researchers, and others on unconventional paths. A degree is not required.
 


 What you get
 
 Selected participants join a small, serious cohort with:
 


* a strong peer environment
* founder and problem refinement
* strategic review and honest feedback
* challenge, structure, and accountability
* thoughtful support around co-founder formation where relevant
* introductions and access where genuinely deserved



 For a small number of standout founders, Phareyes may also help unlock funding of up to 
 **$100,000** 
  if the work becomes investable.
 


 Apply
 
 Applications are reviewed on a rolling basis.
 



 This is a chance to step off the default path and start working on something that might actually matter.
 



**Apply now.**

title: Software Engineer
description:
**About Justera Group**
 Justera Group AB is a leading Swedish IT consulting firm with great experience specializing in building high-performing technology teams and delivering end-to-end IT solutions. Led by dynamic female executives, Justera Group focuses on helping businesses harness the power of digital technologies to continuously evolve in today’s rapidly changing economy. The company has deep expertise in IT consultancy, software development, and recruitment services, providing clients with purpose-driven, well-trained consultants who consistently deliver efficient and effective results. Justera Group manages the entire talent lifecycle, from hiring to ongoing management, ensuring the right fit for each project on time and within budget. With their strong commitment to quality, collaboration, and client success, Justera Group is a trusted partner for technology innovation across Sweden.
   

  

**About the Role:**
 We are looking for an experienced Backend Developer to support the development of backend systems related to post-purchase user journeys. The consultant will work closely with cross-functional teams to design, develop, and maintain scalable backend solutions that support customer-facing digital services. The role requires strong backend engineering expertise, experience with modern development practices, and the ability to work effectively in an Agile environment.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities:**
* Design, develop, and maintain backend services and APIs supporting post-purchase customer journeys.
* Develop scalable and reliable backend solutions using Kotlin and Java.
* Collaborate with product owners, developers, and other stakeholders within Agile teams.
* Implement and maintain automated tests to ensure system quality and reliability.
* Work with CI/CD pipelines to support efficient and continuous delivery.
* Contribute to cloud-native architecture and DevOps practices.
* Participate in troubleshooting, optimization, and continuous improvement of backend systems.


**Requirements:**
* Strong hands-on experience with Kotlin.
* Solid experience in Java backend development.
* Experience working with CI/CD tools (e.g., Jenkins, GitHub Actions, or similar).
* Experience with cloud-hosted environments, preferably Google Cloud Platform (GCP).
* Experience working in Agile development teams.
* Experience with GraphQL in Java-based environments.
* Strong knowledge of automated testing for backend systems.
* Familiarity with DevOps practices and modern development workflows.
* Understanding of cloud-native architecture.


**What We Offer:**
* A dynamic and innovative workplace, driving advancements in cutting-edge robotic technologies
* The opportunity to collaborate with talented cross-functional teams on meaningful and impactful projects
* Competitive compensation and a comprehensive benefits package
* A supportive culture that fosters continuous learning, growth, and professional development
* Flexible hybrid working model for an optimal work-life balance
* 25 days of annual leave to recharge and relax
* An annual wellness allowance of 3,500 SEK to support your health and wellbeing

title: Process Engineer
description:
**ALTEN is now looking for a Process Engineer** 




 Are you passionate about designing, optimizing, and improving manufacturing processes? Do you enjoy working in dynamic environments where technical expertise drives innovation? ALTEN is seeking a Process Engineer to join our team and contribute to exciting projects within process manufacturing.
 







**Your Role** 




 As a Process Engineer, you will be responsible for designing, developing, and optimizing manufacturing processes. Your main tasks will include:
 


* Designing and developing continuous and batch manufacturing processes, including equipment specifications and factory layouts.
* Commissioning and qualifying new facilities, ensuring compliance with regulatory standards.
* Modifying and optimizing existing equipment and processes to improve efficiency, quality, and safety.
* Using simulation software to develop and validate processes.
* Overseeing documentation to ensure compliance with GxP, GMP, and other industry standards.
* Monitoring equipment through testing, maintenance, and troubleshooting.
* Interpreting technical drawings (e.g., P&IDs, PFDs) to support process design.
* Conducting risk assessments for equipment and processes, including safety and environmental evaluations.
* Collaborating with cross-functional teams to plan and install new equipment.
* Collecting, interpreting, and reporting data to drive continuous improvement.







**Your Profile** 




 We are looking for candidates with:
 


* Experience in process engineering, preferably within chemical, biological, or pharmaceutical manufacturing.
* Knowledge of tech transfers, API manufacturing, or large-scale production processes.
* Familiarity with tools and systems such as DCS, P&ID, PID, FAT, SAT, and risk analysis methodologies.
* Experience with equipment like reactors, crystallizers, filter presses, or centrifuges.
* Understanding of regulatory requirements, including GxP, GMP, and Clean Utilities.
* Strong analytical skills for data interpretation and report writing.
* Ability to work in dynamic environments and drive projects forward.







**Meritorious** 
 :
 


* Experience with investment projects or process validation.
* Knowledge of 3D drawings or Enterprise Design Specifications (EDS).







**Why ALTEN?** 




 At ALTEN, you become part of a highly skilled team working on some of the most exciting projects in engineering and IT. We offer a culture where you can grow, challenge yourself, and make a real difference in projects that shape the future.
 







**About ALTEN** 




 ALTEN is one of Europe’s largest engineering and IT consulting firms, with over 60,000 employees in more than 30 countries. In Sweden, we are 1,300 consultants across 11 locations, supporting world-leading companies in Automotive, Telecom, Industry, Energy, Aerospace & Defense, and Life Science.
 







 For the third consecutive year, ALTEN has been named one of Sweden’s most attractive employers by Karriärföretagen 2024.
 







**Apply Now!** 




 We look forward to your application!

title: Head, Dmart Commercial
description:
foodora is part of the Delivery Hero Group, the world’s pioneering local delivery platform, our mission is to deliver an amazing experience—fast, easy, and to your door. We operate in over 70+ countries worldwide. Headquartered in Berlin, Germany. Delivery Hero has been listed on the Frankfurt Stock Exchange since 2017 and is part of the MDAX stock market index.
   

  

**Job Description**
 foodora market continues to grow, develop and expand at an extremely fast pace! We are breaking new ground for the entire grocery trade through our darkstores business. In our darkstores we store thousands of products to ensure that our customers can do their weekly shopping and get it delivered to their door in less than 30mins after placing their order. Cool huh? foodora market is a game changer and we hope you want to join our exciting journey!
   

  

**What You Will (but Not Only) Do**
* The scope of the role is broad and covers everything from highly strategic decisions to very hands-on tasks such as assortment workshops, negotiating with suppliers and wholesalers to doing the monthly performance materials.
* You are responsible for foodora markets customer offering which means: what meets the customer when opening the app.
* In more details. you (and your team) are responsible for conversion, site performance overall, assortment, price, campaigns, average basket value, items per order, price levels balanced with profitability measures, promotions such as samplings and all other non-margin revenues, and our external collaborations.
* P&L responsibility for Commercial revenues & costs.
* Leading our category management and pricing strategies
* Plan, host and develop our annual talk-of-the-town “Supplier Day”
* You have an essential role in our Management team, contributing to the overall strategic direction, day-to-day decisions and ensuring the commercial aspect in all decisions made
* Coach, lead, set and track developments for the Commercial team.
* Collaborate with internal stakeholders from other functions such as the operations -, logistics -, marketing -, product and finance team and take actions to drive the business forward
* Collaborate with Delivery Hero’s regional and central teams as well as sister companies across Europe. Answering up to the regional team on how we perform on the local KPI scorecards, and set & follow up on action plans to reach the targets


**Qualifications**
* You know the grocery retail business inside and out either from the supplier or retailer side, preferably also from an e-com and/or q-com perspective.
* You are used to leading in an environment where you need to balance the needs and expectations of multiple departments and stakeholders.
* You have a university degree within business or economics or a long experience of work that have given you similar experience
* You have 7+ years experience in a managing role with budget ownership & team leadership
* Familiarity with category management and strategies
* You have experience from collaboration and stakeholder management in an international context
* You have professional knowledge of excel/google sheets and powerpoint and are confident on stage.
* You communicate fluently in Swedish and English both verbally and in writing


**Additional Information**
* Wellness allowance topped with the opportunity to participate in many work/life balance initiatives at foodora such as free group training at Sats & reduced price on massage.
* Employee discount at foodora (woho!) and awesome Friday breakfasts!
* Occupational pension, incl. premium exemption insurance, accident insurance and life insurance.
* foodora Learning - Monthly learning sessions about different topics, such as the q-commerce industry, negotiation techniques and project management combined with a structured onboarding and inspiring courses within our learning tool Sana
* Great deals at Benify (for e.g. gym membership, e-bikes hotels, audiobooks, streaming services, clothes, kitchen supplies… and so much more!
* Awesome AW’s and (pink) parties!

title: Test and Learn Specialist (Marketing Analytics)
description:
**Job Description**

 As a Test & Learn Specialist, you will play a key role in driving data driven decisions across the H&M Global Marketing function, in the intersection of media, customer and loyalty strategies. You will work closely with the Test & Learn Lead to shape the global Test & Learn roadmap, ensuring the organisation understands the value generated by both strategic and tactical decisions. This role blends technical excellence with clear, concise communication. Driving decisions across media, customer, and loyalty strategies. You will work closely with the Test & Learn Lead and fellow Test & Learn Specialists to shape the global Test & Learn roadmap.
   

  

  

  





**WHAT YOU'LL DO**




 In this role, you will:
   

  




* Lead and execute experimentation processes end-to-end, from planning and design to analysis and communication of results. Guide stakeholders on statistical best practice, contribute to the Test & Learn agenda and enhance our measurement system with experimentation driven insights.
* Conduct robust experiments and analyses to evaluate strategic and tactical decisions, using SQL, Python, Google BigQuery, PowerBI and other tools to analyse data, run statistical tests, and assess business impact.
* Visualise and present insights effectively, delivering clear and accessible experiment results to both technical and non‑technical stakeholders inside and outside H&M.
* Participate in and contribute to the wider analytics community within H&M Global Marketing function, helping to expand shared knowledge, tools and capabilities.



**WHO YOU'LL BE WORKIN WITH**




 You will be part of the Measurement & Analytics team in the Global Marketing Function, working closely with the Test & Learn Lead and fellow Test & Learn Specialists, collaborating with teams across Media, Customer, Loyalty and the wider Marketing organisation.
   

  

  

  





**WHO YOU ARE**




*We are looking for people with…*
