title: SAP Program Manager
description:
Role – Program Manager
  
Technology – SAP S/4 Hana
  
Job Description
  
Are you an SAP program manager with a solid experience in running transformation projects and rollouts? Would you like to further expand the scale and canvas of what you have done so far? Then we have the right opportunity for you! We have very interesting ongoing and future S4 Hana transformation projects which would enable you to be part of a very exciting journey. We offer you not only a learning environment with modern “on-demand” learning methods in which you can deepen your knowledge, but you will get to apply those learnings in real-time. As program anchors, you will participate in an end-to-end journey which includes the following activities:
  
* Generating leads from your key customers,
* Building roadmaps for S4 transformation for your customers
* Identifying opportunities for digitization leveraging AI, Blockchain, IoT and other levers
* Organizing assessments, due diligences, transformation workshops
* Establishing business case for the transformation initiatives
* Establishing methods, cooperation models, new ways of working (e.g. Agile)
* Driving engagement directly with the business on the customer side
* Driving Customer Satisfaction Index and managing expectations with the customer stakeholders to ensure a consistent top rank for Infosys
* Realizing business blueprints, Proof of Concepts, transformation plans, change management and learning plans
* Creating long term cost indications for securing budgets across implementation, deployments and AMS, orchestrating the creation program SOWs and creating a culture of on budget delivery
* Creating clear scope and commercial baselines, identify change request possibilities and driving customer alignments for additional revenue compensation and without any effort overruns
* Ensuring project profitability as per organisational and service line guidelines while maintaining a balance with delivery quality and timeliness
* Delivering S4 Hana minimum viable products, templates, complete products and /pilots
* Getting buy-ins and acceptance from the business on your delivered products
* Defining rollout strategies leveraging industrialization and fit for purpose tooling especially data transition
* Building strategic relationship with partners and product organizations like SAP, Microsoft etc. in delivering joint synergy and value to your customers
* Becoming One-Infosys face to your customer by managing services belonging to multiple Infosys internal service lines


You will be supported in your endeavor by an A Team comprising of handpicked experts and leaders from the globally available Infosys talent pool. As a true leader of the team, you will be responsible for the career aspirations, performance management and training needs of the people who will work in your teams. Your team will expect you to be a hands on manager, completely approachable for them to understand their constraints and concerns and ready to act as a facilitator to remove the hurdles and impel them towards a higher level of performance.
  
As the one face to the customer, you will take along various service lines, giving guidance to the relevant delivery heads on the staffing needs, commercials, availabilities and the interests of the service lines even as you try to build synergies amongst them to craft efficient, lean and quality solutions for your customers.
  
  

Knowledge / Skills required
  
  

* Experience in managing large multiple projects, each project with multiple tracks
* Experience with large scale SAP projects and accompanying knowledge in implementation and rollout programs
* Previous experience with managing multi-locational teams including offshore and near shore teams
* Fluent written and spoken English


Preferred skills
  
* 8-10 successful SAP full cycle implementations as program manager for on-site and offshore Teams.
* Experience in working with location business managers as well as in-depth knowledge of business processes, roadmap definitions, fit-gap analysis and change management.
* Experience in the areas of the discrete manufacturing industry and /or automotive and /or chemicals.
* Natural talent in the art of people management including team building and driving grounds-up innovation.
* Experience in the area of proposal management, pre-sales and driving a sales pitch.
* Good analytical and logical problem-solving skills combined with the talent to quickly grasp new tasks.
* Excellent communication and documentation skills.
* Knowledge /certification of S4 Hana and Scrum Master /Agile Coach can be additional benefits that you bring with you.
* PMP or comparable certification.


About us
  
Infosys is a global market leader in business consulting and technology solutions, which has been named Europe's and Germany's Top Employer 2025. As a renowned partner of future-oriented companies, Infosys supports customers in more than 70 countries to always be one step ahead of the competition and innovation trends. Placed in the top group on the Forbes list of 100 most innovative companies, Infosys has 340,000 employees and annual sales of around $ 16 billion. With strategy consulting and the joint development of groundbreaking solutions in technology areas such as mobility, sustainability, big data and cloud computing, Infosys helps companies to grow in a constantly changing world. Infosys is one of the most successful growing companies in the consulting and IT sector in Germany.
  
  

All aspects of employment at Infosys are based on merit, competence and performance. We are committed to embracing diversity and creating an inclusive environment for all employees. Infosys is proud to be an equal opportunity employer.

title: Graphic Communicator
description:
**Assignment description:**  

As a Graphic Communicator with our client you will transform strategic messages into clear, engaging, and visually compelling communication. The role blends creativity, brand understanding, and communication skill to ensure information is accessible, aligned with brand identity, and impactful across various channels mainly print and digital.
  
  

**Key Responsibilities:****Visual Communication & Design:**  

**Develop high quality visual assets:** packaging, icons, illustrations, infographics, layouts, templates that support clear communication.
  
  

Translate complex information into simple, intuitive visual formats that improve understanding and user experience.
  
  

Ensure all deliverables adhere to brand identity, tonality, and guidelines.
  
  

Be accustomed to repetitive tasks.
  
  

**Content Collaboration:**  

Partner with communication specialists, or operational stakeholders to clarify key messages and define the best visual approach.
  
  

Contribute creative input to development, communication.
  
  

**Production & Delivery:**  

Produce ready to use communication materials for print, or digital platforms depending on needs.
  
  

Prepare files, mockups, and prototypes with attention to technical accuracy (layouts, pixel perfect graphics, colour profiles, and formats).
  
  

Manage multiple tasks simultaneously and deliver within timelines.
  
  

**Brand Experience & Quality:**  

Champion visual consistency across channels and teams by guiding others in using templates, graphic standards, and communication principles.
  
  

Evaluate the visual impact of communication materials and suggest improvements where needed.
  
  

Maintain awareness of design trends, user experience best practices, and accessibility standards.
  
  

Competencies & Skills
  
  

**Core Skills:**  

Graphic design, layout, and composition
  
  

Typography and iconography
  
  

Visual hierarchy and information design
  
  

Basic motion graphics or animation (optional but valuable)
  
  

Knowledge of accessibility principles
  
  

**Technical Skills:**  

Proficiency with Adobe Creative Cloud (Illustrator, InDesign)
  
  

Understanding of print production processes and specifications
  
  

About the assignment
  
For this assignment you will be hired as a full-time consultant by Digitalenta. We offer our consultants a generous package including healthcare allowance, insurance policy, paid vacation days and pension savings. In addition, you'll also have a dedicated consultant manager available throughout your employment with us, in addition to optional networking activities with our network of consultants.
  
The assignment is full-time and is expected to start as soon as possible until 2026-06-30 with chance for extension.

title: Business Analyst at Trading Services | SEB, Stockholm
description:
Are you a technically strong Business Analyst passionate about Python and automation, ready to transform financial processes? Join Trading Services at SEB and turn complex business challenges into innovative technical opportunities that shape the future.



At SEB, we recognise that the world of finance is evolving at an extraordinary speed. That’s why we’re committed to driving towards a more sustainable future for everyone — people, businesses, and society. Since we welcomed our first customer in 1856, we have been a catalyst for positive change by providing reliable advice and capital to people with ideas for the future. If you are ready to make your mark on our industry and positively shape the world, you will thrive at SEB


**About the role:**



As a Business Analyst in Trading Services, you will be a key contributor to our intelligent automation journey, leveraging Python development in an agile environment. Your focus will be on transforming business challenges into technical opportunities, enhancing process efficiency and customer service. You’ll explore new technologies, apply secure development principles, and manage stakeholder expectations, providing actionable insights to boost operational efficiency. Join our global team of around 200 professionals accelerating the future of trading services.

  


**To thrive in this role, we believe you have:**


* Basic proficiency in Python and SQL, coupled with a passion for software development and evolving technical solutions.
* Demonstrated problem-solving and analytical skills, ideally with a Computer Science, Engineering degree, or equivalent work experience.
* A curious, self-driven, and collaborative mindset, eager to learn and grow, with excellent communication skills.
* Familiarity with Cloud/GCP development and data management
* Experience with Business Intelligence tools such as Power BI, Tableau, or Looker.

  




**What we offer:**


* Cross-functional team practicing modern software development
* Dedicated time and support for learning as part of everyday work
* Opportunity to work on complex systems that play a key role in the financial infrastructure

  


**Do you want to be part of SEB?**



It is our fundamental belief that inclusion and diversity is crucial for our future success. We strive to have an inclusive, value-driven culture where employees feel valued, respected, and involved irrespective of who they are, what they believe or where they come from.



Since we select candidates continuously, feel free to send in your application today via the link in this ad, but no later than **2026-03-27**. If you have questions about the position, please contact Kaveh Rezania, kaveh.rezania@seb.se, note that we will not process applications via email.



Please be aware that our final candidates undergo background checks, a process that includes for example identity control, verification of qualifications, credit checks, company engagements and history of crime. In some cases, we also apply random drug checks. During employment, employees within SEB can also expect to undergo recurring background checks.



SEB Sweden has a redeployment responsibility, which means that this position might be covered by internal redeployment.


**Learn more about working at SEB** on our Career website or through our Career podcasts.


*sebgroup.com/career*

title: SAP Basis – System Administrator
description:
March 13, 2026
Full Time/Remote
Europe, Sweden
Posted 9 hours ago
We are hiring **SAP Basis – System Administrator**for the position based in **Solna (Stockholm) or Remote**.


**Educational Qualification:** Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, or related field, or equivalent professional experience.


**Job Summary:**



We are now looking for an **SAP Basis Administrator** to take responsibility for the configuration, monitoring, tuning, and troubleshooting of the technology stack like SAP application and underlying database. This includes to plan and manage assigned technical projects and/or upgrades including the co-ordination of other resources required to complete these tasks; Secures operation and setup of SAP landscapes; SAP Basis and database work-load analysis & performance tuning; work together with integration teams to connect surrounding systems based on actual security standards; Maintain and setup of SAP High-Availability solutions; Database Administration (Oracle, HANA).


**Key Expectations :**


* **SAP S/4HANA Expertise:** We expect proficiency in S/4HANA greenfield implementations, system conversions, and upgrades. Beyond just technical tasks, you should be able to provide best-practice guidance and strategic recommendations for these projects.
* **SAP BTP IS Skills:** Proven experience with SAP BTP IS is essential (4-6 years). This includes experience in working with BTP Integration suite and maintaining integrations towards the backend SAP system
* **SAP BTP Skills:** Experience with the SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP) is essential. This includes knowing how to integrate BTP with on-premise and cloud systems and effectively manage its various services to innovate and extend our existing SAP landscape.
* **Proactive System Maintenance:** You should be a master of core BASIS maintenance tasks like applying support packs and kernel upgrades. More importantly, we expect you to anticipate issues, optimize system performance, and ensure stability before problems arise.
* **Problem-Solving and Innovation:** We need someone who can go beyond routine tasks to troubleshoot complex technical issues and propose creative, efficient solutions. You should be forward-thinking and ready to help us leverage new technologies to enhance our SAP environment.


**Required Experience/Competences:**


* **Technical knowledge:** In-depth knowledge of the installation, configuration and maintenance of SAP systems.
* **Database management:** Experience in working with databases such as Oracle, SQL Server or HANA2.
* **Network skills:** Understanding network protocols and services to support SAP system integration.
* **Troubleshooting:** Ability to identify and resolve technical issues.
* **Security Management:** Knowledge of implementing and managing security policies and procedures.
* **Project management:** Experience in planning and executing projects, often in collaboration with other IT teams.
* **Communication skills:** Good communication skills to interact effectively with customers and team members.
* **Analytical skills:** Strong analytical thinking to optimize and improve systems.


**Soft Skills:**


* Strong analytical and troubleshooting skills.
* Strong communication and documentation skills.
* Detail-oriented with a structured problem-solving approach.
* Ability to work in onsite engineering environments and testing facilities.

  



### **Job Features**

The assignment involves designing, developing and maintaining modern cloud-based backend services, with a strong focus on performance, reliability and scalability. The systems are built using serverless architectures and event-driven patterns, enabling efficient and flexible solutions in a cloud-native environment.

* Implementing scalable and reliable solutions using Python
* Designing and building services that support data-driven and event-based architectures. Good to have Experience in building microservices in cloud environments
* Working with AWS storage and database services to support application functionality
* Troubleshooting, optimizing and enhancing backend systems to ensure high availability and performance
* Contributing to CI/CD automation and improving deployment workflows

  

Your Profile  

* Strong experience in Python backend development
* Experience building scalable backend systems in cloud environments
* Hands-on experience working with AWS databases and storage solutions and relational databases (PostgreSQL or SQL)
* Experience using Git for version control. Experience with CI/CD pipelines, preferably GitLab CI/CD

* Solid experience with AWS Serverless technologies, including:


AWS Lambda, AWS Step Functions, CloudWatch, API Gateway, S3, DynamoDB, Event Bridge, SNS / SQS  

  

What we believe you will enjoy about working here

Application

title: Cloud Architect
description:
* Permanent
* Experienced Professionals
* Cloud Infrastructure Management
* ID 353532-en\_US

Choosing Capgemini means choosing a company where you will be empowered to shape your career in the way you’d like, where you’ll be supported and inspired by a collaborative community of colleagues around the world, and where you’ll be able to reimagine what’s possible. Join us and help the world’s leading organizations unlock the value of technology and build a more sustainable, more inclusive world.


YOUR ROLE  

Due to strong growth and increasing demand from our customers, we are now looking for a skilled Cloud Architect to join our team in Sweden.


You will be part of Capgemini’s Cloud & Infrastructure Services (CIS) unit, focusing on project and consulting services in the Nordics. Our goal is to offer customers comprehensive cloud solutions with industry-specific expertise, advanced cloud technology, and global resources. We offer a variety of services to our customers, from strategic advice to project implementation.


You will help customers optimize their use of cloud resources as part of a balanced IT delivery portfolio. You will be engaged in various cloud commitments and customer projects covering the entire lifecycle, from proposal/justification to project design and implementation.


As a Cloud Architect, you will:  

* Design and implement scalable, secure, and cost-effective cloud architectures that meet business needs
* Evaluate cloud technologies and services to recommend best practices and solutions to optimize performance, reliability, and scalability
* Design and deploy cloud infrastructure using leading platforms such as AWS, Azure, and/or GCP
* Develop and maintain documentation, diagrams, and guidelines for cloud architecture
* Provide technical leadership and mentorship to junior team members, fostering a culture of continuous learning and growth
* Work closely with customers, partners, and other business units to develop and implement innovative and competitive solutions/projects for new and existing customers by leveraging your previous experience in implementing cloud solutions

  

YOUR PROFILE  

* Experience in producing highly available cloud infrastructure solutions for large organizations
* Solid knowledge of the features and capabilities of AWS, Azure, and/or GCP
* Good understanding of cloud-native architectures, microservices, containerization, and serverless computing
* Proficiency in Infrastructure as Code (IaC) tools such as Terraform or CloudFormation
* Experience in creating greenfield solutions and implementing landing zones according to best practices
* Experience in quickly assessing technical feasibility and developing proposals for migrating workloads to AWS, Azure, and/or GCP
* Knowledge of financial operations (FinOps) practices and tools for optimizing and managing cloud costs
* Certifications such as AWS Certified Solutions Architect, Microsoft Certified: Azure Solutions Architect Expert, or Google Professional Cloud Architect are advantageous
* Understanding of hybrid cloud solutions and experience in integrating public cloud into traditional hosting/delivery models
* Full working proficiency in Swedish and English, both spoken and written

What we believe you will enjoy about working here

* A vibrant environment where you can grow through continuous learning and professional certifications, collaborate with a global network of experts, and stay at the forefront of the latest technologies
* The freedom to make decisions, manage your time, and work independently - fostering creativity, innovation, and job satisfaction
* An extensive benefits package, including parental benefits, occupational and flex pension, private insurance, preventive healthcare, and more
* A variety of social and wellness activities, from sports and health programs to cultural events and art initiatives, designed to bring employees together and enrich work life

*As part of our recruitment process, identity verification will be conducted through inspection of your ID card, and background checks may be carried out as required.*

Bli en del av oss och hjälp världsledande organisationer att frigöra teknikens värde och bygga en mer hållbar och inkluderande framtid!


Din Roll
  

Som teamledande konsult får du en central roll där du kombinerar ledarskap med konsultarbete. Du inspirerar och stöttar ditt team i vardagen, samtidigt som du själv är aktiv i kunduppdrag som senior konsult. Rollen är dynamisk och varierad – cirka 25 % handlar om att leda och utveckla teamet, medan 75 % är konsultarbete i spännande projekt hos våra kunder.
  

  

Du ansvarar för att sätta riktningen för teamets utveckling, driva affärsutveckling och bidra till tillväxt. Rekrytering och kompetensutveckling är en naturlig del av din vardag, liksom att skapa en kultur där människor trivs och växer. Du kommer att arbeta nära försäljnings- och leveransteam, andra teamchefer och vår ledningsgrupp för att säkerställa att vi levererar högsta värde till våra kunder.
  

  

Teamet du blir en del av består av 19 personer, varav du har ett direkt ledaransvar för 10. Det är ett socialt och sammansvetsat team som trivs med att arbeta på plats och har en stark gemenskap. Majoriteten sitter i Växjö, men några är utspridda i södra Sverige, vilket gör att du får en spännande mix av lokal närvaro och regionalt samarbete.
  

  

Rollen kräver närvaro på kontoret i Växjö minst tre dagar i veckan och innebär daglig kommunikation med både interna och externa intressenter. Kort sagt – du blir en drivande kraft i både teamets och verksamhetens utveckling.
  

  

*I den här rollen kommer du att ha en nyckelroll i att:*  

  



* Leda och utveckla teamet med ansvar för personalledning inklusive löpande utvecklingssamtal, teamets beläggning, lönsamhet, budget och prognoser.
* Samarbeta nära försäljnings- och leveransteam för att skapa framgångsrika strategier och säkerställa att vi levererar rätt kompetens och värde till våra kunder.

Driva teamets prestation och tillväxt genom kompetensutveckling, effektiv resursplanering och rekrytering av framtida talanger tillsammans med Talent Acquisition-teamet.  
* 

  

Din profil


* Erfarenhet av konsultbranschen och vana att arbeta i kunduppdrag
* Minst 6 års erfarenhet inom IT samt god förståelse för mjukvaruutveckling, cloud-tekniker och AI
* Flytande svenska och engelska i tal och skrift

Ledarskapserfarenhet, gärna med personalansvar  
* 

  

*Vi söker dig som är kommunikativ, samarbetsorienterad och har ett positivt, lösningsorienterat mindset. Du tar initiativ, är affärsmässig och trivs med att skapa teamkänsla och bygga goda relationer med både kunder och kollegor.*

  

Vad vi tror kommer få dig att trivas  

  



* En stark gemenskap och kultur - Du blir en del av ett socialt och sammansvetsat team med hög energi och nära samarbete, samtidigt som du får ta del av Capgeminis inkluderande kultur som värdesätter mångfald och samarbete.
* Stort inflytande och utvecklingsmöjligheter – Du får stort inflytande över teamets utveckling och möjlighet att växa i din ledarroll, oavsett om du är en erfaren ledare eller vill ta nästa steg. Hos Capgemini har du stöd av vårt globala nätverk, utbildningar och karriärvägar som hjälper dig att utvecklas både som ledare och konsult.

En dynamisk och varierad vardag – Du kombinerar strategiskt ledarskap med spännande kunduppdrag i ett företag som satsar på innovation och framtidens teknologier.  
* 

#LI-JK1


Ansökan


*Efter att du skickat in din ansökan gör vi en första urvalsbedömning. De kandidater som går vidare kontaktas för en telefonintervju där vi får möjlighet att lära känna dig och berätta mer om tjänsten. Därefter följer en intervju på plats där vi går djupare in på din kompetens och ger dig en chans att träffa oss och ställa frågor. Nästa steg är en case-intervju. Som avslutning genomförs relevanta tester och referenstagning innan vi går vidare till ett eventuellt erbjudande.*  

  

*Vi värdesätter din tid och ser till att du får tydlig kommunikation och snabb återkoppling genom hela processen – vårt mål är att skapa en positiv upplevelse där du får en rättvis bild av både rollen och oss som arbetsgivare.*

title: Director/Senior Director, Consumer, Products & Retail
description:
* Permanent
* Executives
* Strategy & Transformation
* ID 417133-en\_US

The Strategy and Transformation consultant supports Capgemini clients to innovate and develop new strategies, services and products. He/she designs and implements new business and operating models and brings to life the organizations of the future. He/she develops customer insights, organizational knowledge and market perspectives.


Your Role


At Capgemini Invent, we help our clients imagine and build what's next. As the innovation and transformation powerhouse of the Capgemini Group, we combine strategy, technology, data science, and creative design to solve the most complex business and technology challenges.


This role offers a unique opportunity to own, lead, and expand a strategic client relationship within the Consumer, Product & Retail sector. You will act as a trusted advisor, guiding the client through transformation initiatives tailored to their specific market challenges. Your responsibility includes understanding their priorities, designing solutions that leverage Capgemini Group’s global strengths, and deepening the partnership to deliver tangible business value and measurable outcomes. The role is fully dedicated to this one prioritized account, which is one of the most important within the CPR portfolio, making it both highly visible and strategically significant.  

Your responsibilities will include:  

Own & Grow Strategic Client Relationships  

* Serve as a trusted advisor to senior executives for this dedicated account, challenging and guiding their strategic direction.
* Develop a deep understanding of client’s priorities and leverage Capgemini’s global capabilities to shape relevant, value-driving solutions.


Drive Commercial Growth  

* Lead business development initiatives within this account, from identifying new opportunities to shaping proposals and closing strategic deals.
* Expand and grow this key account, building long-term partnerships centered on measurable business outcomes.


Shape & Deliver Tailored Transformations  

* Design and oversee transformation programs across digital, commercial, operational, and sustainability domains.
* Collaborate with multidisciplinary experts across the Capgemini Group to bring integrated, innovative solutions.


Lead with Vision  

* Bring thought leadership on consumer trends, retail disruption, sustainability, digital commerce, data-driven operations, and AI-enabled growth.
* Represent Capgemini Invent in the CPR market through executive engagements, events, and industry forums.


Cultivate High-Performing Teams  

* Lead, mentor, and develop consultants at all levels.
* Foster an inclusive, collaborative, and innovative culture across the Invent community.

Your Profile


Your Profile  

You are a seasoned professional with a strong track record in the Consumer Products or Retail sector, ideally in consulting, transformation leadership, or executive roles. You bring:  

* Extensive CPR industry experience, with deep insight into market trends, digital developments, and operational or commercial levers.
* Strong commercial drive, with demonstrable success in business development, client account ownership, and sustained growth.
* Executive presence and communication skills, with the ability to influence senior stakeholders and build trusted relationships at C level.
* Proven leadership in delivering complex transformations, ranging from digital and data driven change to operating model redesign or sustainability initiatives.
* A strong academic foundation, ideally at Master’s level within business, engineering, economics, or a related field.
* Fluency in Swedish and English, both written and spoken.

What You'll Love About Working Here


What You’ll Love About Working Here  

Joining Capgemini Invent means becoming part of a vibrant, global community of innovators who are shaping the future of consumer-focused industries. As a Director/Senior Director, you will benefit from:  

* Impactful Work: Lead transformation for one of the most influential consumer brand in the Nordics and globally.
* Innovation at Scale: Work with cutting-edge capabilities across digital commerce, AI, data platforms, sustainability solutions, and next-gen retail technologies.
* Accelerated Career Growth: Access world-class training, leadership development, mentorship, and global opportunities to shape your path.
* Collaborative Culture: Thrive in a diverse, inclusive team that values bold ideas, creativity, and authenticity.
* Purpose-Driven Projects: Help build consumer ecosystems that are more sustainable, customer-centric, and prepared for the future.

Need to know
  

Location:  

In line with our trust-based culture, Capgemini Invent offers a hybrid working model, and for this role you will be based in our attractively located office in Malmö, with readiness to travel to our clients’ sites when needed.


As part of our recruitment process, identity verification will be conducted through inspection of your ID card, and background checks may be carried out as required.


Sounds like the next step in your career? We review applications on an ongoing basis and encourage you to apply as soon as possible! Please submit your application and CV in English.


About Capgemini




Capgemini is a global business and technology transformation partner, helping organizations to accelerate their dual transition to a digital and sustainable world, while creating tangible impact for enterprises and society. It is a responsible and diverse group of 340,000 team members in more than 50 countries. With its strong over 55-year heritage, Capgemini is trusted by its clients to unlock the value of technology to address the entire breadth of their business needs. It delivers end-to-end services and solutions leveraging strengths from strategy and design to engineering, all fueled by its market leading capabilities in AI, cloud and data, combined with its deep industry expertise and partner ecosystem. The Group reported 2024 global revenues of €22.1 billion.

I rollen blir du en nyckelperson som förvandlar idéer till verklighet. Du kommer att leda strategiska initiativ på nordisk nivå, inspirera kunder och agera som deras trusted advisor, delta i molnkonferenser, bidra i pre-sales och nätverka med våra partners Amazon, Microsoft och Google.  

  

Vi erbjuder karriärmöjligheter i världsklass, projekt inom exempelvis självkörande bilar, livräddande robotar, autonoma system och framtidens AI-lösningar. Du blir en del av ett engagerat team som värdesätter innovation och samarbete – med månatliga aktiviteter och en kultur där vi har kul tillsammans. Vi letar efter fler kollegor som vill hänga med på vår AWS-resa till vårt kontor i Stockholm.
  

  

Vi arbetar med tekniker som AWS Bedrock, Amazon Q, AWS Quick Suite, AWS Lambda, AWS Control Tower och programmeringsspråk som Java, Python, Node, React, Angular, TypeScript, Kafka, Golang, Kotlin, Terraform och Ansible.  

  

  



  

*I den här rollen kommer du att ha en nyckelroll i:*


* Driva strategi och initiativ inom cloud på nordisk nivå.
* Hjälpa våra kunder med molnarkitektur och cloud native lösningar.

Använda dig utav generativ och agentisk AI.  
* 

Din profil

* Minst 6 års erfarenhet av molntjänster som AWS eller GCP.
* Kunskap i ett eller flera programmeringsspråk, t.ex. Python, Java, Kotlin, Golang eller Node.
* Erfarenhet som molnarkitekt eller av att leda molntransformationer.
* Intresse för DevSecOps, generativ AI, agentisk AI och cloud-native lösningar.
* Mycket goda kunskaper i AWS services.
* Flytande svenska och engelska kunskaper, i både tal och skrift.
  

Vad vi tror kommer få dig att trivas


* Arbeta med de senaste teknologierna och påverka på nordisk nivå. Du samarbetar med andra specialister, kompetensväxlar och bidrar till att bygga AWS-kapabilitet i Norden – samtidigt som du påverkar några av världens största bolag.
* Utvecklas genom utbildningar, certifieringar och interna initiativ- Du får tillgång till utbildningar och certifieringar inom AI och AWS samt möjlighet att engagera dig i Capgeminis fokusområden som Diversity & Inclusion, Sustainability, Wellness Club och Art Club.
* Njut av en engagerande arbetsplats med starkt stöd och förmåner. Vi erbjuder friskvårdsbidrag, tjänstepension, bonusprogram, företagshälsovård och sjukvårdsförsäkring – samt en inkluderande kontorskultur med sociala aktiviteter och teambuilding.

  

Ansökan  

Redo att ta din karriär till nästa nivå? Ansök nu och bli en del av Capgemini Sveriges innovativa AWS-team! Ansök redan idag – vi hanterar ansökningarna löpande. Under processen får du chansen att kika in på vårt kontor, prata med vår rekryterande chef och självklart ställa alla dina nyfikna frågor till vår rekryterare. Varmt välkommen in med din ansökan!

  



*Som en del av vår rekryteringsprocess kommer identitetskontroll att genomföras genom granskning av ditt ID-kort, och bakgrundskontroller kan utföras vid behov.*  

  

Till denna roll söker vi medarbetare för säkerhetsklassat uppdrag placerad hos kund.
  

  

Hos våra kunder arbetar vi i leveranser som kan ha bland annat #AWS, #GCP, #Google, Azure, AliCloud, Java, Go/Golang, Python, Kotlin, Node, HTML, TypeScript, JavaScript, CSS, Java, CloudFormation, Terraform, Docker, Kafka, React, Angular, Vue, Bash, Spring, GenAI, GraphQL, Backstage, Kubernetes, LLM, RAG, Copilot, GitHub Actions, SonarQube, BlackDuck, Apache Beam, Kong, Jenkins, Apigee, OpenShift, Ansible, DevSecOps, cloud architecture, cloud assessments, integration, Snowflake, Elastic Search, Grafana, Kibana, Splunk, Databricks, HelmChart, CloudFoundry.'

title: System Engineer
description:
* Permanent
* Experienced Professionals
* Products & Systems Engineering
* ID 367508-en\_US

At Capgemini Engineering, the world leader in engineering services, we bring together a global team of engineers, scientists, and architects to help the world’s most innovative companies unleash their potential. From autonomous cars to life-saving robots, our digital and software technology experts think outside the box as they provide unique R&D and engineering services across all industries. Join us for a career full of opportunities. Where you can make a difference. Where no two days are the same.


Your role  

We are looking for an engineer for complex and advanced system design. You will use your expertise and technical knowledges to help our clients to develop, systemize, integrate, verify, and launch new systems. In this position you will collaborate with many different stakeholders and teams.  

*In this role you will play a key role in:*  

* An agile team with vast competence in function design, systemization, function realization and integration, requirements management and decomposition as well as function Verification and Validation (V&V) in both virtual physical test environments.
* The collaboration with colleagues from different teams, who all share the same passion for their work.

Your profile  

* Minimum 4+ years of work experience in relevant domain
* The ability to understand and apply architectural principles to SW system design
* Understands and applies UML to represent the SW system design
* Safety thinking and experience in applying safety requirements during the SW system design process
* Experience in SE-Tool or System Weaver
* Awareness about the ISO26262 functional safety, and the R155 cyber security processes

What we believe you will enjoy about working here
  

* We recognize the significance of flexible work arrangements to provide support. Be it remote work, or flexible work hours, you will get an environment to maintain healthy work life balance.
* At the heart of our mission is your career growth. Our array of career growth programs and diverse professions are crafted to support you in exploring a world of opportunities.
* We support your personal development and offer an education library with more than 250 000 (!) courses and educations and certifications.

Application  

As part of our recruitment process, identity verification or background checks may occasionally be conducted.


Valid work permit for Sweden is required.

title: Management Consultant (Graduate)- Digital Trust & Cyber Security
description:
* Permanent
* Students/Graduates
* Strategy & Transformation
* ID 436596-en\_US

YOUR ROLE


Ready to launch your career and work hands-on with innovative digital solutions and future-proof business models? Capgemini Invent is seeking inventive and driven graduates and young professionals to join our Digital Trust and Cyber Security team in Stockholm and Gothenburg.




At Capgemini Invent, we believe difference drives change. As inventive transformation consultants, we blend our strategic, creative and scientific capabilities, collaborating closely with clients to deliver cutting-edge solutions. Join us to drive transformation tailored to our client's challenges of today and tomorrow. Informed and validated by science and data. Superpowered by creativity and design. All underpinned by technology created with purpose.




We’re on a mission to continue building Sweden’s leading Digital Trust & Cyber Security management consulting team. With significant market opportunities ahead and the backing of our global capabilities, we’re bringing together a team of entrepreneurial thinkers ready to elevate information and cyber security to the next level. As a consultant, you’ll work in multidisciplinary teams alongside leading organizations to solve real business challenges. You’ll contribute to projects across industries and functions- shaping strategies, designing new business models, and implementing solutions that drive measurable impact and long-term value.




In this role you will play a key role in:

* Design, develop, and implement cutting-edge cyber and data protection strategies and cybersecurity operating models.
* Develop robust governance, risk, and compliance frameworks, incorporating both traditional and innovative approaches.
* Guide clients through business resilience transformations, ensuring they are prepared for any crisis or disruption.
* Conduct performance improvement assessments and benchmarking clients' security posture against national and international
YOUR PROFILE

* Educational background: You hold a master’s degree with strong academic results in fields such as Cyber Security, Business, Engineering or IT. Ideally, you combine this with real-life experience.
* Recent graduate: You are graduating in 2026 or have recently graduated, with 0–2 years of relevant work experience since completing your degree.
* Language skills: You have excellent communication skills in both Swedish and English.
* Skills and mindset: You’re curious, analytical, and thrive in fast-paced environments. You enjoy solving complex challenges and are eager to learn and grow- both independently and as part of a team.
* Additional merits: International and professional experiences, as well as involvement in extracurricular activities, are considered valuable assets. Relevant certifications (ISO 2700x, CISM, CISA, CISSP) are advantageous. Swedish citizenship is required.
WHAT YOU’LL LOVE ABOUT WORKING HERE?

* Diverse environment: Collaborative with market-leading clients and experienced consultants within Sweden, Denmark, Finland & globally.
* Career development: Experience a well-defined career path with support to develop into a successful consultant, including training and mentoring programs.
* Collaborative culture: Benefit from our supportive teams, knowledge sharing, and comprehensive end-to-end capabilities.
* Engaging workplace: Embrace a culture where employees shape their own future and enjoy a welcoming, social workplace with many exciting events and activities.

NEED TO KNOW


Start date and location  

As a recent graduate, you’ll join our Stockholm or Gothenburg office in Fall 2026, with readiness to travel and work on projects at our client sites.


Application process  

Applications are reviewed continuously; apply early to secure your spot. Please submit your CV in English along with your official transcripts from high school and university. Since the system only allows one upload field for grades (under “Cover Letter”), we kindly ask you to combine all your transcripts- high school, bachelor’s, and master’s- into a single document before uploading. Clearly state your expected graduation date and preferred office location(s). Incomplete applications will not be considered.




As part of our recruitment process, identity verification will be conducted through inspection of your ID card, and background checks may be carried out as required.


Next steps  

Our selection process includes several steps to ensure a fair and thorough evaluation:

* CV & grade screening
* Phone interview
* Video interview
* On-site case
* Final interview
* Offer

It is a responsible and diverse group of 340,000 team members in more than 50 countries. With its strong over 55-year heritage, Capgemini is trusted by its clients to unlock the value of technology to address the entire breadth of their business needs. It delivers end-to-end services and solutions leveraging strengths from strategy and design to engineering, all fueled by its market leading capabilities in AI, generative AI, cloud and data, combined with its deep industry.

title: Data Scientist (Knowledge Graph)
description:
* Permanent
* Experienced Professionals
* Data & AI
* ID 349270-en\_US

At Capgemini, you’ll have the opportunity to shape your career in a way that suits you, supported by a global community of experts who inspire and empower you. We believe in reimagining what’s possible - using technology to build a more sustainable, inclusive world. Our Insights & Data team is at the forefront of this mission, delivering end-to-end Data & AI solutions across industries. With over 550 specialists in the Nordics, we leverage strategic partnerships with Google, AWS, Microsoft, Databricks, and Snowflake to scale Data & Analytics in the Cloud. Here, your expertise and perspective matter - join us in driving innovation and transforming industries with cutting-edge data solutions!


Your role


As a Knowledge graph consultant, you will help our clients make better data-driven decisions by modeling and building robust data flows, creating an efficient data transporter, and building data architecture for Machine Learning solutions and BI solutions. You will also work with the development of computer science solutions stars on graph technology.  

  

*In this role you will play a key role in:*

* Assisting our clients in their work, as they exploit the capabilities of the W3C Semantic Stack (RDF, RDFS, SPARQL, OWL, SHACL), graph databases and ontology modelling tools, or tech stack like Neo4j, Cypher or Labeled Property Graph implementations.
* Combining knowledge graphs with Natural Language Processing – a perfect opportunity for someone with a background as linguist combined with a great interest in knowledge graphs.
* Working with a variation of clients located across Northern Europe. In a hybrid working model, you might be asked to travel while on other occasions you will be working remotely.
* Bringing success in the role, by thriving in an international environment, where you generously share your domain knowledge within Graph technology.

Your profile

* You have worked in the public or private sector, where you have used your domain experience in knowledge graph technologies. You enjoy solving complex modeling problems
* Knowledge about Linked Data Concepts
* ETL processes with various graph databases and experience in Interaction with graph databases through standardized APIs and query languages
* Information and Data Management
* Programming skills (specific language is not required, but we use Python, Java or .Net)
* Semantic technologies: Utilize (W3C) Standards of the Semantic Stack. Knowledge regarding several databases (or excellent on at least one) and modelling knowledge with ontologies using various tools.
* Skills for LPG: Knowledge regarding several databases or excellent on at least one.
* *You live in Stockholm Greater area of Sweden.*

  

What we believe you will enjoy about working here

* We recognize the significance of flexible work arrangements to provide support. Be it remote work, or flexible work hours, you will get an environment to maintain healthy work life balance.
* At the heart of our mission is your career growth. Our array of career growth programs and diverse professions are crafted to support you in exploring a world of opportunities.
* We work closely with Neo4J on both a local and European level.

  

Application

description:
* Permanent
* Experienced Professionals
* Architecture
* ID 210550-en\_US

Choosing Capgemini means choosing a company where you will be empowered to shape your career in the way you’d like, where you’ll be supported and inspired by a collaborative community of colleagues both locally and around the world, reimagining what’s possible. In this role you will be part of building Public Safety & Critical Communications with deep expertise in telecom, connectivity, and mission-critical communications. We develop tailored applications and manage complex integrations to maximize the potential of technology. Join us and help the world’s leading organizations unlock the value of technology and build a more sustainable, more inclusive world!




The Role


As an OSS/BSS Transformation Expert Architect, you will play a key role in shaping next-generation telecom solutions. You’ll lead strategic transformation initiatives, design scalable architectures, and guide stakeholders through complex integrations to deliver innovative, future-ready systems.


* Lead end-to-end OSS/BSS transformation for telecom service providers, ensuring scalable and innovative solutions.
* Design comprehensive architectures, define integration strategies, and recommend modern tools and technologies.
* Drive program execution from design to delivery, managing risks, timelines, and stakeholder alignment.
Shape strategic roadmaps for OSS/BSS evolution, focusing on cost efficiency and enhanced customer experience.  
* 

  

Your profile

* 12+ years in telecom, including 5+ years in OSS/BSS transformation projects with Tier-1/Tier-2 operators or vendors.
* Deep technical expertise in OSS/BSS systems, telecom protocols, TM Forum standard models, integration patterns, and cloud-native architectures.
* Understanding telecom business and operating models and the ability to design scalable architectures. Proficiency in architectural tools.
* Strong leadership and communication skills with ability to link technical solutions to business outcomes and manage stakeholders with conflicting views.
* Education & Certification: bachelor's or master's degree in relevant fields; TM Forum certification preferred. TOGAF, AWS/Azure, and ITIL are considered a plus.
* You will be required to pass through SC Security Clearance if you are successful in this recruitment process, which is a condition of undertaking the role
What we belive you will enjoy about working here

* In this role you will be part of building Public Safety & Critical Communications with deep expertise in telecom, connectivity, and mission-critical communications.
* At the heart of our mission is your career growth. Our array of career growth programs and diverse professions are crafted to support you in exploring a world of opportunities.
* Equip yourself with valuable certifications in the latest technologies
* Exposure to cutting-edge technologies in the telecom industry, including professional certifications in telecom technologies and BSS/OSS platforms
* Our Values: Honesty, Boldness, Trust, Freedom, Team spirit, Modesty and Fun




Application

title: Senior Cloud Architect & People Manager
description:
* Permanent
* Experienced Professionals
* Software Engineering
* ID 367738-en\_US

Att välja Capgemini innebär att välja en arbetsplats där du ges möjlighet att forma din karriär på det sätt du själv önskar, där du ingår i en stödjande och inspirerande gemenskap med engagerade kollegor världen över, och där du får chansen att omdefiniera vad som är möjligt. Våra Cloud & Custom applications-team fokuserar på att utveckla skräddarsydda cloudapplikationer, integrera IT-system och driva affärstransformation, med leverans av affärskritiska cloudlösningar i hög kvalitet och hastighet, möjliggjort av Generative AI. Bli en del av oss och hjälp världsledande organisationer att frigöra teknikens värde och bygga en mer hållbar och inkluderande framtid!  

  

  

  

Om rollen  

Vill du förändra världen? Vi söker en Senior Cloud Architect & People Manager för AWS och/eller GCP, som kommer vara en nyckelperson i att utföra molntransformationer inom AWS / GCP, driva strategiska initiativ på nordisk nivå, vara rådgivare åt CXOs, och bygga högpresterande team. Du kommer ha möjlighet att delta i molnkonferenser, bidra till pre-sales och bygga nätverk med partners som Amazon, Microsoft och Google.  

  

I rollen kommer du behöva stödja kunder med molnarkitektur, kunna stödja team i att utföra implementationer av din vision, och successivt ta större ledaransvar för ett växande team. Du kommer ha ansvar som people manager där du kommer vara chef, ha personalansvar, ansvara för rekryteringsmål, och stödja kollegor.  

  

  



  

*I den här rollen kommer du att ha en nyckelroll i:*  



* Driva strategi och initiativ inom cloud på nordisk nivå.
* Hjälpa våra kunder med molnarkitektur och cloud native lösningar.

Använda dig utav generativ och agentisk AI.  
* 

*S**om People Manager kommer du att:*

  

* Personalansvar för ett växande team.
* Ansvara för att sätta riktningen för teamets utveckling, driva affärsutveckling och bidra till tillväxt. Rekrytering och kompetensutveckling är en naturlig del av din vardag.
* Ha fokus på dina teammedlemmars individuella karriärutveckling. Genom regelbundna one-on-one-samtal hjälper du dina konsulter att planera sina karriärer och nå sina mål.
* Du kommer att arbeta nära försäljnings- och leveransteam, andra chefer för att säkerställa att vi levererar högsta värde till våra kunder.

  

Din profil

  

* Minst 6 års erfarenhet och mycket goda kunskaper av implementation med molntjänster som AWS eller GCP.
* Minst 3 år som molnarkitekt och ansvarig för att sätta upp molnarkitektur, gärna med kunskaper om Amazons tolkning utav CAF, WAF, COM och OCA.
* Kunskap i ett eller flera programmeringsspråk, t.ex. Python, Java, Kotlin, Golang eller Node.
* Intresse för DevSecOps, generativ AI, agentisk AI och cloud-native lösningar.
* En naturlig ledare som vill utveckla andra. Väldigt positivt om du har tidigare erfarenhet med personalansvar.
* Flytande svenska och engelska kunskaper, i både tal och skrift.

  



Vad vi tror kommer få dig att trivas


* Arbeta med de senaste teknologierna och påverka på nordisk nivå. Du samarbetar med andra specialister, kompetensväxlar och bidrar till att bygga AWS-kapabilitet i Norden – samtidigt som du påverkar några av världens största bolag.
* Utvecklas genom utbildningar, certifieringar och interna initiativ- Du får tillgång till utbildningar och certifieringar inom AI och AWS samt möjlighet att engagera dig i Capgeminis fokusområden som Diversity & Inclusion, Sustainability, Wellness Club och Art Club.
* Njut av en engagerande arbetsplats med starkt stöd och förmåner. Vi erbjuder friskvårdsbidrag, tjänstepension, bonusprogram, företagshälsovård och sjukvårdsförsäkring – samt en inkluderande kontorskultur med sociala aktiviteter och teambuilding.

  

Ansökan  

Redo att ta din karriär till nästa nivå? Ansök nu och bli en del av Capgemini Sveriges innovativa AWS-team! Ansök redan idag – vi hanterar ansökningarna löpande. Under processen får du chansen att kika in på vårt kontor, prata med vår rekryterande chef och självklart ställa alla dina nyfikna frågor till vår rekryterare. Varmt välkommen in med din ansökan!

Eftersom rollen är ny får du stor frihet att påverka dess utveckling och forma vägarna framåt för att skapa verkligt värde för Capgemini och våra kunder.  

  

*I den här rollen kommer du att ha en nyckelroll i:*

* Bygga och dela kunskap internt genom Capgeminis Guilds och Centers of Excellences, samt kombinera teknisk expertis med affärsdrivande och kommunikativa insatser för att inspirera och sälja in lösningar.

  

Din profil

* Dokumenterad kompetens inom Agentic AI och erfarenhet av att omsätta komplex teknik till affärsvärde.
* Djup teknisk expertis kombinerad med affärsmässighet och en konsultativ, kommunikativ och pedagogisk approach – du kan förklara teknik på ett sätt som skapar förståelse och engagemang.

Vad vi tror kommer få dig att trivas

* Tillgång till den senaste tekniken och plattformar som Microsoft Copilot, Azure AI foundry, UiPath Agentic och Google Cloud, samt ett globalt nätverk av experter.
* En kultur som uppmuntrar innovation, kompetensutveckling och kunskapsdelning, där du får utrymme att leda förändring och skapa verklig impact.

  

Ansökan

Därefter följer en telefonintervju med ansvarig Talent Acquisition Partner, en intervju med rekryterande chef på kontoret och en teknisk intervju där vi går djupare in på din kompetens. Som avslutning genomför vi relevanta tester och referenstagning innan vi går vidare till ett eventuellt erbjudande.*  

  

*Vi värdesätter din tid och ser till att du får tydlig kommunikation och snabb återkoppling genom hela processen. Du kommer löpande kunna ställa frågor och få uppdateringar från ansvarig Talent Acquisition Partner – vårt mål är att skapa en positiv upplevelse där du får en rättvis bild av både rollen och oss som arbetsgivare.*

title: Migration Discovery & Assessment Lead
description:
* Permanent
* Experienced Professionals
* Cloud Infrastructure Management
* ID 433659-en\_US

Choosing Capgemini means choosing a company where you will be empowered to shape your career in the way you’d like, where you’ll be supported and inspired by a collaborative community of colleagues around the world, and where you’ll be able to reimagine what’s possible. Join us and help the world’s leading organizations unlock the value of technology and build a more sustainable, more inclusive world.


Make it real with Cloud Infrastructure Services (CIS) at Capgemini.  

  

At CIS, we enable organizations to transform and thrive in a digital-first world. Our teams deliver end-to-end solutions across cloud, cybersecurity, automation, and user experience – helping clients modernize their infrastructure and unlock innovation at scale.  

  

Your role  

We are looking for an experienced Migration Discovery & Assessment Lead who will play a key role in large-scale enterprise transformation and cloud migration initiatives. This role is critical in shaping successful migration programs by creating clarity, structure, and direction at the very start of the journey.  

As Migration Discovery & Assessment Lead, you will be responsible for understanding complex enterprise IT landscapes, translating data into insights, and turning those insights into clear, executable migration roadmaps that align technology with business goals.  

  

You will:  

* Lead discovery and assessment activities for large enterprise environments, covering applications, infrastructure, platforms, and dependencies
* Collect, structure, and analyze large volumes of data from multiple sources such as CMDBs, discovery tools, workshops, and interviews
* Assess on premises and cloud environments and define target-state migration strategies
* Design and present migration roadmaps, including migration waves, dependencies, risks, recommended migration approaches, and associated cost and TCO considerations
* Translate technical findings into clear, decision-ready proposals, including TCO analysis and migration business cases, for architects, IT leadership, and business stakeholders
* Act as a trusted advisor to clients, helping them understand what to migrate, how to migrate, and in which order
* Collaborate with architects, engineers, and business representatives to ensure alignment between technical feasibility, financial viability, and business priorities

Your profile  

We are looking for someone who combines strong analytical skills, broad technical knowledge, and excellent communication abilities.  

  

You also have:  

* Proven experience leading discovery and assessment phases in enterprise migration projects
* Strong background in on premises infrastructure (data centers, servers, networks, storage, virtualization, operating systems)
* Solid experience with public cloud platforms (Azure, AWS and/or GCP) and cloud migration concepts
* Hands-on experience with one or more migration and discovery tools, such as Azure Migrate, AWS Application Discovery Service, AWS Application Migration Service (MGN), Cast Highlight, Cast Imaging, Cloudamize, and Txture
* Ability to work with complex data sets and transform them into structured insights and actionable recommendations
* Full working proficiency in both Swedish and English

  

What we believe you will enjoy about working here  

* A challenging career in a vibrant environment with access to extensive training, a global network of experts, and an innovative culture that promotes learning, growth, and shared success
* Work on large, business-critical transformation programs, helping organizations modernize their IT landscapes and move confidently toward the future
* A company culture driven by core values: Honesty, Trust, Freedom, Team Spirit, Modesty, Fun, and Boldness
* A strong commitment to inclusion, diversity, and supporting the whole person

  

Ready to make it real? Explore opportunities with CIS and shape the future of digital infrastructure.  

  

*As part of our recruitment process, identity verification will be conducted through inspection of your ID card, and background checks may be carried out as required.*

Collaborate with stakeholders to drive adoption of new tools and processes.
* Enhance Future‑Ready Logistics Capabilities – Strengthen modern logistics practices through smarter use of data and AI, support the adoption of automation and visibility solutions, and help shape future‑ready operating models.

Your Profile


We believe you bring experience or strong interest in one or several of the following areas:


* Transport Management System (TMS) & Business Analysis – Knowledge of leading TMS platforms, combined with business analyst experience in understanding business needs, documenting requirements, and supporting implementation work.
* Logistics Operations & Network Design – Practical experience within transportation, warehousing, and distribution operations - gained through hands-on operational roles or project/business analyst positions. Ability to design distribution networks, including experience with modeling tools and scenario‑based analysis.
* Analytical Problem Solving – Skilled at analyzing data, breaking down complex issues, and turning insights into clear recommendations while supporting teams in defining better ways of working.
* Change & Stakeholder Engagement – Strong communication skills with the ability to facilitate discussions, align stakeholders, and drive adoption across business and IT teams.

Additional Requirements


* 2-7 years’ work experience, ideally from management consulting or equivalent
* A master’s degree with a business, technical or supply chain/operations focus
* Excellent Swedish and English language skills and Swedish work permit required
What You'll Love About Working Here


At Capgemini Invent, you’ll be part of a global team shaping the future of for supply chain & logistics. We offer:




* Impactful Work: Drive transformation for some of the world’s leading companies within the supply chain & logistics industry, helping organizations define their strategic direction and put in place governance structures and delivery plans that turn vision into tomorrow’s ground-breaking services and solutions.
* Innovation at Scale: Work with cutting-edge technologies and strategies to solve complex industry challenges.
* Career Growth: Access world-class training, mentorship, and opportunities to accelerate your career.
* Collaborative Culture: Join a diverse, inclusive team that values creativity, curiosity, and bold ideas.
* Purpose-Driven Projects: Help clients build sustainable, customer-centric solutions that make a real difference.

Need To Know


Location: In line with our trust-based culture, Capgemini Invent offers a hybrid working model, and for this role you will be based in our attractively located Stockholm or Gothenburg office, ready to travel to our clients’ sites when needed.




As part of our recruitment process, identity verification will be conducted through inspection of your ID card, and background checks may be carried out as required.




*Sounds like the next step in your career? We review applications on an ongoing basis and encourage you to apply as soon as possible!*


About Capgemini


Capgemini is a global business and technology transformation partner, helping organizations to accelerate their dual transition to a digital and sustainable world, while creating tangible impact for enterprises and society. It is a responsible and diverse group of 340,000 team members in more than 50 countries. With its strong over 55-year heritage, Capgemini is trusted by its clients to unlock the value of technology to address the entire breadth of their business needs. title: People Manager (Platform & Data Engineering)
description:
* Permanent
* Experienced Professionals
* Data & AI
* ID 275257-en\_US

At Capgemini, you have the opportunity to shape your career in the way that fits you best - supported by a community of experts who inspire, challenge, and empower you. We believe in reimagining what’s possible and using technology to build a more sustainable and inclusive future. Our Insights & Data team leads the way in this mission, delivering end-to-end Data & AI solutions across industries. With over 550 specialists in the Nordics and strong partnerships with Google, AWS, Microsoft, Databricks, and Snowflake, we scale next‑generation Cloud Data & Analytics with impact. Here, your skills matter, your ideas matter, and your growth matters. Join us and be part of transforming industries with cutting-edge data innovation.  

  

Ready to elevate your career? We are now looking for our next People Manager within the AI & Data Engineering unit - a role that brings together leadership, technical depth, and genuine influence.

  

Your role  

*As a Data Engineer with a focus on Azure**,* *GCP, Fabric, Snowflake or Databricks, you will:*

* Design and build high-performing data pipelines using tools like Fabric, Databricks and Apache Spark in Azure.
* Develop secure, scalable data lakehouses and warehouses, including data models and quality frameworks.
* Build and deploy AI/ML models using Databricks ML and Azure ML to turn data into actionable insights.
* Monitor and optimize data pipelines and infrastructure for performance, cost-efficiency, and scalability.
* Collaborate closely with cross-functional teams to ensure smooth delivery and real business outcomes.
* Stay ahead of the curve by exploring new technologies, tools, and best practices within the big data landscape.
 *As a People Manager, you will:*

  

* Lead and inspire a team of 5-10 consultants, creating a positive, collaborative, and motivating environment.
* Focus on individual development, conducting regular 1:1s to support each team member’s career goals, growth paths, and wellbeing.
* Be a key part of the AI & Data Engineering leadership team, influencing strategy and team culture.
* Prioritize people and clients - we intentionally minimize administrative tasks so you can focus on what truly matters.

Your profile

* Several years of experience in Data Engineering.
* Proven expertise in technologies such as Azure, Databricks, Apache Spark, and modern data pipeline development.
* Strong knowledge of data warehouse concepts and hands-on experience with Azure services (Azure Data Lake Storage, Databricks, Azure Data Factory).
* Proficiency in SQL and scripting languages like Python, plus practical familiarity with AI/ML tools and concepts.
  

What we believe you will enjoy about working here  

  



* Flexibility that works for you - remote options and flexible hours to support a healthy work-life balance.
* Continuous career growth - we offer diverse, personalized development pathways and programs tailored to your ambitions.
* Future-proof skills - gain valuable certifications in leading technologies such as Databricks, Azure, Fabric, or Snowflake.

  

Your application
  

*As part of our recruitment process, identity verification will be conducted through inspection of your ID card, and background checks may be carried out as required.*

At Capgemini Engineering, the world leader in engineering services, we bring together a global team of engineers, scientists, and architects to help the world’s most innovative companies unleash their potential. * Partner closely with Project Managers to maintain alignment across delivery teams and influence successful project outcomes.

* University degree in mechanical engineering, electrical engineering or related discipline.
* 2–7 years of experience in product development as a Design Engineer.
* Strong proficiency in SABER, Catia V5, PDM system (Enovia) and deviation handling tools.
* Proven ability to implement standards on engineering drawings and interpret production drawings.

description:

At Capgemini Engineering, the world leader in engineering services, we bring together a global team of engineers, scientists, and architects to help the world’s most innovative companies unleash their potential. From autonomous cars to life-saving robots, our digital and software technology experts think outside the box as they provide unique R&D and engineering services across all industries. Your role
  

As a Diagnostic System Engineer, you are primarily responsible for developing Diagnostic databases and troubleshooting strategies, as well as improving diagnostic tools and processes. The main purpose is to reduce vehicle downtime by enhancing dealer technician troubleshooting efficiency.

*In this role you will play a key role in:*

* Gathering and submit diagnostic data from R&D Engineering teams into the Diagnostic database.
* Verifying that the methods and tools within fault tracing, including the DTCs, are efficient and accurate
* Focusing on advanced fault analysis for all the different technical domains within the vehicle, Engine & Transmission, EATS, E&E, Chassis, Electrical drivetrain and Telematics

Your profile

* University degree in Mechanical, Automotive, Electrical, or Mechatronics Engineering.
* Min 3 years experience in Automotive Diagnostics preferably within Heavy Duty applications.
* Strong understanding of Automotive system design (incl. AutoSAR) is needed.
* Experience within diagnostic engineering and tools (e.g., TechTool, SEWS, GDSP).
* Knowledge of CAN, LIN, J1939, OBD protocols.
* Knowledge within ISO26262, Cybersecurity and SOVD is meritorious.


What we believe you will enjoy about working here

* Innovative Projects: Dive into exciting projects at the forefront of automotive development, shaping the future of mobility.

* Continuous Growth: Fuel your passion for learning with ongoing training and development opportunities, staying ahead of the curve in the ever-evolving automotive landscape.


Application  

The work is performed onsite at our customer, with frequent collaboration with the corresponding Global engineering teams for each of the technical domains. Occasional travel might be needed for critical root cause analysis, pilot testing or training support.

As inventive transformation consultants, we blend our strategic, creative and scientific capabilities, collaborating closely with clients to deliver cutting-edge solutions. Your Role


Capgemini Invent SweDFi (Sweden, Denmark, Finland) is seeking an experienced professional to join our Energy Transition & Utilities industry team in Stockholm. This role is suited for a professional with long-standing experience in the Energy & Utility sector, who combines a strategic perspective, commercial drive and credibility at executive level. This is a unique opportunity to own, lead and grow a large strategic client relationship within the Energy & Utilities sector, acting as their trusted advisor and driving tailored transformation initiatives. You will be accountable for understanding the client’s specific needs, shaping solutions that leverage Capgemini Group’s global capabilities, and expanding our partnership to deliver measurable business impact.

* Own & grow a strategic client relationship: Serve as a trusted advisor to senior executives for this dedicated account within Energy & Utility, challenging and guiding their strategic direction. Develop a deep understanding of client’s priorities and leverage Capgemini’s global capabilities to shape relevant, value-driving solutions.
* Drive Commercial Growth: Lead business development initiatives within this account, from identifying new opportunities to shaping proposals and closing strategic deals. Expand and grow this key account, building long-term partnerships centered on measurable business outcomes.
* Shape Tailored Solutions: Collaborate with multidisciplinary teams to design and deliver transformation initiatives aligned with the client’s objectives.
* Champion Innovation: Bring insights on industry trends, regulatory changes, and digital technologies to help the client navigate the energy transition and sustainability challenges.

Your Profile


You are a seasoned professional with a strong track record in the Energy & Utilities sector, ideally in consulting, transformation leadership, or executive roles. You bring:

* Strong commercial acumen with a demonstrated track record of business development, long-term client engagement, ownership and account growth, supported by an active senior-level network within the Energy & Utilities sector.
* Deep understanding of the Utilities sector dynamics, industry trends, regulatory frameworks, and digital technologies shaping the energy landscape.
* Excellent leadership, communication, and stakeholder management skills.
* A strong academic foundation, ideally at Master’s level within business/economics, engineering, or a related field.
* Fluency in Swedish and English, both written and spoken.

What You'll Love About Working Here


At Capgemini Invent, you’ll be part of a global team shaping the future of the Energy & Utilities industry. We offer:

* Impactful Work: Drive transformation for some of the world’s leading companies within the energy and utilities industry, helping organizations define their strategic direction and put in place governance structures and delivery plans that turn vision into tomorrow’s ground-breaking services and solutions.
* Innovation at Scale: Work with cutting-edge technologies and strategies to solve complex industry challenges.
* Career Growth: Access world-class training, mentorship, and opportunities to accelerate your career.
* Collaborative Culture: Join a diverse, inclusive team that values creativity, curiosity, and bold ideas.
* Purpose-Driven Projects: Help clients build sustainable, customer-centric solutions that make a real difference.

Need To Know


Location: In line with our trust-based culture, Capgemini Invent offers a hybrid working model, and for this role you will be based in our attractively located Stockholm office, ready to travel to our clients’ sites when needed.


The seniority level and title will depend on your background and experience.

  

As part of our recruitment process, identity verification will be conducted through inspection of your ID card, and background checks may be carried out as required.

description:
* Permanent
* Experienced Professionals
* Products & Systems Engineering
* ID 381135-en\_US

På Capgemini Engineering, världsledande inom ingenjörstjänster, samlar vi ett globalt team av ingenjörer, forskare och arkitekter för att hjälpa världens mest innovativa företag att nå sin fulla potential. Från självkörande bilar till livräddande robotar – våra experter inom digital och mjukvaruteknik tänker utanför ramarna och levererar unika FoU- och ingenjörstjänster inom alla branscher. Bli en del av oss för en karriär full av möjligheter. Där du kan göra skillnad. Där ingen dag är den andra lik.


Om rollen


Som systemingenjör kan du förvänta dig övergripande systemarbete, kravhantering och nedbrytning, systemdesign med fokus på både hård- och mjukvarukonstruktion/arkitektur. Arbetet omfattar att bryta ned och allokera samt fördela krav. Du kommer ha ansvar att följa upp mottagande från kund, sammanställa och rapportera resultat från verifiering och validering (VoV).

*I denna roll kommer du att spela en nyckelroll i:*

* Att arbeta med hur data och system kravställs, utvecklas, testas och distribueras; kan tex vara i form av geografisk data till flygplan, och 3D-omvärldar för simulatorer samt till andra system.
* Uppgifter som att arbeta fram kreativa lösningar kring överenskommen kravbild tillsammans med angränsande system samt att kommunicera med interna och externa intressenter.
* Deltagelse av olika typer av tekniska utredningar.
* Kontakt med teknisk ledare, uppdragsledare samt Scrum Master.

Din profil

* En B.Sc eller högre inom elektroteknik, mekatronik, systemteknik eller liknande utbildning
* Minst 3 års arbetslivserfarenhet som ingenjör
* Erfarenhet inom kravarbete, systemdesign och projektmetodik
* Framtagning av teknisk dokumentation
* Kravverifiering och Kravnedbrytning (ex DIM RM, DOORS)
* Verktyg som till exempel Matlab och python
* Denna tjänst kräver svensk medborgarskap samt att man blir godkänd i en säkerhetsprövning i enlighet med säkerhetsskyddslagen.


Vad vi tror kommer få dig att trivas

* Spännande uppdrag med cutting-edge teknologi inom försvarsindustrin
* Tydlig karriärplan med skräddarsydda utvecklingsmöjligheter genom Capgemini Engineering Academy
* Flexibla arbetsvillkor och konkurrenskraftiga förmåner
* Möjlighet att delta i globala ingenjörsgemenskaper och olika interna nätverk
* Kollektivavtal som säkerställer dina anställningsvillkor

description:
* Permanent
* Experienced Professionals
* Data & AI
* ID 424340-en\_US

At Capgemini, you have the opportunity to shape your career in the way that fits you best - supported by a community of experts who inspire, challenge, and empower you. We believe in reimagining what’s possible and using technology to build a more sustainable and inclusive future. Our Insights & Data team leads the way in this mission, delivering end-to-end Data & AI solutions across industries. With over 550 specialists in the Nordics and strong partnerships with Google, AWS, Microsoft, Databricks, and Snowflake, we scale next‑generation Cloud Data & Analytics with impact. Here, your skills matter, your ideas matter, and your growth matters. Join us and be part of transforming industries with cutting-edge data innovation.


Your role  

  

Are you passionate about using data and AI to drive innovation and create real sustainability impact? As a consultant, you’ll work with one of our major automotive clients, where data is reshaping everything from product development to connected services. You will design and deliver end‑to‑end ML solutions and AI products that improve safety, efficiency, and customer experience across the client’s global operations.  

  

*In this role you will play a key role in:*  

  



* Deliver real client and end‑customer value by translating business challenges into well‑defined ML problems, defining success metrics, and delivering impactful solutions.
* Own the full ML/AI product lifecycle, including designing, building, deploying, and operating production‑grade systems with CI/CD, monitoring, versioning, and observability.
* Monitor and optimize model performance by tracking drift, evaluating results, and collaborating with stakeholders to identify when models need updates or redesign—ensuring governance, quality, security, and regulatory compliance.
* Collaborate and uplift others through knowledge sharing, mentoring, code reviews, documentation, and cross‑functional teamwork to strengthen both client and internal capabilities.




Your profile

  

* Strong Machine Learning & Data Science expertise: You bring hands‑on experience in applied ML/AI, including statistics, experimentation, feature engineering, drift detection, classification, anomaly detection, reinforcement learning, NLP, explainable AI, and risk/fraud modelling. Experience with LLMs for text analysis is a plus.
* Solid Engineering & MLOps skills: You are proficient in Azure, Databricks, Python, SQL, Git, and modern MLOps practices (Azure Pipelines, Databricks Jobs, observability, Docker). You value clean, maintainable code and follow best practices in testing, documentation, reproducibility, and infrastructure as code.
* Collaborative, adaptive, and impact‑driven: You combine strategic thinking with hands‑on execution and thrive in dynamic environments. You communicate clearly, work well with multidisciplinary teams, enjoy both learning and sharing knowledge, and contribute positively to a culture built on trust, co‑creation, and curiosity.
* Domain knowledge: Experience in automotive or vehicle data, or in quality and warranty analytics, is beneficial but not required.

What we believe you will enjoy about working here  

  

  



* Flexibility that works for you - remote options and flexible hours to support a healthy work-life balance.
* Continuous career growth - we offer diverse, personalized development pathways and programs tailored to your ambitions.
* We partner with names such as Google, Microsoft, Amazon and Databricks, which can equip you with valuable certifications in the latest technologies in line with your ambitions.

  

Your application  

  

  



*We know that great candidates bring a unique mix of skills, experiences, and perspectives. Even if you don’t meet every single requirement, we encourage you to apply - your background might be exactly what we’re looking for. We are an equal opportunity employer and welcome applicants of all genders and identities, backgrounds, and abilities.*
